    .admin-grid-inputs { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .admin-product-editor { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.3fr) minmax(320px, 0.7fr); gap: 18px; align-items: start; margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .admin-product-editor .admin-create-box { margin-bottom: 0; }
    .admin-editor-section { padding: 18px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--line); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); display: grid; gap: 14px; }
    .admin-editor-section h4 { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; }
    .admin-editor-hint { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }
    .admin-image-manager { display: grid; gap: 12px; }
    .admin-image-toolbar { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 12px; align-items: stretch; }
    .admin-image-pick-card {
      display: grid;
      gap: 10px;
      padding: 14px;
      border-radius: 18px;
      border: 1px solid var(--line);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    }
    .admin-image-pick-head { display: grid; gap: 4px; }
    .admin-image-pick-title { font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.2px; }
    .admin-image-pick-note { font-size: 0.76rem; line-height: 1.45; color: var(--muted); }
    .admin-image-file-input {
      width: 100%;
      padding: 10px 12px;
      border-radius: 14px;
      border: 1px dashed var(--line-strong);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
      color: var(--muted-light);
      font-size: 0.84rem;
    }
    .admin-image-selected {
      min-height: 132px;
      border: 1px dashed var(--line-strong);
      border-radius: 16px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      text-align: center;
      overflow: hidden;
      padding: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .admin-image-selected img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      border-radius: 0;
      display: block;
    }
    .admin-image-selected .file-meta {
      display: grid;
      gap: 4px;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      line-height: 1.4;
    }
    .admin-image-selected .file-meta small {
      display: block;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--muted);
    }
    .admin-image-list { display: grid; gap: 10px; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr)); }
    .admin-image-item { border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); display: grid; gap: 8px; }
    .admin-image-item img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1/1; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 0; }
    .admin-image-item-body { padding: 10px; display: grid; gap: 8px; }
    .admin-image-item-actions { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .admin-image-item-actions .btn { padding: 7px 8px; font-size: 0.72rem; flex: 1; }

    .admin-row-list { display: grid; gap: 10px; }
    .admin-row-card { border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); display: grid; gap: 10px; }
    .admin-row-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr)); gap: 8px; }
    .admin-row-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .admin-row-actions .btn { padding: 7px 8px; font-size: 0.72rem; }
    .admin-preview-shell { display: grid; gap: 14px; position: sticky; top: 104px; }
    .admin-preview-card { border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 20px; padding: 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); display: grid; gap: 10px; }
    .admin-preview-media { aspect-ratio: 1/1; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid var(--line); }
    .admin-preview-media img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 0; }
    .admin-preview-badges { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .admin-preview-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid var(--line); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); }
    .admin-preview-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 8px; }
    .admin-preview-grid .qv-feature-card { padding: 10px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--line); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); }
    .admin-preview-grid .qv-feature-card span { display: block; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .admin-preview-grid .qv-feature-card strong { font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.35; }
    .admin-badge-editor-lite { display: grid; gap: 8px; }
    .admin-badge-slot-row-lite { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr auto; gap: 8px; align-items: center; }
    .admin-badge-slot-row-lite .admin-badge-select, .admin-badge-slot-row-lite .admin-badge-color { width: 100%; }
    .admin-preview-summary { display: grid; gap: 6px; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--muted-light); line-height: 1.5; }
    .order-img-strip { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 6px; }
    .order-thumbnail { width: 36px; height: 36px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); }

    .footer { padding: 40px 0 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line); background: var(--bg-surface); }
    .footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.5fr repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 30px; margin-bottom: 30px; }
.promo-board-section { padding: 10px 0 32px; }
.promo-board-shell { padding: 18px; border-radius: 28px; }
.promo-board-head { display:flex; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:space-between; gap:14px; margin-bottom:16px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.promo-board-title { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
.promo-board-title i { font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--primary); }
.promo-board-title h2 { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.4px; margin: 0; }
.promo-board-sub { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 4px; }
.promo-board-grid { display:grid; gap: 16px; }
.promo-sale-feature { display:grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 280px) 1fr; gap: 18px; align-items:center; padding: 16px; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid var(--line); background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(244,63,94,0.14), rgba(255,255,255,0.02)); }
.promo-sale-image { width:100%; aspect-ratio: 1/1; border-radius: 20px; overflow:hidden; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid var(--line); }
.promo-sale-image img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; }
.promo-sale-copy { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap: 10px; }
.promo-sale-kicker { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; width: fit-content; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(244,63,94,0.12); color: var(--accent); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; }
.promo-sale-copy h3 { font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.7rem); line-height: 1.25; margin: 0; font-weight: 800; }
.promo-sale-desc { color: var(--muted-light); font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.65; }
.promo-countdown { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(16,185,129,0.12); color: var(--success); font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 800; width: fit-content; }
.promo-price-row { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.promo-price-current { font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--text); }
.promo-price-old { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--muted); text-decoration: line-through; }
.promo-section-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr)); gap:16px; }
.promo-section-panel { padding: 16px; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid var(--line); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); }
.promo-section-panel h3 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; margin: 0 0 12px 0; }
.promo-mini-grid { display:grid; gap: 12px; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr)); }
.promo-mini-grid.three { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0,1fr)); }
.promo-mini-card { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap: 8px; border-radius: 18px; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--line); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); min-height: 100%; transition: var(--transition); }
.promo-mini-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(0,240,255,0.22); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }
.promo-mini-card.empty { opacity: 0.72; border-style: dashed; }
.promo-mini-thumb { width:100%; aspect-ratio:1/1; border-radius: 14px; overflow:hidden; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }
.promo-mini-thumb img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit: cover; display:block; }
.promo-mini-title { font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.35; min-height: 2.7em; margin: 0; }
.promo-mini-meta { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.78rem; }
.promo-mini-actions { display:flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: auto; }
.promo-mini-actions .btn { flex:1; padding: 8px 10px; font-size: 0.74rem; }
.promo-admin-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0,1fr)); gap: 14px; margin-top: 14px; }
.promo-admin-card { border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 20px; padding: 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; }
.promo-admin-card h5 { font-size: 0.96rem; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
.promo-admin-card .field-label { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 2px; }
.promo-admin-actions { display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top: 12px; }
.promo-admin-actions .btn { min-width: 180px; flex: 1; }
.promo-admin-note { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.45; }
.promo-admin-preview { padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid var(--line); font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted-light); }
    .footer-col h4 { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .footer-links { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); }
    .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--primary); padding-left: 2px; }

    /* ==========================================================================
       11. CRISP RESPONSIVE ENGINE
       ========================================================================== */
    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .shop-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .mobile-filter-trigger { display: inline-flex; }
      .filter-sidebar { 
        position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 300px; max-width: 85vw; height: 100%; 
        z-index: 180; overflow-y: auto; border-radius: 0; border: none; border-right: 1px solid var(--line);
        transform: translateX(-100%); transition: transform 0.4s ease; background: var(--bg-surface);
      }
      .filter-sidebar.open { transform: translateX(0); }
      .filter-sidebar-close { display: block; }
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .mobile-menu-toggle { display: block; }
      .nav-menu {
        position: fixed; top: 80px; left: 0; width: 100%; background: var(--bg-surface);
        flex-direction: column; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
        max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.3s ease; padding: 0;
      }
      .nav-menu.open { max-height: 300px; padding: 10px 0; }
      .nav-menu li { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
      .nav-menu li a { display: block; padding: 12px 0; width: 100%; }

      .hero-slider { height: 380px; }
      .slide-content { padding: 0 24px; }
      .quickview-modal { grid-template-columns: 1fr; max-height: 85vh; overflow-y: auto; }
      .qv-media { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); }
      .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .product-showcase-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .featured-products-head { gap: 10px; }
      .featured-products-note { width: 100%; justify-content: center; }
      .promo-sale-feature { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .promo-section-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .promo-mini-grid.three { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); }
      .promo-admin-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }

    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .product-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .product-showcase-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .hero-slider { height: 340px; }
      .btn { padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 0.88rem; }
      .promo-mini-grid,
      .promo-mini-grid.three { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .promo-admin-actions .btn { min-width: 100%; }
    }
  </style>

<style>
  /* ===== Patch: Hero editor + compact collection board ===== */
  .hero-mini-edit {
    position: absolute;
    left: 24px;
    top: 24px;
    width: 58px;
    height: 58px;
    border-radius: 18px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line-strong);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.12);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  }
  .hero-mini-edit img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 0;
  }
  .hero-mini-edit .fa-pen {
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 1rem;
  }
  .hero-admin-box {
    margin-top: 18px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 24px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
    padding: 18px;
  }
  .hero-admin-head {
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:12px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .hero-admin-head h4, .collection-admin-head h4 {
    margin:0;
    font-size:0.98rem;
    font-weight:800;
  }
  .hero-admin-note, .collection-admin-note {
    font-size: .8rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.45;
  }
  .hero-admin-bulk {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.5fr auto;
    gap:10px;
    align-items:end;
    padding:12px;
    border-radius:18px;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .hero-admin-grid {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(1, minmax(0,1fr));
    gap:14px;
  }
  .hero-admin-card {
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 20px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
    padding: 14px;
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: 160px 1fr;
    gap:14px;
    align-items:start;
  }
  .hero-admin-card.active {
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(37,99,235,.22);
    border-color: rgba(37,99,235,.35);
  }
  .hero-admin-preview {
    border:1px dashed var(--line-strong);
    border-radius: 18px;
    overflow:hidden;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
    aspect-ratio: 16 / 10;
    position:relative;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
  }
  .hero-admin-preview img {
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    display:block;
  }
  .hero-admin-preview .fallback {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size:.8rem;
    text-align:center;
    padding:10px;
  }
  .hero-admin-fields {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr));
    gap:10px;
  }
  .hero-admin-fields .field-full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
  .hero-admin-fields label {
    display:block;
    font-size:11px;
    font-weight:700;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .hero-admin-fields input[type="text"],
  .hero-admin-fields textarea,
  .hero-admin-fields input[type="file"] {
    width:100%;
  }
  .hero-admin-fields textarea {
    min-height: 86px;
    resize: vertical;
  }
  .hero-upload-row {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap:10px;
  }
  .hero-thumb-row {
    display:flex;
    gap:8px;
    align-items:center;
    margin-top:8px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .hero-thumb-chip {
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    padding:6px 10px;
    border-radius:999px;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
    font-size: .75rem;
    color: var(--muted-light);
  }
  .hero-thumb-chip img {
    width:28px;
    height:28px;
    border-radius:50%;
    object-fit:cover;
  }

  .collection-admin-shell {
    display:grid;
    gap:14px;
  }
  .collection-admin-tabs {
    display:flex;
    gap:8px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .collection-tab-btn {
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    padding:10px 14px;
    border-radius:999px;
    border:1px solid var(--line-strong);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
    font-weight:800;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition: var(--transition);
  }
  .collection-tab-btn.active {
    background: var(--primary-grad);
    color:#fff;
    border-color: transparent;
  }
  .collection-admin-panel {
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 20px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
    padding: 14px;
    display:grid;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .collection-admin-headline {
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:10px;
    align-items:flex-start;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .collection-admin-headline h5 {
    margin:0;
    font-size: 0.96rem;
    font-weight:800;
  }
  .collection-admin-headline .pill {
    display:inline-flex;
    padding:4px 10px;
    border-radius:999px;
    background: rgba(0,240,255,.08);
    color: var(--primary);
    font-size:.72rem;
    font-weight:800;
  }
  .collection-admin-grid {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr));
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .collection-admin-slot {
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 12px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
    display:grid;
    gap:10px;
  }
  .collection-admin-slot .slot-title {
    font-size: .8rem;
    font-weight:800;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .collection-admin-slot .slot-inputs {
    display:grid;
    gap:8px;
  }
  .collection-admin-actions {
    display:flex;
    gap:10px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .collection-admin-actions .btn {
    min-width: 160px;
    flex: 1;
  }

  .promo-board-section {
    padding: 8px 0 26px;
  }
  .flash-sale-shell {
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding: 18px;
    border-radius: 28px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--flash-sale-shell-start, #ff7070) 0%, var(--flash-sale-shell-end, #ff5959) 100%);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 50px rgba(255, 91, 91, .18);
  }
  .flash-sale-summary {
    padding: 12px 14px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    border-radius: 18px;
    border: none;
    background: var(--flash-sale-summary-bg, rgba(255,255,255,.96));
    box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
  }
  .flash-sale-summary h3 {
    color: #1f2937;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
  }
  .flash-sale-summary p {
    color: #6b7280;
    font-size: .8rem;
  }
  .flash-sale-brand {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 2vw, 1.8rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    font-style: italic;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    color: var(--flash-sale-brand-color, #ff4c2f);
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .flash-sale-brand i {
    color: var(--flash-sale-brand-icon, #fbbf24);
  }
  .flash-sale-clock {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: #1f2937;
  }
  .flash-sale-clock > span:first-child {
    color: var(--flash-sale-timer-label, #111827);
    font-size: .92rem;
  }
  .flash-sale-timer {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
  }
  .flash-sale-timer b {
    display: inline-flex;
    min-width: 34px;
    height: 30px;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0 8px;
    border-radius: 9px;
    background: var(--flash-sale-timer-bg, #111827);
    color: var(--flash-sale-timer-text, #fff);
    font-size: .9rem;
    line-height: 1;
    box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.12);
    border: 1px solid var(--flash-sale-timer-border, rgba(17,24,39,.08));
  }
  .flash-sale-timer span {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--flash-sale-timer-sep, #111827);
  }
  .flash-sale-grid {
    grid-auto-columns: minmax(176px, 208px);
    padding-top: 2px;
  }
  .flash-sale-grid .collection-product-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.97);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.45);
    box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
  }
  .flash-sale-grid .collection-product-media {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.92);
  }
  .flash-sale-grid .collection-product-title {
    font-size: .95rem;
  }
  .flash-sale-grid .collection-product-meta {
    font-size: .74rem;
  }
  .flash-sale-grid .collection-product-actions .btn.secondary {
    background: rgba(17,24,39,.05);
  }
  .flash-sale-grid .badge-tag.sale {
    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(225,29,72,.24);
  }
  .flash-sale-grid .collection-product-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
  }

  .promo-board-shell.compact {
    padding: 14px;
    border-radius: 24px;
  }
  .promo-board-tabs {
    display:flex;
    gap:8px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    margin: 10px 0 12px;
  }
  .promo-board-tab {
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    padding: 9px 12px;
    border-radius:999px;
    border:1px solid var(--line-strong);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.035);
    font-weight:800;
    font-size: .86rem;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition: var(--transition);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
  }
  .promo-board-tab:hover {
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    border-color: rgba(0,240,255,.22);
  }
  .promo-board-tab.active {
    background: var(--primary-grad);
    color:#fff;
    border-color: transparent;
  }
  .promo-board-summary {
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 18px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
  }
  .promo-board-summary .left {
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:3px;
    min-width: 0;
  }
  .promo-board-summary h3 {
    margin:0;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight:800;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .promo-board-summary p {
    margin:0;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: .78rem;
    line-height:1.45;
  }
  .collection-scroll-actions {
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .collection-scroll-btn {
    width: 38px;
    height: 38px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid var(--line-strong);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
    display:grid;
    place-items:center;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition: var(--transition);
    color: var(--text);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  }
  .collection-scroll-btn:hover {
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    border-color: rgba(0,240,255,.22);
    background: rgba(0,240,255,.08);
  }
  .collection-scroll-btn:disabled {
    opacity:.35;
    cursor:not-allowed;
    transform:none;
  }
  .collection-products-wrap {
    position: relative;
  }
  .collection-product-grid {
    display:grid;
    grid-auto-flow: column;
    grid-auto-columns: minmax(165px, 190px);
    gap: 12px;
    overflow-x: auto;
    overflow-y: hidden;
    scroll-snap-type: x proximity;
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    padding: 4px 2px 8px;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
  }
  .collection-product-grid::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display:none;
  }
  .collection-product-card {
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.03), rgba(255,255,255,.015));
    overflow:hidden;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    min-height:100%;
    transition: var(--transition);
    scroll-snap-align: start;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
  }
  .collection-product-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
    border-color: rgba(0,240,255,.22);
  }
  .collection-product-media {
    aspect-ratio: 1/1;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
    position:relative;
  }
  .collection-product-media img {
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
  }
  .collection-product-body {
    padding: 10px;
    display:grid;
    gap:7px;
    flex:1;
  }
  .collection-product-title {
    font-size: .88rem;
    font-weight:800;
    line-height:1.35;
    min-height: 2.45em;
  }
  .collection-product-meta {
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:8px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: .72rem;
  }
  .collection-product-actions {
    display:flex;
    gap:6px;
    margin-top:auto;
  }
  .collection-product-actions .btn {
    flex:1;
    padding: 7px 8px;
    font-size: .72rem;
    min-height: 34px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-admin-card,
    .collection-admin-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    .hero-admin-bulk {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    .collection-product-grid {
      grid-auto-columns: minmax(150px, 72vw);
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .promo-board-summary {
      padding: 10px;
    }
    .collection-scroll-actions {
      width: 100%;
      justify-content: flex-end;
    }
  }
</style>


  <style id="responsive-persistence-patch">
    html {
      -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
      text-size-adjust: 100%;
    }

    body {
      min-width: 320px;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    *, *::before, *::after {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    img, video, canvas, svg {
      max-width: 100%;
    }

    button, input, select, textarea {
      min-width: 0;
      font-size: 16px;
    }

    table {
      width: 100%;
      display: block;
      overflow-x: auto;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
    }

    .container {
      width: 100%;
      padding-left: clamp(12px, 2vw, 24px);
      padding-right: clamp(12px, 2vw, 24px);
    }

    .header .inner,
    .shop-toolbar,
    .featured-products-head,
    .cart-detail-hero,
    .cart-new-hero,
    .cart-line-item,
    .cart-item,
    .delivery-card,
    .cart-order-summary-grid,
    .wheel-layout,
    .quickview-modal,
    .checkout-modal,
    .wheel-modal {
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 100%;
    }

    .cart-drawer,
    .delivery-drawer {
      width: min(520px, calc(100vw - 24px));
      max-width: calc(100vw - 24px);
    }

    .glass, .panel, .card, .product-card, .featured-products-shell, .product-showcase-strip,
    .cart-tab-panel, .cart-summary-card, .cart-summary-stack, .delivery-card, .wheel-modal,
    .quickview-modal, .checkout-modal {
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .shop-layout {
      align-items: start;
    }

    .product-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    }

    .product-info,
    .cart-line-copy,
    .cart-new-item-copy,
    .delivery-card,
    .cart-order-card,
    .cart-summary-card,
    .featured-products-shell {
      min-width: 0;
      overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    }

    .filter-sidebar {
      max-width: 100%;
    }
    @media (max-width: 1200px) {

      .shop-layout {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .filter-sidebar {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: min(92vw, 360px);
        height: 100%;
        z-index: 180;
        overflow-y: auto;
        border-radius: 0;
        border: none;
        border-right: 1px solid var(--line);
        transform: translateX(-100%);
        transition: transform 0.35s ease;
        background: var(--bg-surface);
      }

      .filter-sidebar.open {
        transform: translateX(0);
      }

      .filter-sidebar-close {
        display: block;
      }

      .mobile-filter-trigger {
        display: inline-flex;
      }

      .cart-drawer,
      .delivery-drawer,
      .chat-window {
        width: 100vw;
        max-width: 100vw;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 992px) {
      .hero-slider {
        height: clamp(320px, 54vh, 560px);
      }

      .slide {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .slide-content {
        padding: 0 16px;
      }

      .shop-toolbar {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: stretch;
      }

      .featured-products-head {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
      }

      .product-showcase-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .qv-content,
      .checkout-modal,
      .wheel-modal {
        padding: 18px;
      }

      .quickview-modal {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        max-height: 90vh;
        overflow-y: auto;
      }

      .qv-media {
        border-right: none;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
      }

      .wheel-layout {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .cart-detail-hero,
      .cart-new-hero,
      .cart-line-item,
      .cart-item,
      .cart-new-item,
      .cart-order-card,
      .delivery-card,
      .cart-order-summary-grid,
      .promo-admin-grid,
      .wheel-prizes,
      .cart-related-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .cart-line-actions {
        justify-content: space-between;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .header .inner {
        height: auto;
        padding: 12px 0;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 10px;
      }

      .mobile-menu-toggle {
        display: block;
      }

      .nav-menu {
        position: fixed;
        top: 80px;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        background: var(--bg-surface);
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 0;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
        max-height: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        transition: max-height 0.3s ease;
        padding: 0;
      }

      .nav-menu.open {
        max-height: 320px;
        padding: 10px 0;
      }

      .nav-menu li {
        width: 100%;
        text-align: center;
      }

      .nav-menu li a {
        display: block;
        padding: 12px 0;
        width: 100%;
      }

      .slide-title {
        font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 7vw, 3rem);
      }

      .slide-desc {
        font-size: 0.98rem;
      }

      .product-grid {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(170px, 1fr));
        gap: 16px;
      }

      .product-actions,
      .coupon-section,
      .order-view-actions {
        flex-direction: column;
      }

      .product-actions .btn,
      .coupon-section .btn,
      .order-view-actions .btn {
        width: 100%;
      }

      .cart-drawer,
      .delivery-drawer,
      .chat-window {
        width: 100vw;
        max-width: 100vw;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        border-left: none;
      }

      .modal-overlay {
        padding: 10px;
      }

      .cart-detail-hero,
      .cart-new-hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .cart-detail-hero-media,
      .cart-new-hero-media {
        max-width: 220px;
        margin: 0 auto;
      }

      .cart-line-item {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        justify-items: start;
      }

      .cart-line-actions {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: space-between;
      }

      .cart-order-summary-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
      .cart-payment-chip,
      .payment-methods,
      .payment-option {
        width: 100%;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 540px) {
      .container {
        padding-left: 12px;
        padding-right: 12px;
      }

      .hero-slider {
        height: 320px;
      }

      .product-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
      .btn,
      .sort-select {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
      }
      .featured-products-shell,
      .product-showcase-strip,
      .cart-tab-panel,
      .cart-summary-card,
      .delivery-card,
      .wheel-modal,
      .checkout-modal,
      .quickview-modal {
        border-radius: 18px;
      }

      .slider-nav {
        right: 14px;
        bottom: 14px;
      }

      .featured-products-head h2 {
        font-size: 1.2rem;
      }
    }
  </style>


  <style id="product-admin-editor-style">
    .admin-product-editor {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
      gap: 20px;
      align-items: start;
      margin-bottom: 22px;
    }
    .admin-product-editor-head {
      display:flex;
      justify-content:space-between;
      align-items:flex-start;
      gap:12px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      padding-bottom: 2px;
    }
    .admin-product-editor-head h4 {
      margin:0;
      font-size:1rem;
      font-weight:800;
      letter-spacing:-0.2px;
    }
    .admin-product-editor-head p {
      margin:6px 0 0;
      font-size:0.8rem;
      color:var(--muted);
      line-height:1.55;
    }
    .admin-product-flow {
      display:flex;
      gap:10px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      margin-top:14px;
    }
    .admin-product-flow .flow-chip {
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:8px;
      padding:10px 14px;
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
      font-size:0.82rem;
      font-weight:800;
      color:var(--muted-light);
      line-height:1.35;
      white-space: normal;
      max-width: 100%;
    }
    .admin-product-flow .flow-chip i {
      color: var(--primary);
    }
    .admin-product-card-topline {
      display:flex;
      justify-content:space-between;
      align-items:flex-start;
      gap:10px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
    }
    .admin-product-card-topline .section-badge {
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      gap:6px;
      padding:6px 12px;
      border-radius:999px;
      background: rgba(37,99,235,.10);
      color: var(--primary);
      font-size:0.78rem;
      font-weight:900;
      letter-spacing:0.35px;
      text-transform:uppercase;
      line-height:1.25;
      white-space: normal;
      text-align:center;
    }
    .admin-product-upload-note {
      display:flex;
      gap:8px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      align-items:center;
      margin-top:8px;
    }
    .admin-product-upload-note .upload-chip {
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:6px;
      padding:6px 10px;
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
      color:var(--muted-light);
      font-size:0.72rem;
      font-weight:800;
    }
    .admin-product-upload-note .upload-chip i { color: var(--primary); }
    .admin-product-toolbar {
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
      gap:12px;
      align-items:end;
    }
    .admin-product-toolbar .form-group { margin-bottom:0; }
    .admin-product-toolbar .form-group:first-child {
      grid-column: 1 / -1;
    }
    .admin-product-toolbar #productAdminSelector {
      width:100%;
      min-height:52px;
      font-size:0.98rem;
    }
    .admin-product-toolbar .toolbar-actions {
      display:flex;
      gap:8px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      justify-content:flex-start;
      align-items:center;
    }
    .admin-product-grid {
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr));
      gap:16px;
    }
    .admin-product-grid .field-full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
    .admin-product-card {
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      border-radius: 24px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
      padding: 20px;
      display:grid;
      gap:14px;
    }
    .admin-product-card h5 {
      margin:0;
      font-size:1.08rem;
      font-weight:900;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:8px;
      line-height:1.3;
    }
    .admin-product-card-note {
      font-size:0.88rem;
      color:var(--muted);
      line-height:1.65;
    }
    .admin-product-media-layout {
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap:16px;
      align-items:start;
    }
    .admin-product-preview {
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      border-radius: 18px;
      overflow:hidden;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(37,99,235,.08), rgba(255,255,255,.02));
      min-height: 260px;
      display:grid;
      place-items:center;
      position:relative;
    }
    .admin-product-preview img {
      width:100%;
      height:100%;
      object-fit:cover;
      border-radius:0;
    }
    .admin-product-preview .fallback {
      padding: 18px;
      text-align:center;
      color:var(--muted);
      font-size:0.82rem;
      line-height:1.55;
    }

    .admin-preview-collapsed {
      border:1px dashed var(--line-strong);
      border-radius: 20px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
      min-height: 180px;
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: 84px 1fr;
      place-items:center;
      text-align:left;
      gap:14px;
      padding: 20px;
    }
    .admin-preview-collapsed .admin-editor-hint {
      max-width: none;
    }
    .admin-preview-toggle-btn {
      width:84px;
      height:84px;
      border-radius:50%;
      border:1px solid var(--line-strong);
      background: var(--primary-grad);
      color:#fff;
      display:grid;
      place-items:center;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
      cursor:pointer;
      font-size:1.8rem;
      transition: var(--transition);
    }
    .admin-preview-toggle-btn:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }
    .admin-preview-shell {
      position: static;
      top: auto;
    }

    .admin-product-gallery {
      display:grid;
      gap:10px;
    }
    .admin-product-gallery-list {
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(130px, 1fr));
      gap:12px;
    }
    .admin-gallery-item {
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      border-radius: 16px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
      overflow:hidden;
      display:grid;
      gap:8px;
      padding:8px;
    }
    .admin-gallery-item img {
      width:100%;
      aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
      object-fit:cover;
      border-radius: 12px;
    }
    .admin-gallery-actions, .admin-row-actions {
      display:flex;
      gap:6px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
    }
    .admin-gallery-actions .btn, .admin-row-actions .btn {
      padding: 6px 9px;
      font-size: 11px;
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .admin-product-color-grid {
      display:grid;
      gap:12px;
    }
    .admin-color-row {
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      border-radius: 18px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
      padding: 12px;
      display:grid;
      gap:10px;
    }
    .admin-color-row-head {
      display:flex;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:10px;
      align-items:flex-start;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
    }
    .admin-color-row-head strong {
      font-size:0.88rem;
      font-weight:900;
    }
    .admin-color-row-grid {
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr));
      gap:12px;
    }
    .admin-color-row-grid .field-full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
    .admin-color-preview {
      display:flex;
      gap:8px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      align-items:center;
    }
    .admin-color-chip {
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:8px;
      padding:6px 10px;
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
      font-size:0.75rem;
      font-weight:800;
      color:var(--muted-light);
    }
    .admin-color-dot {
      width: 14px;
      height: 14px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.16);
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview {
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      border-radius: 20px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(37,99,235,.08), rgba(255,255,255,.02));
      padding: 16px;
      display:grid;
      gap:12px;
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-card {
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: 132px 1fr;
      gap:14px;
      align-items:start;
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-thumb {
      width:100%;
      aspect-ratio:1/1;
      border-radius:16px;
      overflow:hidden;
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-thumb img {
      width:100%;
      height:100%;
      object-fit:cover;
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-body {
      display:grid;
      gap:8px;
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-body h5 {
      margin:0;
      font-size:1.08rem;
      font-weight:900;
      line-height:1.35;
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-meta {
      display:flex;
      gap:8px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      color:var(--muted);
      font-size:0.76rem;
      font-weight:700;
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-price {
      display:flex;
      gap:8px;
      align-items:baseline;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-price .price-current { font-size:1.5rem; }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-price .price-old { font-size:0.88rem; }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-swatches {
      display:flex;
      gap:6px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      min-height: 20px;
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-swatch {
      width:18px;
      height:18px;
      border-radius:50%;
      border:2px solid var(--bg-surface);
      outline:1px solid transparent;
    }
    .admin-product-live-preview .mini-swatch.active {
      outline-color: var(--primary);
      transform: scale(1.12);
    }
    .admin-product-sizes textarea {
      min-height: 140px;
      resize: vertical;
      line-height: 1.6;
    }
    .admin-product-switcher {
      display:flex;
      gap:8px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
    }
    .admin-product-switcher .sort-select {
      min-width: 240px;
      flex: 1 1 240px;
    }
    .admin-product-help {
      font-size:0.82rem;
      color:var(--muted);
      line-height:1.65;
    }
    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .admin-product-editor,
      .admin-product-toolbar,
      .admin-product-live-preview .mini-card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
      .admin-product-grid,
      .admin-product-media-layout {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
      .admin-product-toolbar .toolbar-actions {
        justify-content:flex-start;
      }
      .admin-image-toolbar {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
      .admin-preview-collapsed {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        text-align:center;
        justify-items:center;
      }
    }
  </style>

</head>
<body>

  <canvas id="confetti-canvas"></canvas>

  <!-- NAVIGATION HEADER -->
  <header class="header glass" id="mainHeader">
    <div class="container inner">
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;">
        <div class="mobile-menu-toggle" id="menuToggleBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-bars"></i></div>
        <a href="#" class="logo">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-droplet"></i> AquaLuxe
        </a>
      </div>
      
      <ul class="nav-menu" id="navMenu">
        <li><a href="#" class="active" data-vi="Trang Chủ" data-en="Home">Trang Chủ</a></li>
        <li><a href="#shop" data-vi="Cửa Hàng" data-en="Shop">Cửa Hàng</a></li>
        <li id="navAdminLink" style="display: none;"><a href="#admin-zone" data-vi="Quản Trị" data-en="Admin Zone">Quản Trị</a></li>
        <li><a href="#" id="wheelMenuBtn" data-vi="Vòng Quay May Mắn" data-en="Lucky Wheel">Vòng Quay May Mắn</a></li>
      </ul>
      
      <!-- LOGICAL TOP ACTIONS CORNER -->
      <div class="nav-actions">
        <!-- Light/Dark Switch -->
        <div class="action-icon" id="themeToggle" title="Đổi giao diện">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-moon"></i>
        </div>
        <!-- Auth Component Status -->
        <div class="user-profile-btn" id="headerUserAuthBtn">
          <img id="headerUserAvatar" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80" alt="Avatar" style="display:none;">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-user-circle" id="headerUserIcon"></i>
          <span id="headerUserText" data-vi="Đăng Nhập" data-en="Sign In">Đăng Nhập</span>
        </div>
        <!-- Delivery Orders -->
        <div class="action-icon" id="deliveryToggleBtn" title="Đơn sắp giao">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-truck-fast"></i>
          <span class="badge" id="deliveryBadgeCount">0</span>
        </div>
        <!-- Saved / Compare -->
        <div class="action-icon" id="collectionToggleBtn" title="Đã lưu & so sánh">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-layer-group"></i>
          <span class="badge" id="collectionBadgeCount">0</span>
        </div>
        <!-- Shopping Cart -->
        <div class="action-icon" id="cartToggleBtn" title="Giỏ hàng">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-bag-shopping"></i>
          <span class="badge" id="cartBadgeCount">0</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- HERO SECTION -->
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="hero-slider" id="heroSlider">
        <div class="slide active">
          <div class="slide-bg" style="background-image: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551028719-00167b16eac5?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=80')"></div>
          <div class="slide-overlay"></div>
          <div class="slide-content">
            <span class="slide-tag" data-vi="Thế hệ mới" data-en="New Gen">Thế hệ mới</span>
            <h2 class="slide-title" data-vi="Uống Nước Sành Điệu Với Owala Style" data-en="Hydrate in Luxury with Owala Style">Uống Nước Sành Điệu Với Owala Style</h2>
            <p class="slide-desc" data-vi="AquaLuxe định hình lại phong cách hydrat hóa cá nhân. Đột phá với lớp phủ sinh học Ceramic kết hợp lõi cách nhiệt Inox 316 siêu bền bỉ." data-en="AquaLuxe redefines premium hydration. Engineered with bio-ceramic shield coating and industrial vacuum grade 316 stainless steel insulation core.">AquaLuxe định hình lại phong cách hydrat hóa cá nhân. Đột phá với lớp phủ sinh học Ceramic kết hợp lõi cách nhiệt Inox 316 siêu bền bỉ.</p>
            <a href="#shop" class="btn primary"><span data-vi="Mua Ngay" data-en="Shop Now">Mua Ngay</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="slide">
          <div class="slide-bg" style="background-image: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1434494878577-86c23bcb06b9?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=80')"></div>
          <div class="slide-overlay"></div>
          <div class="slide-content">
            <span class="slide-tag" data-vi="Bộ sưu tập OutDoor" data-en="OutDoor Collection">Bộ sưu tập OutDoor</span>
            <h2 class="slide-title" data-vi="Bứt Phá Giới Hạn Cùng Stanley Classic" data-en="Break Limits with Stanley Classic">Bứt Phá Giới Hạn Cùng Stanley Classic</h2>
            <p class="slide-desc" data-vi="Sở hữu cơ chế nắp bật FreeSip thông minh chống rò rỉ tuyệt đối. Thiết kế công thái học hoàn hảo cho mọi chuyến phiêu lưu." data-en="Engineered with sophisticated leak-proof smart FreeSip tech. Perfect ergonomic structure for every deep wildlife exploration.">Sở hữu cơ chế nắp bật FreeSip thông minh chống rò rỉ tuyệt đối. Thiết kế công thái học hoàn hảo cho mọi chuyến phiêu lưu.</p>
            <a href="#shop" class="btn primary"><span data-vi="Khám Phá" data-en="Explore Now">Khám Phá</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-compass"></i></a>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="slider-nav">
          <div class="slider-btn" id="prevSlide"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-left"></i></div>
          <div class="slider-btn" id="nextSlide"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-right"></i></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

<!-- STOREFRONT SECTION -->
  <section class="shop-section" id="shop">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="shop-toolbar">
        <div>
          <h2 style="font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.5px;" data-vi="Khám Phá Sản Phẩm" data-en="Discover Masterpieces">Khám Phá Sản Phẩm</h2>
          <p style="color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.85rem;"><span data-vi="Hiển thị" data-en="Showing">Hiển thị</span> <span id="filteredCount">0</span> <span data-vi="sản phẩm cao cấp" data-en="premium goods">sản phẩm cao cấp</span></p>
        </div>
        <select class="sort-select" id="sortSelect">
          <option value="featured" data-vi="Nổi bật nhất" data-en="Featured Products">Nổi bật nhất</option>
          <option value="price-asc" data-vi="Giá: Thấp đến Cao" data-en="Price: Low to High">Giá: Thấp đến Cao</option>
          <option value="price-desc" data-vi="Giá: Cao đến Thấp" data-en="Price: High to Low">Giá: Cao đến Thấp</option>
          <option value="rating" data-vi="Đánh giá tốt nhất" data-en="Top Rated">Đánh giá tốt nhất</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="shop-controls">
        <div class="shop-search-wrap glass">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i>
          <input id="shopSearchInput" type="search" placeholder="Tìm theo tên sản phẩm, màu, chất liệu..." aria-label="Tìm theo tên sản phẩm">
        </div>
        <div class="search-suggestions" id="searchSuggestions" aria-live="polite"></div>
        <div class="featured-filter-row" aria-label="Lọc sản phẩm nổi bật">
          <button type="button" class="featured-filter-btn active" data-feature-filter="all" onclick="applyTopShortcut('all')">Tất cả</button>
          <button type="button" class="featured-filter-btn" data-feature-filter="best" onclick="applyTopShortcut('best')">Sản phẩm bán chạy</button>
          <button type="button" class="featured-filter-btn" data-feature-filter="sale" onclick="applyTopShortcut('sale')">Sản phẩm giảm giá</button>
          <button type="button" class="featured-filter-btn" data-feature-filter="new" onclick="applyTopShortcut('new')">Sản phẩm mới</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <section class="recently-viewed-shell" id="recentlyViewedSection">
        <div class="recently-viewed-head">
          <div>
            <h3 data-vi="Đã xem gần đây" data-en="Recently viewed">Đã xem gần đây</h3>
            <p data-vi="Gợi ý những mẫu bạn vừa mở để quay lại nhanh hơn." data-en="A quick return path to products you opened recently.">Gợi ý những mẫu bạn vừa mở để quay lại nhanh hơn.</p>
          </div>
          <button type="button" class="btn secondary" id="clearRecentlyViewedBtn" style="padding:10px 14px;">
            <i class="fa-regular fa-trash-can"></i> <span data-vi="Xóa lịch sử" data-en="Clear history">Xóa lịch sử</span>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="recently-viewed-track" id="recentlyViewedContainer"></div>
      </section>

<button class="btn secondary mobile-filter-trigger" id="mobileFilterOpenBtn">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-filter"></i> <span data-vi="Lọc sản phẩm" data-en="Filter Items">Lọc sản phẩm</span>
      </button>

      <div class="shop-layout">
        <aside class="filter-sidebar glass" id="filterSidebar">
          <div class="filter-sidebar-header">
            <h3 style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800;" data-vi="Bộ lọc sản phẩm" data-en="Filters Grid">Bộ lọc sản phẩm</h3>
            <div class="filter-sidebar-close" id="mobileFilterCloseBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></div>
          </div>

          <div class="filter-group">
            <div class="filter-title"><span data-vi="Bộ Sưu Tập" data-en="Collections">Bộ Sưu Tập</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-layer-group"></i></div>
            <div class="filter-options">
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="category" value="Văn phòng"> <span data-vi="Bình Văn Phòng" data-en="Office Line">Bình Văn Phòng</span></label>
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="category" value="Thể thao"> <span data-vi="Thể Thao Năng Động" data-en="Active Sports">Thể Thao Năng Động</span></label>
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="category" value="Đi phượt"> <span data-vi="Khám Phá Dã Ngoại" data-en="Wilderness Trail">Khám Phá Dã Ngoại</span></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div class="filter-group">
            <div class="filter-title"><span data-vi="Dung Tích" data-en="Capacity">Dung Tích</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-flask"></i></div>
            <div class="filter-options">
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="capacity" value="500ml"> 500ml <span data-vi="nhỏ gọn" data-en="Compact">nhỏ gọn</span></label>
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="capacity" value="750ml"> 750ml <span data-vi="tiêu chuẩn" data-en="Standard">tiêu chuẩn</span></label>
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="capacity" value="1200ml"> 1200ml <span data-vi="đại dung tích" data-en="Mega Tank">đại dung tích</span></label>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="filter-group">
            <div class="filter-title"><span data-vi="Chất Liệu Cao Cấp" data-en="Materials">Chất Liệu Cao Cấp</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i></div>
            <div class="filter-options">
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="material" value="Inox 316"> <span data-vi="Thép Không Gỉ 316" data-en="Stainless Steel 316">Thép Không Gỉ 316</span></label>
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="material" value="Gốm Ceramic"> <span data-vi="Lõi Gốm Ceramic" data-en="Ceramic Lining">Lõi Gốm Ceramic</span></label>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="filter-group">
            <div class="filter-title"><span data-vi="Màu Sắc" data-en="Colors">Màu Sắc</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i></div>
            <div class="filter-options">
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="color" value="Đỏ"> Đỏ</label>
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="color" value="Xanh dương"> Xanh dương</label>
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="color" value="Trắng"> Trắng</label>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="filter-group">
            <div class="filter-title"><span data-vi="Khoảng Giá" data-en="Price Range">Khoảng Giá</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-tag"></i></div>
            <div class="filter-options">
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="price" value="under-400"> Dưới 400k</label>
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="price" value="400-700"> 400k - 700k</label>
              <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" class="filter-checkbox" data-type="price" value="over-700"> Trên 700k</label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </aside>

        <main>
          <div class="product-grid" id="productGridContainer"></div>
        </main>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="floating-quick-actions" id="floatingQuickActions" aria-label="Quick actions">
    <button type="button" class="floating-action-btn primary" id="floatingCartBtn" title="Giỏ hàng">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-bag-shopping"></i>
      <span class="floating-action-badge" id="floatingCartBadge">0</span>
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="floating-action-btn" id="floatingSearchBtn" title="Tìm sản phẩm">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i>
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="floating-action-btn" id="floatingTopBtn" title="Lên đầu trang">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- AUTHENTICATION DIALOG (REGISTRATION, LOGIN & PROFILE DISCOVERY ENGINE) -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="authModalOverlay">
    <div class="checkout-modal glass" style="max-width: 420px;">
      <div id="authModalCloseBtn" style="position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px; cursor: pointer;"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></div>
      
      <!-- View 1: Login Form -->
      <div id="authLoginContainer">
        <h3 style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 20px;" data-vi="Đăng Nhập Tài Khoản" data-en="Account Login">Đăng Nhập Tài Khoản</h3>
        <form id="loginForm" onsubmit="return false;">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Tên đăng nhập" data-en="Username">Tên đăng nhập</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="loginUser" required>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Mật khẩu" data-en="Password">Mật khẩu</label>
            <input type="password" class="form-control" id="loginPass" required>
          </div>
          <button class="btn primary" type="submit" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 10px;" data-vi="Đăng Nhập" data-en="Authenticate">Đăng Nhập</button>
          <p style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); text-align: center; margin-top: 15px;">
            <span data-vi="Chưa có tài khoản?" data-en="New to store?">Chưa có tài khoản?</span> 
            <a href="#" id="switchRegisterLink" style="color: var(--primary); font-weight:700;" data-vi="Đăng ký ngay" data-en="Register here">Đăng ký ngay</a>
            <span style="margin: 0 6px;">•</span>
            <a href="#" id="forgotPasswordLink" style="color: var(--primary); font-weight:700;" data-vi="Quên mật khẩu?" data-en="Forgot password?">Quên mật khẩu?</a>
          </p>
        </form>
      </div>

      <!-- View 2: Forgot Password Reset Form -->
      <div id="authResetContainer" style="display: none;">
        <h3 style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 12px;" data-vi="Quên Mật Khẩu" data-en="Forgot Password">Quên Mật Khẩu</h3>
        <p style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 16px; line-height: 1.55;" data-vi="Nhập tên tài khoản và số điện thoại đã đăng ký để nhận mã OTP, sau đó đặt mật khẩu mới." data-en="Enter your registered username and phone number to receive an OTP, then set a new password.">Nhập tên tài khoản và số điện thoại đã đăng ký để nhận mã OTP, sau đó đặt mật khẩu mới.</p>
        <form id="forgotPasswordForm" onsubmit="return false;">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Tên tài khoản" data-en="Username">Tên tài khoản</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="fpUser" required>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Số điện thoại đã đăng ký" data-en="Registered phone number">Số điện thoại đã đăng ký</label>
            <input type="tel" class="form-control" id="fpPhone" placeholder="0912345678" required>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" id="fpOtpGroup" style="display:none;">
            <label data-vi="Mã OTP" data-en="OTP code">Mã OTP</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="fpOtp" placeholder="Nhập mã 6 số">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" id="fpNewPassGroup" style="display:none;">
            <label data-vi="Mật khẩu mới" data-en="New password">Mật khẩu mới</label>
            <input type="password" class="form-control" id="fpNewPass" autocomplete="new-password">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" id="fpConfirmPassGroup" style="display:none;">
            <label data-vi="Nhập lại mật khẩu mới" data-en="Confirm new password">Nhập lại mật khẩu mới</label>
            <input type="password" class="form-control" id="fpConfirmPass" autocomplete="new-password">
          </div>
          <div id="fpResetHint" style="font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); margin: 8px 0 14px; line-height:1.5;"></div>
          <button class="btn primary" type="button" id="sendOtpBtn" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 10px;" data-vi="Gửi mã OTP" data-en="Send OTP">Gửi mã OTP</button>
          <button class="btn primary" type="button" id="confirmResetBtn" style="width: 100%; display:none; margin-bottom: 8px;" data-vi="Xác nhận đổi mật khẩu" data-en="Confirm password reset">Xác nhận đổi mật khẩu</button>
          <p style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); text-align: center; margin-top: 12px;">
            <a href="#" id="backToLoginLink" style="color: var(--primary); font-weight:700;" data-vi="Quay lại đăng nhập" data-en="Back to login">Quay lại đăng nhập</a>
          </p>
        </form>
      </div>

      <!-- View 2: Register Form -->
      <div id="authRegisterContainer" style="display: none;">
        <h3 style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 20px;" data-vi="Đăng Ký Tài Khoản" data-en="Create Account">Đăng Ký Tài Khoản</h3>
        <form id="registerForm" onsubmit="return false;">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Tên tài khoản mới" data-en="New Username">Tên tài khoản mới</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="regUser" required>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Mật khẩu bảo mật" data-en="Secure Password">Mật khẩu bảo mật</label>
            <input type="password" class="form-control" id="regPass" required>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Họ và Tên người nhận" data-en="Full Name">Họ và Tên người nhận</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="regName" required>
          </div>
          <button class="btn primary" type="submit" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 10px;" data-vi="Tạo Tài Khoản" data-en="Register System">Tạo Tài Khoản</button>
          <p style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); text-align: center; margin-top: 15px;">
            <span data-vi="Đã có tài khoản?" data-en="Already registered?">Đã có tài khoản?</span> 
            <a href="#" id="switchLoginLink" style="color: var(--primary); font-weight:700;" data-vi="Đăng nhập" data-en="Sign In">Đăng nhập</a>
          </p>
        </form>
      </div>

      <!-- View 3: Dashboard Profile Form -->
      <div id="authProfileContainer" style="display: none; max-height:80vh; overflow-y:auto; padding-right:5px;">
        <h3 style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 10px;" id="profileHeading">Xin Chào</h3>
        <p style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 15px;" data-vi="Cấu hình thông tin nhận hàng riêng tư để thực hiện mua sắm." data-en="Configure profile details to unlock premium e-commerce gateways.">Cấu hình thông tin nhận hàng và tài khoản ngân hàng của bạn.</p>
        <form id="profileForm" onsubmit="return false;">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Chọn ảnh đại diện từ thiết bị" data-en="Choose avatar from device">Chọn ảnh đại diện từ thiết bị</label>
            <input type="file" class="form-control" id="profAvatarFile" accept="image/*">
            <input type="hidden" id="profAvatar" value="">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-top:10px;">
              <img id="profAvatarPreview" src="" alt="Avatar preview" style="width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;display:none;border:1px solid var(--line);">
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);" id="profAvatarFileLabel">Chưa chọn ảnh</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Tên tài khoản" data-en="Account Username">Tên tài khoản</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="profUsername" placeholder="Nhập tên đăng nhập mới">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Tên người nhận" data-en="Recipient name">Tên người nhận</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="profRecipientName" placeholder="Ví dụ: Nguyễn Văn A">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Mật khẩu hiện tại" data-en="Current password">Mật khẩu hiện tại</label>
            <input type="password" class="form-control" id="profCurrentPassword" placeholder="Để đổi mật khẩu">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Mật khẩu mới" data-en="New password">Mật khẩu mới</label>
            <input type="password" class="form-control" id="profNewPassword" placeholder="Nhập mật khẩu mới">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Nhập lại mật khẩu mới" data-en="Confirm new password">Nhập lại mật khẩu mới</label>
            <input type="password" class="form-control" id="profConfirmPassword" placeholder="Xác nhận mật khẩu mới">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Số Điện Thoại" data-en="Phone Number">Số Điện Thoại</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="profPhone" placeholder="Ví dụ: 0912345678">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Địa chỉ nhà mặc định" data-en="Default Address">Địa chỉ nhà mặc định</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="profAddress" placeholder="Số nhà, Tên đường, Thành phố...">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Hình Thức Thanh Toán Liên Kết" data-en="Linked Payment Method">Hình Thức Thanh Toán Liên Kết</label>
            <select class="sort-select" id="profPaymentMethod" style="width: 100%;">
              <option value="cash">Nhận tiền mặt</option>
              <option value="bank">Tài khoản ngân hàng</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" id="profBankTypeBox" style="display:none;">
            <label data-vi="Chọn loại ngân hàng" data-en="Choose bank type">Chọn loại ngân hàng</label>
            <select class="sort-select" id="profBank" style="width: 100%;">
              <option value="Vietcombank">Vietcombank (VCB)</option>
              <option value="Techcombank">Techcombank (TCB)</option>
              <option value="MB Bank">MB Bank (Quân Đội)</option>
              <option value="ACB">ACB Bank</option>
              <option value="VietinBank">VietinBank</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          
          <p style="font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--muted); margin-top:12px;" data-vi="Lịch sử đơn hàng đã được chuyển sang giỏ hàng để xem gọn hơn." data-en="Order history is now shown in the cart drawer for convenience.">Lịch sử đơn hàng đã được chuyển sang giỏ hàng để xem gọn hơn.</p>

          <button class="btn primary" type="submit" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 8px;" data-vi="Cập Nhật Hồ Sơ" data-en="Save Profile Details">Cập Nhật Hồ Sơ</button>
          <button class="btn danger" id="authLogoutBtn" type="button" style="width: 100%;" data-vi="Đăng Xuất Hệ Thống" data-en="Sign Out">Đăng Xuất Hệ Thống</button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- SHOPPING CART DRAWER -->
  <div class="drawer-overlay" id="cartOverlay"></div>
  <div class="cart-drawer" id="cartDrawer">
    <div class="drawer-header cart-drawer-header">
      <div class="cart-drawer-title-wrap">
        <div class="cart-drawer-title-line">
          <h3 data-vi="Giỏ Hàng Mua Sắm" data-en="Your Cart">Giỏ Hàng Mua Sắm</h3>
          <button class="cart-summary-toggle" id="cartSummaryToggleBtn" type="button" aria-label="Hiển thị phần tóm tắt đơn hàng">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="cart-drawer-subtitle">
          <span class="cart-free-chip">Free skip</span>
          <span data-vi="Miễn phí vận chuyển" data-en="Free shipping">Miễn phí vận chuyển</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="drawer-close" id="cartCloseBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></div>
    </div>

    <div class="cart-shipping-meter">
      <div class="cart-shipping-meter-top">
        <div class="cart-shipping-meter-label" id="shippingAlertMsg">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-truck-fast"></i>
          <span data-vi="Free skip · Miễn phí vận chuyển" data-en="Free skip · Free shipping">Free skip · Miễn phí vận chuyển</span>
        </div>
        <span class="cart-shipping-pill" id="sumShipping">0đ</span>
      </div>
      <div class="shipping-bar cart-shipping-bar">
        <div class="shipping-progress" id="shippingProgressBar" style="width:100%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="drawer-body cart-new-body" id="cartDrawerBody"></div>

    <div class="drawer-footer cart-summary-footer">
      <div class="coupon-section">
        <input type="text" class="coupon-input" id="couponInput" placeholder="Mã giảm giá (AQUALUXE10, HUYLUXE20)">
        <button class="btn secondary" id="applyCouponBtn" style="padding: 10px 14px;" data-vi="Áp dụng" data-en="Apply">Áp dụng</button>
      </div>

      <div class="cart-summary-panel">
        <div class="summary-row"><span data-vi="Tạm tính:" data-en="Subtotal:">Tạm tính:</span><span id="sumSubtotal">0đ</span></div>
        <div class="summary-row"><span data-vi="Giảm giá:" data-en="Discount Voucher:">Giảm giá:</span><span id="sumDiscount" style="color: var(--accent);">0đ</span></div>
        <div class="summary-row"><span data-vi="Phí vận chuyển:" data-en="Shipping:">Phí vận chuyển:</span><span id="sumShipping">0đ</span></div>
        <div class="summary-row total"><span data-vi="Tổng cộng:" data-en="Order Total:">Tổng cộng:</span><span id="sumTotal">0đ</span></div>
      </div>

      <button class="btn primary" id="checkoutTriggerBtn" style="width: 100%;"><span data-vi="Tiến Hành Thanh Toán" data-en="Proceed to Checkout">Tiến Hành Thanh Toán</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-credit-card"></i></button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- SHIPPING / DELIVERY DRAWER -->
  <div class="drawer-overlay" id="deliveryOverlay"></div>
  <div class="delivery-drawer" id="deliveryDrawer">
    <div class="delivery-header">
      <h3 data-vi="Đơn Hàng Sắp Giao" data-en="Upcoming Deliveries">Đơn Hàng Sắp Giao</h3>
      <div class="drawer-close" id="deliveryCloseBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></div>
    </div>
    <div class="delivery-body" id="deliveryDrawerBody"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- PRODUCT QUICKVIEW MODAL & COMMENT SYSTEMS -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="quickviewOverlay">
    <div class="quickview-modal" id="quickviewModal">
      <div class="qv-close" id="qvCloseBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></div>
      <div class="qv-media">
        <div class="qv-media-badges">
          <span class="qv-hero-pill primary"><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> Xem nhanh</span>
          <span class="qv-hero-pill hot" id="qvMediaStockPill"><i class="fa-solid fa-box-open"></i> Kho: 0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="qv-image-wrap">
          <button class="qv-gallery-arrow prev" id="qvPrevImgBtn" type="button"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-left"></i></button>
          <img id="qvTargetImg" src="" alt="Quick view image">
          <button class="qv-gallery-arrow next" id="qvNextImgBtn" type="button"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-right"></i></button>
        </div>
        <div class="qv-media-caption" id="qvMediaCaption">Chọn màu và dung tích để xem đúng hình ảnh tương ứng.</div>
        <div class="qv-gallery-indicator" id="qvGalleryDots"></div>
        <button class="btn success" id="qvAttachToChatBtn" style="width:100%; padding:10px 12px; font-size:12px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-paperclip"></i> <span data-vi="Gửi mẫu này vào Chat" data-en="Attach Product to Chat">Gửi mẫu này vào Chat</span></button>
      </div>
      <div class="qv-content">
        <div class="qv-topline">
          <span class="qv-kicker" id="qvTargetCat">DANH MỤC</span>
          <div class="qv-badges" id="qvTopBadges"></div>
        </div>

        <h3 class="qv-title" id="qvTargetTitle">Tên sản phẩm</h3>
        <p class="qv-subtitle" id="qvTargetSubtitle">Thông tin chi tiết sản phẩm sẽ hiển thị ở đây.</p>
        <div class="qv-rating-row">
          <div class="qv-rating-chip" id="qvTargetRating">★ 5.0</div>
          <div class="qv-meta-row" id="qvMetaRow"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="qv-desc-card">
          <div class="qv-section-title"><span data-vi="Thông tin tóm tắt" data-en="Quick summary">Thông tin tóm tắt</span><b id="qvSelectedSizeText">—</b></div>
          <p id="qvTargetDesc">Mô tả tóm tắt sản phẩm...</p>
        </div>

        <div class="qv-feature-grid" id="qvFeatureGrid"></div>

        <div class="qv-price-card">
          <div class="qv-price-copy">
            <span class="price-current" id="qvTargetPrice">0đ</span>
            <span class="price-old" id="qvTargetOldPrice">0đ</span>
            <span class="qv-price-note" id="qvPriceNote">Giá đã tự cập nhật theo dung tích và màu đang chọn.</span>
          </div>
          <div id="qvTargetDiscount" class="qv-discount-chip" style="display:none;">-0%</div>
        </div>

        <div class="variant-selector">
          <div class="variant-title"><span data-vi="Màu sắc" data-en="Color">Màu sắc</span> · <b id="qvSelectedColorText" style="color: var(--text);">Tiêu chuẩn</b></div>
          <div class="color-swatches" id="qvSwatchesContainer"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="variant-selector">
          <div class="variant-title" data-vi="Dung tích lựa chọn (Size)" data-en="Choose Dimension (Size)">Dung tích lựa chọn (Size)</div>
          <div class="size-tabs" id="qvSizeTabsContainer"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="qv-action-row">
          <div class="qv-action-top">
            <div class="quantity-control">
              <button id="qvDecBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-minus"></i></button>
              <span id="qvQtyText">1</span>
              <button id="qvIncBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i></button>
            </div>
            <button class="btn primary" id="qvAddToCartBtn" style="flex: 1;"><span data-vi="Thêm Vào Giỏ Hàng" data-en="Add to Cart Bundle">Thêm Vào Giỏ Hàng</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-cart-plus"></i></button>
          </div>
          <div class="qv-action-bottom product-mini-tools">
            <button type="button" class="mini-tool-btn wish" id="qvWishBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-heart"></i> <span data-vi="Lưu lại" data-en="Save">Lưu lại</span></button>
            <button type="button" class="mini-tool-btn compare" id="qvCompareBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-code-compare"></i> <span data-vi="So sánh" data-en="Compare">So sánh</span></button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="qv-summary-panel" id="qvSummaryPanel">
          <strong><span data-vi="Điểm nổi bật của sản phẩm" data-en="Product highlights">Điểm nổi bật của sản phẩm</span></strong>
          <p id="qvSummaryText">Thiết kế đẹp, dễ nhìn và đầy đủ thông tin để xem nhanh trước khi mua.</p>
        </div>

        <!-- REVIEWS & RATINGS AREA -->
        <div class="qv-reviews-area">
          <h4 style="font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:10px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-comments"></i> <span data-vi="Đánh Giá & Bình Luận" data-en="Reviews & Feedback">Đánh Giá Từ Khách Hàng</span></h4>
          <div id="qvReviewsLogContainer"></div>
          
          <div id="reviewInputFormBlock" style="margin-top:12px; display:none;">
            <div class="star-rating-picker" id="starPickerNode">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-star active" data-val="1"></i>
              <i class="fa-solid fa-star active" data-val="2"></i>
              <i class="fa-solid fa-star active" data-val="3"></i>
              <i class="fa-solid fa-star active" data-val="4"></i>
              <i class="fa-solid fa-star active" data-val="5"></i>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex; gap:8px;">
              <input type="text" class="form-control" id="reviewTextInput" placeholder="Viết đánh giá của bạn về bình nước này...">
              <button class="btn primary" id="submitReviewBtn" style="padding:10px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane"></i></button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p id="reviewAuthAlert" style="font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--accent); font-weight:600; text-align:center;" data-vi="* Vui lòng đăng nhập tài khoản để viết bình luận đánh giá." data-en="* Login is required to write reviews.">* Vui lòng đăng nhập tài khoản để viết bình luận đánh giá.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- SAVED & COMPARE COLLECTION MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="collectionOverlay">
    <div class="collection-modal glass">
      <div class="qv-close" id="collectionCloseBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></div>
      <div class="collection-head">
        <div>
          <h3 style="font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px;" data-vi="Đã Lưu & So Sánh" data-en="Saved & Compare">Đã Lưu & So Sánh</h3>
          <p style="color:var(--muted); font-size:0.84rem; line-height:1.5;" data-vi="Lưu sản phẩm yêu thích và so sánh tối đa 3 sản phẩm để xem nhanh các thông tin chính." data-en="Save favorite products and compare up to 3 items quickly.">Lưu sản phẩm yêu thích và so sánh tối đa 3 sản phẩm để xem nhanh các thông tin chính.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="collection-tabs">
          <button type="button" class="collection-tab active" id="collectionTabWishlistBtn">Yêu thích</button>
          <button type="button" class="collection-tab" id="collectionTabCompareBtn">So sánh</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="collection-panel active" id="collectionWishlistPanel"></div>
      <div class="collection-panel" id="collectionComparePanel"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- BILLING ORDER MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="checkoutOverlay">
    <div class="checkout-modal glass" id="checkoutModalContainer">
      <div id="checkoutFormContent">
        <h3 style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-wallet" style="color: var(--primary);"></i> <span data-vi="Xác Nhận Thông Tin Đơn Hàng" data-en="Secure Checkout Gateway">Xác Nhận Thông Tin Đơn Hàng</span>
        </h3>
        <form id="billingForm" onsubmit="return false;">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Tên người nhận" data-en="Consignee Full Name">Tên người nhận</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="billingName" readonly style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Số Điện Thoại nhận hàng" data-en="Contact Mobile Number">Số Điện Thoại nhận hàng</label>
            <input type="tel" class="form-control" id="billingPhone" readonly style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Địa chỉ giao hàng" data-en="Fulfillment Shipping Address">Địa chỉ giao hàng</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="billingAddress" readonly style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label data-vi="Phương thức thanh toán" data-en="Payment Method">Phương thức thanh toán</label>
            <div class="payment-methods">
              <label class="payment-option"><input type="radio" name="paymentMethod" value="cod" checked> <span data-vi="Thanh toán khi nhận hàng" data-en="Cash on Delivery">Thanh toán khi nhận hàng</span></label>
              <label class="payment-option"><input type="radio" name="paymentMethod" value="bank"> <span data-vi="Chuyển khoản ngân hàng" data-en="Bank transfer">Chuyển khoản ngân hàng</span></label>
            </div>
            <div class="payment-bank-box" id="checkoutBankBox">
              <label data-vi="Chọn ngân hàng" data-en="Choose bank">Chọn ngân hàng</label>
