              <select class="sort-select" id="checkoutBankSelect" style="width:100%; margin-top:6px;">
                <option value="Vietcombank">Vietcombank (VCB)</option>
                <option value="Techcombank">Techcombank (TCB)</option>
                <option value="MB Bank">MB Bank (Quân Đội)</option>
                <option value="ACB">ACB Bank</option>
                <option value="VietinBank">VietinBank</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:20px;">
            <button class="btn secondary" type="button" id="checkoutCloseBtn" style="flex:1;" data-vi="Quay lại" data-en="Cancel">Quay lại</button>
            <button class="btn primary" type="submit" id="submitOrderBtn" style="flex:2;"><span data-vi="Hoàn Tất Đặt Hàng" data-en="Submit Premium Order">Hoàn Tất Đặt Hàng</span> <i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></button>
          </div>
        </form>
      </div>

      <div class="success-screen" id="checkoutSuccessContent">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i>
        <h3 style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 10px;" data-vi="Đơn Hàng Hoàn Tất!" data-en="Order Confirmed Masterfully!">Đơn Hàng Hoàn Tất!</h3>
        <p style="color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 20px;" data-vi="Hệ thống AquaLuxe đã xác nhận đơn hàng thành công. Quy trình đóng gói chuẩn quốc tế đang được thực hiện. Cảm ơn quý khách!" data-en="AquaLuxe core system has validated your transaction. Premium package handling is active. Thank you for your trust!">
          Hệ thống AquaLuxe đã xác nhận đơn hàng thành công. Quy trình đóng gói chuẩn quốc tế đang được thực hiện. Cảm ơn quý khách!
        </p>
        <button class="btn primary" id="successCloseBtn" data-vi="Tiếp tục mua sắm" data-en="Keep Exploring">Tiếp tục mua sắm</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- LUCKY WHEEL MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="wheelOverlay">
    <div class="wheel-modal glass">
      <div class="qv-close" id="wheelCloseBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></div>
      <h3 id="wheelModalTitle" style="font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:8px;">Vòng quay may mắn</h3>
      <p id="wheelModalDesc" style="color:var(--muted); font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:18px;">Mỗi tài khoản có 1 lượt quay khi đăng nhập, và mỗi đơn hàng hoàn tất sẽ cộng thêm 1 lượt. Mỗi lượt quay tạo 1 mã voucher riêng cho đúng tài khoản đó.</p>
      <div class="wheel-layout">
        <div class="wheel-stage">
          <div class="wheel-pointer"></div>
          <div class="wheel-face" id="wheelFace"></div>
          <div class="wheel-label-layer" id="wheelLabelLayer"></div>
          <div class="wheel-center"><button type="button" id="wheelSpinBtn">QUAY</button></div>
        </div>
        <div class="wheel-info">
          <div class="wheel-meta">
            <span class="badge-tag" style="background:rgba(0,240,255,0.12); color:var(--primary);" id="wheelSpinCount">Lượt quay: 0</span>
            <span class="badge-tag" style="background:rgba(16,185,129,0.12); color:var(--success);" id="wheelUserTag">Tài khoản: -</span>
          </div>
          <div class="wheel-result" id="wheelResultBox">
            <strong>Kết quả:</strong>
            <div style="margin-top:6px; color:var(--muted);">Hãy bấm QUAY để nhận mã giảm giá ngẫu nhiên.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="wheel-prizes" id="wheelPrizeList"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- FLOATING CLOUD CHAT WINDOW ENGINE (Bóng chat đám mây) -->
  <div class="chat-trigger" id="chatCloudTrigger" title="Nhắn tin hỗ trợ">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-comments"></i>
    <div class="chat-badge" id="chatUnreadBadge" style="display:none;">0</div>
  </div>

  <div class="chat-window glass" id="chatWindowNode">
    <div class="chat-header">
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-headset" style="color:var(--primary)"></i>
        <span style="font-weight:800; font-size:0.95rem;" id="chatHeaderTitle">AquaLuxe Live Support</span>
      </div>
      <div style="cursor:pointer;" id="chatCloseBtnNode"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></div>
    </div>
    
    <div id="chatInterfaceWrapper" style="flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; overflow:hidden;">
      <!-- Khách hàng chat hoặc Admin xem log chat sẽ tự động render tại đây -->
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="toast-container" id="toastContainer"></div>

  <!-- CONTROL AREA: POWERFUL ADMIN ZONE (Hệ thống quản trị tối cao) -->
  <section class="admin-section" id="admin-zone" style="display: none;">
    <div class="container">
      <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <h2 style="font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 800;" data-vi="Hệ Thống Quản Trị Toàn Diện AquaLuxe Dashboard" data-en="AquaLuxe Supreme Core Dashboard">Hệ Thống Quản Trị Toàn Diện AquaLuxe Dashboard</h2>
        <p style="color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.85rem;" data-vi="Quyền tối cao: Theo dõi, can thiệp sản phẩm, kho hàng, danh sách thành viên và duyệt đơn hàng." data-en="Supreme Administration Node: Manage advanced product engine, delete user profiles and wipe ledger histories.">Quyền tối cao: Theo dõi, can thiệp sản phẩm, danh sách thành viên đăng ký dữ liệu khách hàng và hóa đơn.</p>
      </div>
      
      <div class="admin-tabs">
        <button class="btn secondary active" id="tabProductBtn" data-vi="Quản Lý Kho Hàng" data-en="Inventory Systems">Quản Lý Kho Hàng</button>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="tabOrderBtn" data-vi="Nhật Ký Hóa Đơn Đặt Hàng" data-en="Sales Ledger Operations">Nhật Ký Hóa Đơn Đặt Hàng</button>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="tabUserBtn" data-vi="Cơ Sở Dữ Liệu Khách Hàng" data-en="Client Directory">Cơ Sở Dữ Liệu Khách Hàng</button>
      </div>

      <div class="admin-panel glass">
        <!-- Tab 1: Product Control System -->
        <div id="adminProductPanel">
          
          <div id="adminProductEditorHost"></div>

<h3 style="font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px;" data-vi="Danh Sách Sản Phẩm Thương Mại Hiện Tại" data-en="Active Inventory Nodes">Danh Sách Sản Phẩm Thương Mại Hiện Tại</h3>

          <div class="table-responsive">
            <table>
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th data-vi="Hình ảnh" data-en="Media Image">Hình ảnh</th>
                  <th data-vi="Tên Sản Phẩm" data-en="Product Metadata">Tên Sản Phẩm</th>
                  <th data-vi="Danh Mục" data-en="Category">Danh Mục</th>
                  <th data-vi="Số Lượng Kho" data-en="Stock Managed">Số Lượng Kho</th>
                  <th data-vi="Lượt Bán" data-en="Times Sold">Lượt Bán</th>
                  <th data-vi="Đơn Giá" data-en="Base Price">Đơn Giá</th>
                  <th data-vi="Hành động" data-en="Control Event">Hành động</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody id="adminProductTableBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Tab 2: Orders Ledger Panel -->
        <div id="adminOrderPanel" style="display: none;">
          <h3 style="font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px;" data-vi="Nhật Ký Giao Dịch Đơn Hàng Hệ Thống" data-en="Global Customer Orders Ledger">Nhật Ký Giao Dịch Đơn Hàng Hệ Thống</h3>
          <div class="table-responsive">
            <table>
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th data-vi="Mã đơn" data-en="Order Hash ID">Mã đơn</th>
                  <th data-vi="Avatar & Tài Khoản" data-en="Client User">Avatar & Tài Khoản</th>
                  <th data-vi="Khách Hàng & SĐT" data-en="Recipient Name">Khách Hàng & SĐT</th>
                  <th data-vi="Sản Phẩm Đặt Mua" data-en="Product Summary">Sản Phẩm Đặt Mua</th>
                  <th data-vi="Địa chỉ & Ngân hàng" data-en="Logistics Destination & Payment">Địa chỉ & Ngân hàng</th>
                  <th data-vi="Trạng thái đơn" data-en="Fulfillment Status">Trạng thái đơn</th>
                  <th data-vi="Ngày giao & xác nhận" data-en="Delivery & confirm">Ngày giao & xác nhận</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody id="adminOrderTableBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Tab 3: Users Directory Panel -->
        <div id="adminUserPanel" style="display: none;">
          <h3 style="font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px;" data-vi="Danh Sách Tài Khoản Đăng Ký Hệ Thống" data-en="Registered Accounts Repository">Danh Sách Tài Khoản Đăng Ký Hệ Thống</h3>
          <div class="table-responsive">
            <table>
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th data-vi="Tên đăng nhập" data-en="User Account Token">Tên đăng nhập</th>
                  <th data-vi="Họ và Tên" data-en="Identity Profile Name">Họ và Tên</th>
                  <th data-vi="Địa chỉ mặc định" data-en="Saved Secure Address">Địa chỉ mặc định</th>
                  <th data-vi="Phương thức thanh toán" data-en="Payment Method">Phương thức thanh toán</th>
                  <th data-vi="Ngân hàng kết nối" data-en="Pre-configured Payment">Ngân hàng kết nối</th>
                  <th data-vi="Lượt quay" data-en="Spin Credits">Lượt quay</th>
                  <th data-vi="Thao tác can thiệp" data-en="System Excision">Thao tác can thiệp</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody id="adminUserTableBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- RE-BRANDED GLOBAL FOOTER -->
  <footer class="footer">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="footer-grid">
        <div class="footer-col">
          <a href="#" class="logo" style="margin-bottom: 12px;">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-droplet"></i> AquaLuxe
          </a>
          <p style="color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.85rem;" data-vi="Trải nghiệm uống nước đỉnh cao cùng công nghệ lõi cách nhiệt tiên tiến hàng đầu thế giới." data-en="Redefining premium engineered hydration experience with elite thermal insulation technologies globally.">Trải nghiệm uống nước đỉnh cao cùng công nghệ lõi cách nhiệt tiên tiến hàng đầu thế giới.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="footer-col">
          <h4 data-vi="Sản Phẩm" data-en="Collections Tier">Sản Phẩm</h4>
          <ul class="footer-links">
            <li><a href="#shop" data-vi="Bình Thể Thao" data-en="Active Hydration Flasks">Bình Thể Thao</a></li>
            <li><a href="#shop" data-vi="Bình Giữ Nhiệt Văn Phòng" data-en="Corporate Premium Tumblers">Bình Giữ Nhiệt Văn Phòng</a></li>
            <li><a href="#shop" data-vi="Phụ Kiện Chính Hãng" data-en="Authorized Accessories">Phụ Kiện Chính Hãng</a></li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="footer-col">
          <h4 data-vi="Chính Sách" data-en="Brand Promises">Chính Sách</h4>
          <ul class="footer-links">
            <li><a href="#" data-vi="Bảo Hành 1 Đổi 1" data-en="Lifetime Premium Warranty">Bảo Hành 1 Đổi 1</a></li>
            <li><a href="#" data-vi="Giao Hàng Miễn Phí" data-en="Global Elite Logistics">Giao Hàng Miễn Phí</a></li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="footer-col">
          <h4 data-vi="Kết Nối" data-en="Global Pulse HQ">Kết Nối</h4>
          <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; font-size: 1.2rem; color: var(--muted);">
            <a href="https://www.facebook.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><i class="fa-brands fa-facebook"></i></a>
            <a href="https://www.instagram.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><i class="fa-brands fa-instagram"></i></a>
            <a href="https://www.youtube.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><i class="fa-brands fa-youtube"></i></a>
            <a href="https://www.tiktok.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><i class="fa-brands fa-tiktok"></i></a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.8rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--line); padding-top: 20px;">
        &copy; 2026 AquaLuxe Premium Store. Engineered Masterpieces.
      </div>
    </div>
  </footer>

  <script>
    // ==========================================================================
    // 1. AN TOÀN TUYỆT MẬT: THÔNG TIN ĐĂNG NHẬP ADMIN (Mã hóa cứng hoàn toàn)
    // ==========================================================================
    const ADMIN_CONFIG = {
      userToken: "admin",       
      secretPass: "admin123"     
    };

    const DEFAULT_PRODUCTS = [
      {
        id: "prod-freesip",
        name: "FreeSip",
        collection: "FreeSip Series",
        category: "Thể thao",
        capacity: "250ml",
        material: "Inox 316",
        basePrice: 390000,
        oldPrice: 490000,
        rating: 4.9,
        sold: 128,
        stock: 60,
        isBestSeller: true,
        isFeatured: true,
        isNewArrival: true,
        description: "Bình FreeSip phong cách hiện đại, nắp uống kép chống rò rỉ, phù hợp mang theo hằng ngày.",
        details: "Thiết kế nắp FreeSip giúp uống tiện hơn; thân bình cách nhiệt hai lớp; bề mặt dễ cầm; phù hợp cho luyện tập, đi học và đi làm.",
        suitableFor: "Thể thao, văn phòng, đi học, mang theo hằng ngày",
        sizeOptions: [
          { key: "250ml", label: "250ml · Gọn nhẹ", price: 390000, image: "data:image/png;base64,", hoverImage: "data:image/png;base64," },
          { key: "500ml", label: "500ml · Tiêu chuẩn", price: 470000, image: "data:image/png;base64,", hoverImage: "data:image/png;base64," }
        ],
        variants: [
          { colorName: "Xanh dương · 250ml", colorHex: "#7da4ff", mainImg: "data:image/png;base64,", hoverImg: "data:image/png;base64," },
          { colorName: "Trắng · 250ml", colorHex: "#e5e7eb", mainImg: "data:image/png;base64,", hoverImg: "data:image/png;base64," },
          { colorName: "Xanh dương · 500ml", colorHex: "#7da4ff", mainImg: "data:image/png;base64,", hoverImg: "data:image/png;base64," },
          { colorName: "Trắng · 500ml", colorHex: "#e5e7eb", mainImg: "data:image/png;base64,", hoverImg: "data:image/png;base64," }
        ],
        gallery: ["data:image/png;base64,", "data:image/png;base64,", "data:image/png;base64,", "data:image/png;base64,"],
        reviews: []
      }
    ];

    // CƠ SỞ DỮ LIỆU ĐỘC LẬP TỪNG TÀI KHOẢN (LocalStorage State Core Engine)
    let state = {
      products: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_PRODUCTS)),
      users: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_registered_users')) || [],
      currentUser: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_session_user')) || null, 
      activeFilters: { category: [], capacity: [], material: [], color: [], price: [] },
      sortBy: "featured",
      searchQuery: '',
      featuredFilter: '',
      currentCoupon: null,
      cartTab: 'current',
      theme: 'light',
      lang: 'vi',
      currentQvProduct: null,
      qvSelectedColorIdx: 0,
      qvSelectedSize: "750ml",
      selectedRating: 5,
      qvImageIndex: 0,
      wishlist: (() => { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_wishlist_ids')) || []; } catch (e) { return []; } })(),
      compareList: (() => { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_compare_ids')) || []; } catch (e) { return []; } })(),
      recentlyViewed: (() => { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_recently_viewed')) || []; } catch (e) { return []; } })(),
      activeChatAdminUser: null, // Dành cho giao diện Admin chọn khách hàng chat
      chatAttachment: null, // File đính kèm khi nhắn tin
      chatImageAttachment: null, // Ảnh đính kèm từ thiết bị
      paymentMethod: 'cod',
      wheelConfig: null,
      pendingWheelOpen: false
    };

    function toNumber(value, fallback = 0) {
      if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return fallback;
      if (typeof value === 'string') {
        const cleaned = value.replace(/[^\d-]/g, '');
        if (!cleaned) return fallback;
        const n = Number(cleaned);
        return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : fallback;
      }
      const n = Number(value);
      return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : fallback;
    }

    const PRODUCT_BADGE_PRESETS = {
      sale: { vi: 'Hàng giảm giá', en: 'Sale', color: '#e11d48' },
      best: { vi: 'Hàng bán chạy', en: 'Best seller', color: '#f59e0b' },
      new: { vi: 'Hàng mới', en: 'New', color: '#10b981' }
    };

    function sanitizeHexColor(value, fallback) {
      const raw = String(value || '').trim();
      return /^#([0-9a-fA-F]{3}|[0-9a-fA-F]{6})$/.test(raw) ? raw : fallback;
    }

    function getBadgePreset(type) {
      return PRODUCT_BADGE_PRESETS[type] || PRODUCT_BADGE_PRESETS.new;
    }

    function getBadgeLabel(type) {
      const preset = getBadgePreset(type);
      return state.lang === 'vi' ? preset.vi : preset.en;
    }

    function matchesFeaturedFilter(product, tabKey) {
      if (!tabKey) return true;
      if (tabKey === 'sale') {
        return getProductDiscountPercent(product) > 0 || !!product.isFeatured;
      }
      if (tabKey === 'best') {
        return !!product.isBestSeller || toNumber(product.sold, 0) >= 1;
      }
      if (tabKey === 'new') {
        return !!product.isNewArrival;
      }
      return true;
    }

    function normalizeProductBadges(rawBadges, product = {}) {
      const source = Array.isArray(rawBadges) ? rawBadges : [];
      const out = [];
      const seen = new Set();
      source.forEach(item => {
        const type = String(item?.type || item?.key || item?.name || '').trim();
        if (!PRODUCT_BADGE_PRESETS[type] || seen.has(type)) return;
        seen.add(type);
        out.push({
          type,
          color: sanitizeHexColor(item?.color, getBadgePreset(type).color)
        });
      });

      if (!out.length) {
        if (product.isBestSeller) out.push({ type: 'best', color: PRODUCT_BADGE_PRESETS.best.color });
        if (product.isNewArrival) out.push({ type: 'new', color: PRODUCT_BADGE_PRESETS.new.color });
      }

      return out.slice(0, 3);
    }

    function renderProductBadges(p) {
      const badges = normalizeProductBadges(p.badges, p);
      if (!badges.length) return '';
      return `<div class="product-badges-line">${badges.map(b => {
        const label = getBadgeLabel(b.type);
        return `<button type="button" class="product-badge-pill" onclick="applyTopShortcut('${b.type}')" title="${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Lọc theo' : 'Filter by'} ${escapeHtml(label)}" style="color:${b.color}; border-color:${b.color}; background:${b.color}22; cursor:pointer;"><span class="product-badge-dot"></span>${escapeHtml(label)}</button>`;
      }).join('')}</div>`;
    }

    function buildProductBadgesFromEditor(productId) {
      const editor = document.getElementById(`badge-editor-${productId}`);
      if (!editor) return [];
      const count = Math.max(1, Math.min(3, parseInt(editor.querySelector('.admin-badge-count-select')?.value || '1', 10) || 1));
      const badges = [];
      for (let i = 1; i <= count; i += 1) {
        const row = editor.querySelector(`[data-slot-row="${i}"]`);
        if (!row) continue;
        const type = row.querySelector('.admin-badge-type')?.value || '';
        if (!PRODUCT_BADGE_PRESETS[type] || badges.some(b => b.type === type)) continue;
        const color = sanitizeHexColor(row.querySelector('.admin-badge-color')?.value, getBadgePreset(type).color);
        badges.push({ type, color });
      }
      return badges;
    }

    function toggleAdminBadgeSlots(productId, countValue) {
      const editor = document.getElementById(`badge-editor-${productId}`);
      if (!editor) return;
      const count = Math.max(1, Math.min(3, parseInt(countValue, 10) || 1));
      editor.querySelectorAll('[data-slot-row]').forEach(row => {
        const idx = parseInt(row.getAttribute('data-slot-row'), 10) || 1;
        row.style.display = idx <= count ? 'flex' : 'none';
      });
      const saleEditor = editor.querySelector('.admin-sale-editor');
      const showSale = Array.from(editor.querySelectorAll('.admin-badge-type')).some(sel => String(sel.value || '') === 'sale');
      if (saleEditor) saleEditor.style.display = showSale ? 'flex' : 'none';
    }

    function adminSaveProductBadges(productId) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'chỉnh nhãn sản phẩm' : 'edit product labels')) return;
      const p = state.products.find(prod => prod.id === productId);
      if(!p) return;
      const editor = document.getElementById(`badge-editor-${productId}`);
      if (!editor) return;
      const count = Math.max(1, Math.min(3, parseInt(editor.querySelector('.admin-badge-count-select')?.value || '1', 10) || 1));
      const badges = [];
      for (let i = 1; i <= count; i += 1) {
        const row = editor.querySelector(`[data-slot-row="${i}"]`);
        if (!row) continue;
        const type = row.querySelector('.admin-badge-type')?.value || '';
        if (!PRODUCT_BADGE_PRESETS[type] || badges.some(b => b.type === type)) continue;
        const color = sanitizeHexColor(row.querySelector('.admin-badge-color')?.value, getBadgePreset(type).color);
        badges.push({ type, color });
      }

      p.badges = badges;
      p.isBestSeller = badges.some(b => b.type === 'best');
      p.isNewArrival = badges.some(b => b.type === 'new');
      p.isFeatured = badges.some(b => b.type === 'sale');

      const saleSelected = badges.some(b => b.type === 'sale');
      const salePercentInput = editor.querySelector('.admin-sale-percent');
      const saleBgInput = editor.querySelector('.admin-sale-bg');
      const saleTextInput = editor.querySelector('.admin-sale-text');
      const salePercent = saleSelected ? normalizeDiscountPercent(salePercentInput?.value) : 0;
      p.discountPercent = salePercent;
      p.discountBadgeBg = sanitizeHexColor(saleBgInput?.value, p.discountBadgeBg || '#e11d48');
      p.discountTextColor = sanitizeHexColor(saleTextInput?.value, p.discountTextColor || '#ffffff');
      p.oldPrice = salePercent > 0 ? Math.max(toNumber(p.basePrice, 0) + 1, Math.round(toNumber(p.basePrice, 0) / Math.max(0.01, 1 - (salePercent / 100)))) : 0;

      syncStorage();
      renderProducts();
      renderAdminDashboard();
      renderPromoBoard();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã lưu nhãn và % giảm giá sản phẩm.' : 'Saved labels and sale discount.');
    }

    function normalizeProduct(p = {}) {
      const basePrice = toNumber(p.basePrice, toNumber(p.price, 0));
      const oldPrice = toNumber(p.oldPrice, basePrice > 0 ? basePrice + 100000 : 0);
      const gallery = Array.isArray(p.gallery) ? [...new Set(p.gallery.filter(Boolean))] : [];
      const sizeOptions = Array.isArray(p.sizeOptions) && p.sizeOptions.length
        ? p.sizeOptions.map((s, idx) => ({
            key: String(s.key || s.size || s.label || `size-${idx + 1}`).trim(),
            label: String(s.label || s.key || s.size || `Dung tích ${idx + 1}`),
            price: toNumber(s.price, basePrice),
            image: String(s.image || s.img || '').trim(),
            hoverImage: String(s.hoverImage || s.hoverImg || '').trim(),
            variants: normalizeVariantList(s.variants || s.colorVariants || s.colors || [])
          }))
        : [
            { key: "500ml", label: "500ml · Gọn nhẹ", price: Math.max(0, basePrice - 30000), image: '', hoverImage: '', variants: [] },
            { key: "750ml", label: "750ml · Tiêu chuẩn", price: basePrice, image: '', hoverImage: '', variants: [] },
            { key: "1200ml", label: "1200ml · Dung tích lớn", price: basePrice + 120000, image: '', hoverImage: '', variants: [] }
          ];

      const topVariants = normalizeVariantList(p.variants || []);
      const hasNestedVariants = sizeOptions.some(opt => Array.isArray(opt.variants) && opt.variants.length);
      const fallbackVariants = hasNestedVariants ? [] : topVariants;

      const discountPercent = normalizeDiscountPercent(p.discountPercent || getProductDiscountPercent({ basePrice, oldPrice }));
      return {
        ...p,
        basePrice,
        oldPrice,
        discountPercent,
        discountBadgeBg: sanitizeHexColor(p.discountBadgeBg, '#e11d48'),
        discountTextColor: sanitizeHexColor(p.discountTextColor, '#ffffff'),
        saleEndsAt: parseSaleEndsAt(p.saleEndsAt || p.saleEndAt || ''),
        rating: toNumber(p.rating, 5),
        sold: toNumber(p.sold, 0),
        stock: p.stock !== undefined ? toNumber(p.stock, 20) : 20,
        isBestSeller: !!p.isBestSeller,
        isNewArrival: !!p.isNewArrival,
        isFeatured: !!p.isFeatured,
        badges: normalizeProductBadges(p.badges, p),
        variants: topVariants.length ? topVariants : fallbackVariants,
        gallery,
        sizeOptions,
        shortDescription: String(p.shortDescription || p.subtitle || p.description || '').trim(),
        detailSubtitle: String(p.detailSubtitle || p.shortDescription || '').trim(),
        detailKicker: String(p.detailKicker || p.collection || '').trim(),
        tags: normalizeTextList(p.tags || p.tagList || ''),
        quickviewHighlights: Array.isArray(p.quickviewHighlights) ? p.quickviewHighlights.map(item => ({ title: String(item?.title || item?.key || '').trim(), value: String(item?.value || '').trim() })).filter(item => item.title || item.value) : normalizeKeyValueLines(p.quickviewHighlightsText || ''),
        specs: Array.isArray(p.specs) ? p.specs : normalizeKeyValueLines(p.specsText || ''),
        reviews: Array.isArray(p.reviews) ? p.reviews.map(r => ({ ...r, rating: toNumber(r.rating, 5) })) : []
      };
    }

    function normalizeTextList(value = '') {
      if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.map(v => String(v || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
      return String(value || '')
        .split(/[,\n]+/)
        .map(v => v.trim())
        .filter(Boolean);
    }

    function normalizeKeyValueLines(value = '') {
      if (Array.isArray(value)) {
        return value.map(item => ({
          title: String(item?.title || item?.key || '').trim(),
          value: String(item?.value || '').trim()
        })).filter(item => item.title || item.value);
      }
      return String(value || '')
        .split(/\n+/)
        .map(line => line.trim())
        .filter(Boolean)
        .map(line => {
          const parts = line.split('|').map(v => v.trim());
          return { title: parts[0] || '', value: parts.slice(1).join('|') || '' };
        })
        .filter(item => item.title || item.value);
    }

    function slugifyText(value = '') {
      return String(value || '')
        .toLowerCase()
        .normalize('NFD')
        .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
        .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
        .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
        .slice(0, 48);
    }

    function getNumericPriceBucket(price) {
      const n = toNumber(price, 0);
      if (n < 400000) return 'under-400';
      if (n <= 700000) return '400-700';
      return 'over-700';
    }

    function hasProductColorMatch(product = {}, requested = []) {
      const list = normalizeTextList(requested);
      if (!list.length) return true;
      const hay = [
        ...(Array.isArray(product.variants) ? product.variants : []).map(v => `${v?.colorName || ''} ${v?.colorHex || ''}`),
        ...(Array.isArray(product.sizeOptions) ? product.sizeOptions.flatMap(s => Array.isArray(s.variants) ? s.variants.map(v => `${v?.colorName || ''} ${v?.colorHex || ''}`) : []) : []),
        String(product.color || '')
      ].join(' ').toLowerCase();
      return list.some(item => hay.includes(String(item || '').toLowerCase()));
    }

    function buildProductSearchHaystack(product = {}) {
      return [
        product.name,
        product.category,
        product.collection,
        product.capacity,
        product.material,
        product.shortDescription,
        product.description,
        product.details,
        product.detailStory,
        product.detailSubtitle,
        product.detailKicker,
        product.suitableFor,
        ...(normalizeTextList(product.tags || [])),
        ...(Array.isArray(product.variants) ? product.variants.map(v => `${v?.colorName || ''} ${v?.colorHex || ''}`) : []),
        ...(Array.isArray(product.sizeOptions) ? product.sizeOptions.map(s => `${s?.key || ''} ${s?.label || ''}`) : [])
      ].join(' ').toLowerCase();
    }

    function renderAdminBadgeSlotsEditor(prefix, badgeSlots = []) {
      const slots = Array.from({ length: 3 }, (_, i) => badgeSlots[i] || { type: '', color: '#e11d48' });
      return `
        <div class="admin-badge-editor-lite">
          ${slots.map((slot, idx) => `
            <div class="admin-badge-slot-row-lite">
              <select class="admin-badge-select" data-badge-type="${idx + 1}">
                <option value="">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chọn nhãn' : 'Choose label'}</option>
                <option value="sale" ${slot.type === 'sale' ? 'selected' : ''}>${getBadgeLabel('sale')}</option>
                <option value="best" ${slot.type === 'best' ? 'selected' : ''}>${getBadgeLabel('best')}</option>
                <option value="new" ${slot.type === 'new' ? 'selected' : ''}>${getBadgeLabel('new')}</option>
              </select>
              <input class="admin-badge-color" type="color" data-badge-color="${idx + 1}" value="${sanitizeHexColor(slot.color, '#e11d48')}">
              <span style="font-size:0.72rem; color:var(--muted); font-weight:800;">${idx + 1}</span>
            </div>
          `).join('')}
        </div>`;
    }

    function normalizeUser(u = {}) {
      return {
        ...u,
        cart: Array.isArray(u.cart) ? u.cart : [],
        orders: Array.isArray(u.orders) ? u.orders : [],
        vouchers: Array.isArray(u.vouchers) ? u.vouchers : [],
        spinHistory: Array.isArray(u.spinHistory) ? u.spinHistory : [],
        spinCredits: Number.isFinite(Number(u.spinCredits)) ? Number(u.spinCredits) : undefined,
        welcomeSpinGranted: !!u.welcomeSpinGranted,
        usedCouponCodes: Array.isArray(u.usedCouponCodes) ? u.usedCouponCodes : [],
        wishlist: Array.isArray(u.wishlist) ? u.wishlist : [],
        compareList: Array.isArray(u.compareList) ? u.compareList : []
      };
    }

    state.products = (state.products || []).map(normalizeProduct);
    state.users = (state.users || []).map(normalizeUser);
if (state.currentUser) state.currentUser = ensureWheelCredits(normalizeUser(state.currentUser), true);

function getPromoFallbackIds(sourceIds, targetCount, exclude = []) {
  const taken = new Set(exclude.filter(Boolean));
  const out = [];
  (sourceIds || []).forEach(id => {
    if (!id || taken.has(id) || out.includes(id)) return;
    taken.add(id);
    out.push(id);
    if (out.length >= targetCount) return;
  });
  return out;
}

function clampPromoCount(value) {
  return Math.max(1, Math.min(9, parseInt(value, 10) || 1));
}

function defaultFlashSaleTheme() {
  return {
    shellStart: '#ff7070',
    shellEnd: '#ff5959',
    summaryBg: 'rgba(255,255,255,.96)',
    brandColor: '#ff4c2f',
    brandIconColor: '#fbbf24',
    timerLabelColor: '#111827',
    timerDigitBg: '#111827',
    timerDigitText: '#ffffff',
    timerSepColor: '#111827',
    timerBorder: 'rgba(17,24,39,.08)'
  };
}

function normalizeColorValue(value, fallback) {
  const v = String(value || '').trim();
  return /^#([0-9a-fA-F]{3}|[0-9a-fA-F]{6})$/.test(v) ? v : fallback;
}

function normalizeFlashSaleTheme(theme = {}) {
  const fallback = defaultFlashSaleTheme();
  return {
    shellStart: normalizeColorValue(theme.shellStart, fallback.shellStart),
    shellEnd: normalizeColorValue(theme.shellEnd, fallback.shellEnd),
    summaryBg: String(theme.summaryBg || fallback.summaryBg).trim() || fallback.summaryBg,
    brandColor: normalizeColorValue(theme.brandColor, fallback.brandColor),
    brandIconColor: normalizeColorValue(theme.brandIconColor, fallback.brandIconColor),
    timerLabelColor: normalizeColorValue(theme.timerLabelColor, fallback.timerLabelColor),
    timerDigitBg: normalizeColorValue(theme.timerDigitBg, fallback.timerDigitBg),
    timerDigitText: normalizeColorValue(theme.timerDigitText, fallback.timerDigitText),
    timerSepColor: normalizeColorValue(theme.timerSepColor, fallback.timerSepColor),
    timerBorder: String(theme.timerBorder || fallback.timerBorder).trim() || fallback.timerBorder
  };
}

function buildDefaultPromoBoard() {
  const products = Array.isArray(state.products) ? [...state.products] : [];
  const withImages = products.filter(p => !!getPrimaryProductImage(p) || !!getProductImages(p)[0]);
  const bySold = [...withImages].sort((a, b) => toNumber(b.sold, 0) - toNumber(a.sold, 0));
  const byNew = [...withImages].filter(p => p.isNewArrival).concat(bySold);
  const byBest = [...withImages].filter(p => p.isBestSeller).concat(bySold);
  const saleCandidates = [...withImages]
    .filter(p => getProductDiscountPercent(p) > 0)
    .sort((a, b) => {
      const da = getProductDiscountPercent(a);
      const db = getProductDiscountPercent(b);
      if (db !== da) return db - da;
      return toNumber(b.sold, 0) - toNumber(a.sold, 0);
    });

  const makeSaleItem = (p) => ({
    productId: p?.id || '',
    discount: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, getProductDiscountPercent(p) || 20)),
    endsAt: parseSaleEndsAt(p?.saleEndsAt || '')
  });

  const saleItems = saleCandidates.length ? saleCandidates.slice(0, 9).map(makeSaleItem) : withImages.slice(0, 3).map(p => makeSaleItem(p));
  const bestItems = getPromoFallbackIds(byBest.map(p => p.id), 9, saleItems.map(s => s.productId)).map(id => ({ productId: id }));
  const newItems = getPromoFallbackIds(byNew.map(p => p.id), 9, saleItems.map(s => s.productId)).map(id => ({ productId: id }));

  const flashSaleEndsAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();

  return {
    saleCount: Math.max(1, saleItems.length || 1),
    saleItems: saleItems.length ? saleItems : [{ productId: '', discount: 20, endsAt: flashSaleEndsAt }],
    flashSaleEndsAt,
    flashSaleTheme: defaultFlashSaleTheme(),
    bestCount: Math.max(1, Math.min(9, bestItems.length || 2)),
    bestItems: bestItems.length ? bestItems : [{ productId: '' }, { productId: '' }],
    newCount: Math.max(1, Math.min(9, newItems.length || 3)),
    newItems: newItems.length ? newItems : [{ productId: '' }, { productId: '' }, { productId: '' }]
  };
}

function normalizePromoBoard(board = {}) {
  const fallback = buildDefaultPromoBoard();
  const validIds = new Set((state.products || []).map(p => p.id));
  const imageIds = new Set((state.products || []).filter(p => !!getPrimaryProductImage(p) || !!getProductImages(p)[0]).map(p => p.id));

  const normalizeSaleItems = (rawItems, fallbackItems, desiredCount) => {
    const source = [];
    if (Array.isArray(rawItems)) source.push(...rawItems);
    else if (rawItems && typeof rawItems === 'object') source.push(rawItems);
    else if (board.saleId) source.push({
      productId: board.saleId,
      discount: board.saleDiscount,
      endsAt: board.saleEndsAt
    });

    const out = [];
    const append = (item) => {
      const pid = String(item?.productId || item?.id || item?.saleId || '').trim();
      if (!pid || !validIds.has(pid) || !imageIds.has(pid) || out.some(x => x.productId === pid)) return;
      out.push({
        productId: pid,
        discount: Math.max(5, Math.min(90, toNumber(item?.discount, board.saleDiscount ?? fallback.saleItems?.[0]?.discount ?? 20))),
        endsAt: parseSaleEndsAt(item?.endsAt || item?.saleEndsAt || item?.endTime || board.flashSaleEndsAt || board.saleEndsAt || '')
      });
    };

    source.forEach(append);
    if (!source.length) (Array.isArray(fallbackItems) ? fallbackItems : []).forEach(append);

    while (out.length < desiredCount) out.push({ productId: '', discount: 20, endsAt: '' });
    return out.slice(0, desiredCount);
  };

  const normalizeGenericItems = (rawItems, fallbackItems, desiredCount) => {
    const source = [];
    if (Array.isArray(rawItems)) source.push(...rawItems);
    else if (rawItems && typeof rawItems === 'object') source.push(rawItems);
    else if (typeof rawItems === 'string') source.push({ productId: rawItems });
    const out = [];
    const append = (item) => {
      const pid = String(item?.productId || item?.id || item?.saleId || item || '').trim();
      if (!pid || !validIds.has(pid) || !imageIds.has(pid) || out.some(x => x.productId === pid)) return;
      out.push({ productId: pid });
    };
    source.forEach(append);
    if (!source.length) (Array.isArray(fallbackItems) ? fallbackItems : []).forEach(append);
    while (out.length < desiredCount) out.push({ productId: '' });
    return out.slice(0, desiredCount);
  };

  const saleCount = clampPromoCount(board.saleCount || board.saleItems?.length || fallback.saleCount || 1);
  const bestCount = clampPromoCount(board.bestCount || board.bestItems?.length || fallback.bestCount || 2);
  const newCount = clampPromoCount(board.newCount || board.newItems?.length || fallback.newCount || 3);
  const flashSaleEndsAt = parseSaleEndsAt(board.flashSaleEndsAt || board.saleEndsAt || board.saleItems?.find?.(item => String(item?.endsAt || '').trim())?.endsAt || fallback.flashSaleEndsAt || '');
  const flashSaleTheme = normalizeFlashSaleTheme(board.flashSaleTheme || board.theme || fallback.flashSaleTheme || {});

  const saleItems = normalizeSaleItems(board.saleItems || board.saleItem || board.saleId, fallback.saleItems, saleCount)
    .map(item => ({ ...item, endsAt: item.endsAt || flashSaleEndsAt }));

  return {
    saleCount,
    saleItems,
    flashSaleEndsAt,
    flashSaleTheme,
    bestCount,
    bestItems: normalizeGenericItems(board.bestItems || board.bestIds || board.bestId, fallback.bestItems, bestCount),
    newCount,
    newItems: normalizeGenericItems(board.newItems || board.newIds || board.newId, fallback.newItems, newCount)
  };
}

const COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY = 'al_collection_board_v2';

function saveJson(key, value) {
  try {
    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
  } catch (err) {}
}

function promoBoardToCollectionBoard(board = {}) {
  const saleIds = Array.isArray(board.saleItems) ? board.saleItems.map(item => item?.productId).filter(Boolean) : [];
  const bestIds = Array.isArray(board.bestItems) ? board.bestItems.map(item => item?.productId).filter(Boolean) : [];
  const newIds = Array.isArray(board.newItems) ? board.newItems.map(item => item?.productId).filter(Boolean) : [];

  return {
    activeTab: 'sale',
    saleIds: [...new Set(saleIds)].slice(0, 9),
    bestIds: [...new Set(bestIds)].slice(0, 9),
    newIds: [...new Set(newIds)].slice(0, 9)
  };
}

state.promoBoard = normalizePromoBoard(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_promo_board')) || {});
let cardSelectedVariantMap = {};
    const COUPONS = { "AQUALUXE10": 0.1, "HUYLUXE20": 0.2 };
    const FREE_SHIPPING_LIMIT = 500000;
    const STANDARD_SHIPPING_FEE = 30000;

    const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
    const formatMoney = num => { const safe = Number.isFinite(Number(num)) ? Number(num) : 0; return state.lang === 'vi' ? new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND' }).format(safe) : '$' + (safe / 25000).toFixed(2); };

    function isValidDateValue(value) {
      const t = new Date(value).getTime();
      return Number.isFinite(t);
    }

    function parseSaleEndsAt(value) {
      if (!value) return '';
      const t = new Date(value).getTime();
      return Number.isFinite(t) ? new Date(t).toISOString() : '';
    }

    function getSizeOptionsForProduct(product) {
      if (!product) return [];
      if (Array.isArray(product.sizeOptions) && product.sizeOptions.length) return product.sizeOptions;
      const basePrice = toNumber(product.basePrice, 0);
      return [
        { key: "500ml", label: "500ml · Gọn nhẹ", price: Math.max(0, basePrice - 30000) },
        { key: "750ml", label: "750ml · Tiêu chuẩn", price: basePrice },
        { key: "1200ml", label: "1200ml · Dung tích lớn", price: basePrice + 120000 }
      ];
    }

    function getDefaultSizeKey(product) {
      const opts = getSizeOptionsForProduct(product);
      return opts[0]?.key || product?.capacity || "750ml";
    }

    function getSizeOption(product, sizeKey) {
      const opts = getSizeOptionsForProduct(product);
      return opts.find(s => String(s.key) === String(sizeKey)) || opts[0] || null;
    }

    function normalizeDiscountPercent(value) {
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(toNumber(value, 0))));
    }

    function calculateRawPriceBySize(basePrice, sizeKey, product = null) {
      const option = getSizeOption(product, sizeKey);
      if (option && Number.isFinite(Number(option.price))) return toNumber(option.price, toNumber(basePrice, 0));
      const price = toNumber(basePrice, 0);
      if (sizeKey === "500ml") return Math.max(0, price - 30000);
      if (sizeKey === "1200ml") return price + 120000;
      return price;
    }

    function getProductDiscountPercent(product = {}) {
      const explicit = normalizeDiscountPercent(product?.discountPercent);
      if (explicit > 0) return explicit;
      const base = toNumber(product?.basePrice, 0);
      const old = toNumber(product?.oldPrice, 0);
      if (old > base) {
        return Math.max(1, Math.min(100, Math.round((1 - (base / Math.max(1, old))) * 100)));
      }
      return 0;
    }

    function getSaleOldPriceBySize(product, sizeKey) {
      const base = toNumber(product?.basePrice, 0);
      const old = toNumber(product?.oldPrice, 0);
      const discount = getProductDiscountPercent(product);
      if (discount > 0) return calculateRawPriceBySize(base, sizeKey, product);
      if (old > base) return calculateRawPriceBySize(old, sizeKey, product);
      return 0;
    }

    function calculatePriceBySize(basePrice, sizeKey, product = null) {
      const rawPrice = calculateRawPriceBySize(basePrice, sizeKey, product);
      const discountPercent = getProductDiscountPercent(product);
      if (!discountPercent) return rawPrice;
      return Math.max(0, Math.round(rawPrice * (100 - discountPercent) / 100));
    }

    function normalizeVariantList(rawVariants = []) {
      const source = Array.isArray(rawVariants) ? rawVariants : [];
      const out = [];
      const seen = new Set();
      source.forEach((item, idx) => {
        const colorHex = sanitizeHexColor(item?.colorHex || item?.hex || item?.color || '', '#3b82f6').toUpperCase();
        const colorName = String(item?.colorName || item?.name || item?.label || `Màu ${idx + 1}`).trim();
        const key = `${colorHex}|${colorName.toLowerCase()}`;
        if (seen.has(key)) return;
        seen.add(key);
        out.push({
          colorName,
          colorHex,
          mainImg: String(item?.mainImg || item?.image || item?.img || '').trim(),
          hoverImg: String(item?.hoverImg || item?.hoverImage || item?.hover || '').trim()
        });
      });
      return out;
    }

    function getProductVariantsForSize(product, sizeKey = null) {
      const sizeOpt = sizeKey ? getSizeOption(product, sizeKey) : null;
      const nested = sizeOpt && Array.isArray(sizeOpt.variants) ? sizeOpt.variants : [];
      const topLevel = Array.isArray(product?.variants) ? product.variants : [];
      const source = nested.length ? nested : topLevel;
      return normalizeVariantList(source);
    }

    function getPrimaryVariantForSize(product, sizeKey = null, colorIndex = 0) {
      const variants = getProductVariantsForSize(product, sizeKey);
      return variants[Math.max(0, Math.min(variants.length - 1, colorIndex || 0))] || variants[0] || null;
    }

    function getUniqueColorCount(product, sizeKey = null) {
      return getProductVariantsForSize(product, sizeKey).length;
    }

    function getCardVariants(product) {
      const topLevel = Array.isArray(product?.variants) ? product.variants : [];
      return normalizeVariantList(topLevel);
    }

    function getCardPrimaryImage(product, colorIndex = 0) {
      const variants = getCardVariants(product);
      const chosen = variants[Math.max(0, Math.min(variants.length - 1, colorIndex || 0))] || variants[0] || null;
      return chosen?.mainImg || product?.image || product?.mainImg || product?.thumbnail || '';
    }

    function getCardDisplayPrice(product, colorIndex = 0) {
      const variants = getCardVariants(product);
      const chosen = variants[Math.max(0, Math.min(variants.length - 1, colorIndex || 0))] || variants[0] || null;
      const raw = Number.isFinite(Number(chosen?.price)) && Number(chosen?.price) > 0
        ? toNumber(chosen.price, toNumber(product?.basePrice, 0))
        : calculatePriceBySize(toNumber(product?.basePrice, 0), product?.capacity, product);
      const discountPercent = getProductDiscountPercent(product);
      return discountPercent > 0 ? Math.max(0, Math.round(raw * (100 - discountPercent) / 100)) : raw;
    }

    function getCardDisplayOldPrice(product, colorIndex = 0) {
      const variants = getCardVariants(product);
      const chosen = variants[Math.max(0, Math.min(variants.length - 1, colorIndex || 0))] || variants[0] || null;
      const raw = Number.isFinite(Number(chosen?.price)) && Number(chosen?.price) > 0
        ? toNumber(chosen.price, toNumber(product?.basePrice, 0))
        : calculatePriceBySize(toNumber(product?.basePrice, 0), product?.capacity, product);
      const discountPercent = getProductDiscountPercent(product);
      return discountPercent > 0 ? raw : 0;
    }

    function getProductImages(product, sizeKey = null, colorIndex = 0) {
      if (!product) return [];
      const imgs = [];
      const sizeOpt = sizeKey ? getSizeOption(product, sizeKey) : null;
      const variants = getProductVariantsForSize(product, sizeKey);
      const activeVariant = variants[Math.max(0, Math.min(variants.length - 1, colorIndex || 0))] || variants[0] || null;

      if (activeVariant?.mainImg) imgs.push(activeVariant.mainImg);
      if (activeVariant?.hoverImg && activeVariant.hoverImg !== activeVariant.mainImg) imgs.push(activeVariant.hoverImg);
      if (sizeOpt && sizeOpt.image) imgs.push(sizeOpt.image);
      if (sizeOpt && sizeOpt.hoverImage && sizeOpt.hoverImage !== sizeOpt.image) imgs.push(sizeOpt.hoverImage);
      if (Array.isArray(product.gallery) && product.gallery.length) imgs.push(...product.gallery);
      if (Array.isArray(product.images) && product.images.length) imgs.push(...product.images);
      if (Array.isArray(product.media) && product.media.length) imgs.push(...product.media);
      variants.forEach(v => {
        if(v.mainImg) imgs.push(v.mainImg);
        if(v.hoverImg && v.hoverImg !== v.mainImg) imgs.push(v.hoverImg);
      });
      if (product.image) imgs.push(product.image);
      if (product.mainImg) imgs.push(product.mainImg);
      if (product.thumbnail) imgs.push(product.thumbnail);
      return [...new Set(imgs.filter(Boolean))];
    }

    function getPrimaryProductImage(product, sizeKey = null, colorIndex = 0) {
      return getProductImages(product, sizeKey, colorIndex)[0] || '';
    }

    const SIZE_PRESET_LIBRARY = [
      { key: '250ml', label: '250ml · Mini', priceDelta: -50000 },
      { key: '350ml', label: '350ml · Nhỏ gọn', priceDelta: -40000 },
      { key: '500ml', label: '500ml · Gọn nhẹ', priceDelta: -30000 },
      { key: '600ml', label: '600ml · Linh hoạt', priceDelta: -10000 },
      { key: '750ml', label: '750ml · Tiêu chuẩn', priceDelta: 0 },
      { key: '1000ml', label: '1000ml · Dung tích lớn', priceDelta: 60000 },
      { key: '1200ml', label: '1200ml · Mega', priceDelta: 120000 },
      { key: '1500ml', label: '1500ml · Siêu lớn', priceDelta: 180000 },
      { key: '2000ml', label: '2000ml · Max', priceDelta: 260000 }
    ];

    const SIZE_DEFAULT_PRICE_MAP = {
      '250ml': 300000,
      '350ml': 330000,
      '500ml': 420000,
      '600ml': 430000,
      '750ml': 450000,
      '1000ml': 510000,
      '1200ml': 570000,
      '1500ml': 630000,
      '2000ml': 710000
    };

    function getPresetSizePrice(key) {
      return SIZE_DEFAULT_PRICE_MAP[String(key || '').trim()] || 450000;
    }

    function adminGuard(actionLabel = 'chức năng này') {
      if (!state.currentUser || state.currentUser.role !== 'admin') {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? `Chỉ tài khoản Admin mới dùng được ${actionLabel}.` : `Only the Admin account can use ${actionLabel}.`);
        return false;
      }
      return true;
    }

function initLocalImageUploaders() {
      const avatarFile = $('profAvatarFile');
  const avatarHidden = $('profAvatar');
  const avatarPreview = $('profAvatarPreview');

  if (avatarFile && avatarHidden) {
    avatarFile.onchange = async () => {
      const file = avatarFile.files && avatarFile.files[0];
      if (!file) return;
      const dataUrl = await readFileAsDataURL(file);
      avatarHidden.value = dataUrl;
      if (state.currentUser) {
        state.currentUser.avatar = dataUrl;
        updateHeaderAuthUI();
      }
      if (avatarPreview) {
        avatarPreview.src = dataUrl;
        avatarPreview.style.display = 'block';
      }
      const avatarLabel = $('profAvatarFileLabel');
      if (avatarLabel) avatarLabel.textContent = file.name;
    };
  }
}

const COLOR_PRESET_LIBRARY = [

      { key: '#FFD700', label: 'Vàng' },
      { key: '#E53935', label: 'Đỏ' },
      { key: '#1A73E8', label: 'Xanh dương' },
      { key: '#4CAF50', label: 'Xanh lá' },
      { key: '#FFFFFF', label: 'Trắng' },
      { key: '#000000', label: 'Đen' },
      { key: '#E91E63', label: 'Hồng' },
      { key: '#9C27B0', label: 'Tím' },
      { key: '#FF9800', label: 'Cam' },
      { key: '#795548', label: 'Nâu' },
      { key: '#9E9E9E', label: 'Xám' },
      { key: '#1A237E', label: 'Xanh navy' },
      { key: '#00BFA5', label: 'Xanh mint' },
      { key: '#FFC107', label: 'Vàng gold' },
      { key: '#B71C1C', label: 'Đỏ đô' },
      { key: '#F8BBD0', label: 'Hồng phấn' },
      { key: '#CE93D8', label: 'Tím lavender' },
      { key: '#FF5722', label: 'Cam đất' },
      { key: '#5D4037', label: 'Nâu cà phê' },
      { key: '#616161', label: 'Xám đậm' },
      { key: '#03A9F4', label: 'Xanh da trời' },
      { key: '#33691E', label: 'Xanh rêu' },
      { key: '#FFF8E1', label: 'Trắng ngà' },
      { key: '#212121', label: 'Đen nhám' }
    ];

    const ADMIN_VARIANT_EDITOR_STATE = {
      count: 2,
      activeIndex: 0,
      slots: []
    };

    function escapeHtml(value = '') {
      return String(value)
        .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
        .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
        .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
        .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
        .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
    }

    function readFileAsDataURL(file) {
      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        if (!file) {
          resolve('');
          return;
        }
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result || ''));
        reader.onerror = () => reject(reader.error || new Error('File read failed'));
        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
      });
    }

    function isSaleActive(p = {}) {
      const discountPercent = getProductDiscountPercent(p);
      if (!(discountPercent > 0)) return false;
      if (!p.saleEndsAt) return true;
      const t = new Date(p.saleEndsAt).getTime();
      return Number.isFinite(t) ? Date.now() < t : true;
    }

    function getSaleCountdownLabel(saleEndsAt) {
      if (!saleEndsAt) return '';
      const end = new Date(saleEndsAt).getTime();
      if (!Number.isFinite(end)) return '';
      const diff = end - Date.now();
      if (diff <= 0) return '';
      const d = Math.floor(diff / 86400000);
      const h = Math.floor((diff % 86400000) / 3600000);
      const m = Math.floor((diff % 3600000) / 60000);
      return d > 0 ? `${d} ngày ${h} giờ còn lại` : `${h} giờ ${m} phút còn lại`;
    }

    function syncStorage() {
      localStorage.setItem('al_products', JSON.stringify(state.products));
      localStorage.setItem('al_registered_users', JSON.stringify(state.users));
      localStorage.setItem('al_session_user', JSON.stringify(state.currentUser));
      localStorage.setItem('al_promo_board', JSON.stringify(state.promoBoard));
      localStorage.setItem('al_wishlist_ids', JSON.stringify(state.currentUser ? (state.currentUser.wishlist || []) : (state.wishlist || [])));
      localStorage.setItem('al_compare_ids', JSON.stringify(state.currentUser ? (state.currentUser.compareList || []) : (state.compareList || [])));
      localStorage.setItem('al_recently_viewed', JSON.stringify((state.recentlyViewed || []).slice(0, 8)));
      
      if (state.currentUser && state.currentUser.username !== ADMIN_CONFIG.userToken) {
        let uIdx = state.users.findIndex(u => u.username === state.currentUser.username);
        if (uIdx !== -1) {
          state.users[uIdx].cart = state.currentUser.cart || [];
          state.users[uIdx].orders = state.currentUser.orders || [];
          state.users[uIdx].address = state.currentUser.address || "";
          state.users[uIdx].phone = state.currentUser.phone || "";
          state.users[uIdx].paymentMethod = state.currentUser.paymentMethod || 'cash';
          state.users[uIdx].bankName = state.currentUser.bankName || "";
          state.users[uIdx].avatar = state.currentUser.avatar || "";
          state.users[uIdx].vouchers = state.currentUser.vouchers || [];
          state.users[uIdx].spinHistory = state.currentUser.spinHistory || [];
          state.users[uIdx].spinCredits = Number.isFinite(Number(state.currentUser.spinCredits)) ? Number(state.currentUser.spinCredits) : 0;
          state.users[uIdx].welcomeSpinGranted = !!state.currentUser.welcomeSpinGranted;
          state.users[uIdx].usedCouponCodes = state.currentUser.usedCouponCodes || [];
          state.users[uIdx].wishlist = state.currentUser.wishlist || [];
          state.users[uIdx].compareList = state.currentUser.compareList || [];
          localStorage.setItem('al_registered_users', JSON.stringify(state.users));
        }
      }
    }

    function getSavedWishlist() {
      return state.currentUser ? (state.currentUser.wishlist || []) : (state.wishlist || []);
    }

    function getSavedCompare() {
      return state.currentUser ? (state.currentUser.compareList || []) : (state.compareList || []);
    }

    function setSavedWishlist(list) {
      const next = [...new Set((list || []).filter(Boolean))];
      if (state.currentUser) state.currentUser.wishlist = next;
      else state.wishlist = next;
      syncStorage();
    }

    function setSavedCompare(list) {
      const next = [...new Set((list || []).filter(Boolean))].slice(0, 3);
      if (state.currentUser) state.currentUser.compareList = next;
      else state.compareList = next;
      syncStorage();
    }

    function isWishlisted(id) {
      return getSavedWishlist().includes(id);
    }

    function isCompared(id) {
      return getSavedCompare().includes(id);
    }

    function toggleWishlist(id, event) {
      if (event) event.stopPropagation();
      const list = getSavedWishlist();
      const next = list.includes(id) ? list.filter(x => x !== id) : [id, ...list];
      setSavedWishlist(next);
      renderSavedCollections();
      renderProducts();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã lưu vào mục yêu thích.' : 'Saved to wishlist.');
    }

    function toggleCompare(id, event) {
      if (event) event.stopPropagation();
      const list = getSavedCompare();
      let next;
      if (list.includes(id)) next = list.filter(x => x !== id);
      else if (list.length >= 3) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chỉ so sánh tối đa 3 sản phẩm.' : 'You can compare up to 3 products.');
        return;
      } else next = [...list, id];
      setSavedCompare(next);
      renderSavedCollections();
      renderProducts();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã cập nhật danh sách so sánh.' : 'Compare list updated.');
    }

    function openCollectionModal(tab = 'wishlist') {
      $('collectionOverlay').classList.add('open');
      activateCollectionTab(tab);
      renderSavedCollections();
    }

    function closeCollectionModal() {
      $('collectionOverlay').classList.remove('open');
    }

    function activateCollectionTab(tab) {
      const isCompare = tab === 'compare';
      $('collectionTabWishlistBtn').classList.toggle('active', !isCompare);
      $('collectionTabCompareBtn').classList.toggle('active', isCompare);
      $('collectionWishlistPanel').classList.toggle('active', !isCompare);
      $('collectionComparePanel').classList.toggle('active', isCompare);
      renderSavedCollections();
    }

    function renderSavedCollections() {
      const wishlistPanel = $('collectionWishlistPanel');
      const comparePanel = $('collectionComparePanel');
      const wishlist = getSavedWishlist().map(id => state.products.find(p => p.id === id)).filter(Boolean);
      const compare = getSavedCompare().map(id => state.products.find(p => p.id === id)).filter(Boolean);

      if (wishlistPanel) {
        wishlistPanel.innerHTML = wishlist.length ? `
          <div class="wishlist-grid">
            ${wishlist.map(p => {
              const img = getPrimaryProductImage(p, getDefaultSizeKey(p));
              return `
                <div class="wishlist-card">
                  <img src="${img}" alt="${escapeHtml(p.name)}">
                  <div class="wishlist-card-body">
                    <h4>${escapeHtml(p.name)}</h4>
                    <div style="font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--muted);">${escapeHtml(p.category)} · ${escapeHtml(p.material)}</div>
                    <strong style="font-size:0.95rem;">${formatMoney(calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, getDefaultSizeKey(p), p))}</strong>
                    <div class="wishlist-card-actions">
                      <button class="btn secondary" type="button" onclick="triggerQuickview('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> Xem</button>
                      <button class="btn danger" type="button" onclick="toggleWishlist('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-heart-crack"></i></button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              `;
            }).join('')}
          </div>
        ` : `<div class="collection-empty">Chưa có sản phẩm nào trong danh sách yêu thích.</div>`;
      }

      if (comparePanel) {
        comparePanel.innerHTML = compare.length ? `
          <div class="compare-grid">
            ${compare.map(p => {
              const img = getPrimaryProductImage(p, getDefaultSizeKey(p));
              return `
                <div class="compare-card">
                  <img src="${img}" alt="${escapeHtml(p.name)}">
                  <div class="compare-card-body">
                    <h4 style="font-size:0.95rem; line-height:1.3;">${escapeHtml(p.name)}</h4>
                    <div class="compare-specs">
                      <span>${escapeHtml(p.category)} · ${escapeHtml(p.material)}</span>
                      <span>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Dung tích' : 'Size'}: ${escapeHtml(getDefaultSizeKey(p))}</span>
                      <span>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Giá' : 'Price'}: ${escapeHtml(formatMoney(calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, getDefaultSizeKey(p), p)))}</span>
                      <span>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đánh giá' : 'Rating'}: ${Number(p.rating || 5).toFixed(1)}★</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="wishlist-card-actions">
                      <button class="btn secondary" type="button" onclick="triggerQuickview('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> Xem</button>
                      <button class="btn danger" type="button" onclick="toggleCompare('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              `;
            }).join('')}
          </div>
        ` : `<div class="collection-empty">Chưa có sản phẩm nào trong danh sách so sánh. Tối đa 3 sản phẩm.</div>`;
      }

      const count = getSavedWishlist().length + getSavedCompare().length;
      const badge = $('collectionBadgeCount');
      if (badge) badge.textContent = count;
    }

    // INTERACTIVE SYSTEM MESSAGES
    const SYSTEM_L10N = {
      vi: {
        loginReq: "Vui lòng đăng nhập để sử dụng tính năng này!",
        profileReq: "Vui lòng cập nhật đầy đủ Họ tên, Số điện thoại và Địa chỉ trong hồ sơ của bạn trước khi thanh toán!",
        addCartOk: "Đã thêm sản phẩm vào giỏ hàng riêng tư thành công!",
        delCartOk: "Đã hạ sản phẩm khỏi giỏ hàng.",
        couponOk: "Kích hoạt mã giảm giá thành công!",
        couponErr: "Mã giảm giá không chính xác hoặc đã hết hạn.",
        validateErr: "Vui lòng kiểm tra lại thông tin hồ sơ của bạn.",
        authErr: "Thông tin tài khoản hoặc mật khẩu không chính xác!",
        authOk: "Đăng nhập hệ thống AquaLuxe thành công!",
        regDup: "Tên tài khoản này đã tồn tại trên hệ thống!",
        regOk: "Đăng ký thành công! Sẵn sàng đăng nhập...",
        profOk: "Hồ sơ của bạn đã được cập nhật thành công.",
        prodAddOk: "Khởi tạo và xuất bản sản phẩm mới thành công!",
        confirmDel: "Xác nhận xóa thực thể này khỏi hệ thống?",
        emptyCart: "Giỏ hàng trống"
      },
      en: {
        loginReq: "Authentication required! Please sign in first.",
        profileReq: "Please complete your Full name, Phone and Address in your profile configuration before checkout!",
        addCartOk: "Product has been successfully assigned to your cart!",
        delCartOk: "Item removed from cart workspace.",
        couponOk: "Voucher applied successfully!",
        couponErr: "Invalid voucher sequence or expired timeline.",
        validateErr: "Please audit your profile address configurations.",
        authErr: "Invalid authentication parameters!",
        authOk: "Welcome back to AquaLuxe Network!",
        regDup: "Username already cataloged in our directory!",
        regOk: "Account created! Routing to master node...",
        profOk: "Private parameters updated smoothly.",
        prodAddOk: "New product node published successfully!",
        confirmDel: "Are you sure you want to completely erase this node?",
        emptyCart: "Cart is empty"
      }
    };

    function msg(key) { return SYSTEM_L10N[state.lang][key]; }

    // ==========================================================================
    // 2. ENGINE CHUYỂN ĐỔI NGÔN NGỮ (VI/EN) DỮ LIỆU TĨNH & ĐỘNG
    // ==========================================================================
    function applyLanguageDOM() {
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-vi]').forEach(el => {
        el.textContent = state.lang === 'vi' ? el.getAttribute('data-vi') : el.getAttribute('data-en');
      });
      renderProducts();
      renderSearchSuggestions();
      renderTopCollections();
      renderPromoBoard();
      renderRecentlyViewed();
      renderSavedCollections();
      renderCart();
      renderDeliveryDrawerContent();
      updateDeliveryBadgeCount();
      renderAdminDashboard();
      updateChatInterface();
      updateFloatingActions();
    }

    function applyTheme() {
      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', state.theme);
      const icon = $('themeToggle').querySelector('i');
      icon.className = state.theme === 'dark' ? 'fa-solid fa-moon' : 'fa-solid fa-sun';
      localStorage.setItem('al_theme', state.theme);
    }

    $('themeToggle').onclick = () => {
      state.theme = state.theme === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
      applyTheme();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã đổi giao diện.' : 'Theme updated.');
    };

    $('clearRecentlyViewedBtn') && ($('clearRecentlyViewedBtn').onclick = clearRecentlyViewed);
    $('floatingTopBtn') && ($('floatingTopBtn').onclick = scrollToTopSmooth);
    $('floatingSearchBtn') && ($('floatingSearchBtn').onclick = focusShopSearch);
    $('floatingCartBtn') && ($('floatingCartBtn').onclick = () => $('cartToggleBtn')?.click());

    window.addEventListener('scroll', updateFloatingActions, { passive: true });

    // ==========================================================================
    // 3. LOGIC XÁC THỰC TÀI KHOẢN & HỒ SƠ 3 VẠCH BỔ SUNG THÔNG TIN
    // ==========================================================================
    const authOverlay = $('authModalOverlay');
    
    $('headerUserAuthBtn').onclick = () => {
      authOverlay.classList.add('open');
      showCorrectAuthView();
    };
    
    $('authModalCloseBtn').onclick = () => authOverlay.classList.remove('open');

    $('switchRegisterLink').onclick = (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      $('authLoginContainer').style.display = "none";
      $('authResetContainer').style.display = "none";
      $('authRegisterContainer').style.display = "block";
    };
    
    $('switchLoginLink').onclick = (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      $('authRegisterContainer').style.display = "none";
      $('authResetContainer').style.display = "none";
      $('authLoginContainer').style.display = "block";
    };

    $('forgotPasswordLink').onclick = (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      showForgotPasswordView();
    };

    $('backToLoginLink').onclick = (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      showLoginAuthView();
    };

    function showLoginAuthView() {
      $('authLoginContainer').style.display = "block";
      $('authRegisterContainer').style.display = "none";
      $('authResetContainer').style.display = "none";
    }

    function showForgotPasswordView() {
      $('authLoginContainer').style.display = "none";
      $('authRegisterContainer').style.display = "none";
      $('authResetContainer').style.display = "block";
      $('fpResetHint').textContent = state.lang === 'vi'
        ? 'Mã OTP sẽ được tạo trong bản demo này. Khi tích hợp backend, hệ thống sẽ gửi SMS thật đến số điện thoại đã đăng ký.'
        : 'An OTP will be generated in this demo. When connected to a backend, a real SMS can be sent to the registered phone number.';
      $('fpOtpGroup').style.display = "none";
      $('fpNewPassGroup').style.display = "none";
      $('fpConfirmPassGroup').style.display = "none";
      $('confirmResetBtn').style.display = "none";
      $('sendOtpBtn').style.display = "inline-flex";
    }

    function showCorrectAuthView() {
      if (!state.currentUser) {
        $('authLoginContainer').style.display = "block";
        $('authRegisterContainer').style.display = "none";
        $('authProfileContainer').style.display = "none";
      } else {
        $('authLoginContainer').style.display = "none";
        $('authRegisterContainer').style.display = "none";
        $('authProfileContainer').style.display = "block";
        $('profileHeading').textContent = (state.lang === 'vi' ? "Xin Chào, " : "Welcome, ") + (state.currentUser.name || state.currentUser.username);
        $('profAvatar').value = state.currentUser.avatar || "";
        const avatarPreview = $('profAvatarPreview');
        const avatarLabel = $('profAvatarFileLabel');
        if (avatarPreview) {
          if (state.currentUser.avatar) {
            avatarPreview.src = state.currentUser.avatar;
            avatarPreview.style.display = 'block';
          } else {
            avatarPreview.src = '';
            avatarPreview.style.display = 'none';
          }
        }
        if (avatarLabel) avatarLabel.textContent = state.currentUser.avatar ? 'Đang dùng ảnh hiện tại' : 'Chưa chọn ảnh';
        $('profUsername').value = state.currentUser.username || "";
        $('profRecipientName').value = state.currentUser.name || "";
        $('profCurrentPassword').value = "";
        $('profNewPassword').value = "";
        $('profConfirmPassword').value = "";
        $('profPhone').value = state.currentUser.phone || "";
        $('profAddress').value = state.currentUser.address || "";
        if ($('profPaymentMethod')) $('profPaymentMethod').value = state.currentUser.paymentMethod || (state.currentUser.bankName ? 'bank' : 'cash');
        if ($('profBank')) $('profBank').value = state.currentUser.bankName || "Vietcombank";
        toggleProfileBankTypeBox();
        renderUserOrdersHistory();
      }
    }

    function renderUserOrdersHistory() {
      const container = $('userOrdersContainer');
      if(!container) return;
      container.innerHTML = '';
      if(!state.currentUser || !state.currentUser.orders || state.currentUser.orders.length === 0) {
        container.innerHTML = `<div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--muted); text-align:center;">Chưa có đơn hàng nào được đặt.</div>`;
        return;
      }
      state.currentUser.orders.forEach(o => {
        const itemBox = document.createElement('div');
        itemBox.className = 'review-item';
        itemBox.style.borderLeft = o.status.includes('Hủy') ? '3px solid var(--accent)' : '3px solid var(--success)';
        itemBox.innerHTML = `
          <div style="display:flex; justify-content:between; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:var(--primary);">
            <span>Mã: ${o.orderId}</span>
            <span style="margin-left:auto; color:${o.status.includes('Hủy')?'var(--accent)':'var(--success)'}">${o.status}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="order-img-strip">
            ${o.items.map(i => `<img src="${i.image}" class="order-thumbnail" title="${i.name} [${i.size}]">`).join('')}
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:11px; margin-top:4px; text-align:right;">Tổng tiền: <b>${o.totalAmount}</b></div>
        `;
        container.appendChild(itemBox);
      });
    }

    function toggleProfileBankTypeBox() {
      const method = $('profPaymentMethod')?.value || 'cash';
      const bankBox = $('profBankTypeBox');
      if (!bankBox) return;
      bankBox.style.display = method === 'bank' ? 'block' : 'none';
    }

    function formatOrderDate(ts) {
      const n = Number(ts);
      if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return '—';
      try {
        return new Date(n).toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' });
      } catch (_) {
        return '—';
      }
    }

    function formatOrderDateTime(ts) {
      const n = Number(ts);
      if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return '—';
      try {
        return new Date(n).toLocaleString('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
      } catch (_) {
        return '—';
      }
    }

    function getOrderCreatedAt(order = {}) {
      return Number(order.createdAt || order.confirmedAt || order.deliveryDate || Date.now());
    }

    function getOrderEstimatedDays(order = {}) {
      const n = Number(order.estimatedDays);
      if (Number.isFinite(n) && n > 0) return n;
      return String(order.status || '').includes('Chờ') ? 5 : 3;
    }

    function getOrderDeliveryDate(order = {}) {
      const direct = Number(order.deliveryDate);
      if (Number.isFinite(direct) && direct > 0) return direct;
      return getOrderCreatedAt(order) + getOrderEstimatedDays(order) * 86400000;
    }

    function getRelatedProductsForItems(items = [], limit = 4) {
      const pickedIds = new Set(items.map(i => i.id));
      const seed = items[0];
      const seedProd = seed ? state.products.find(p => p.id === seed.id) : null;
      const sameCategory = seedProd ? state.products.filter(p => p.category === seedProd.category && !pickedIds.has(p.id)) : [];
      const sameMaterial = seedProd ? state.products.filter(p => p.material === seedProd.material && !pickedIds.has(p.id)) : [];
      const merged = [...sameCategory, ...sameMaterial, ...state.products.filter(p => !pickedIds.has(p.id))];
      const unique = [];
      const seen = new Set();
      merged.forEach(p => {
        if (unique.length >= limit) return;
        if (seen.has(p.id)) return;
        seen.add(p.id);
        unique.push(p);
      });
      return unique.slice(0, limit);
    }

    function reorderFromOrder(orderId) {
      if (!state.currentUser) return;
      const orders = Array.isArray(state.currentUser.orders) ? state.currentUser.orders : [];
      const order = orders.find(o => o.orderId === orderId);
      if (!order) return;
      order.items.forEach(item => {
        const sizeKey = item.size || item.sizeKey || item.sizeLabel || '750ml';
        const varIdx = Number.isFinite(Number(item.varIdx)) ? Number(item.varIdx) : 0;
        const qty = Math.max(1, Number(item.qty) || 1);
        addToCartFlow(item.id, varIdx, sizeKey, qty);
      });
      renderCart();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã thêm lại sản phẩm từ đơn hàng.' : 'Items restored to cart.');
    }

    function getCurrentUserOrders() {
      return (state.currentUser && Array.isArray(state.currentUser.orders)) ? state.currentUser.orders : [];
    }

    function getShippingOrdersForCurrentUser() {
      return getCurrentUserOrders().filter(o => !String(o.status || '').includes('Đã Hủy') && !String(o.status || '').includes('Đã Giao') && (
        String(o.status || '').includes('Đã Xác Nhận') ||
        String(o.status || '').includes('Đang giao') ||
        Number(o.estimatedDays) > 0 ||
        Number(o.deliveryDate) > 0
      ));
    }

    function renderDeliveryDrawerContent() {
      const body = $('deliveryDrawerBody');
      if(!body) return;

      if(!state.currentUser) {
        body.innerHTML = `
          <div class="delivery-empty">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-user-lock"></i>
            <div>
              <strong style="display:block; margin-bottom:4px; color:var(--text);">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Vui lòng đăng nhập' : 'Please sign in'}</strong>
              <div style="font-size:0.84rem; line-height:1.5;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Bạn cần đăng nhập để xem các đơn hàng sắp giao và số ngày còn lại.' : 'Sign in to view upcoming deliveries and remaining days.'}</div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        return;
      }

      const shippingOrders = getShippingOrdersForCurrentUser().slice().sort((a, b) => getOrderDeliveryDate(a) - getOrderDeliveryDate(b));
      if(!shippingOrders.length) {
        body.innerHTML = `
          <div class="delivery-empty">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-truck-fast"></i>
            <div>
              <strong style="display:block; margin-bottom:4px; color:var(--text);">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa có đơn sắp giao' : 'No upcoming deliveries yet'}</strong>
              <div style="font-size:0.84rem; line-height:1.5;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Khi Admin xác nhận đơn, đơn sẽ xuất hiện ở đây với số ngày còn lại.' : 'Once Admin confirms an order, it will appear here with remaining days.'}</div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        return;
      }

      body.innerHTML = `
        <div class="delivery-intro">
          <strong style="display:block; color:var(--text); margin-bottom:4px;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Các đơn đã được xác nhận' : 'Confirmed orders'}</strong>
          ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mỗi đơn hiển thị số ngày còn lại đến khi nhận hàng. Số ngày này được Admin nhập trong bảng quản trị.' : 'Each order shows the days left until delivery. These days are set by Admin in the management table.'}
        </div>
        <div class="delivery-list">
          ${shippingOrders.map(o => {
            const etaDate = getOrderDeliveryDate(o);
            const daysLeft = Math.max(0, Math.ceil((etaDate - Date.now()) / 86400000));
            return `
              <div class="delivery-card">
                <div class="delivery-card-top">
                  <div>
                    <strong>${o.orderId}</strong>
                    <div class="delivery-card-meta" style="margin-top:6px;">
                      <span>${o.items.length} ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'sản phẩm' : 'items'}</span>
                      <span>${o.customerName || (state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Khách' : 'Customer')}</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span class="delivery-days-pill">${daysLeft > 0 ? `${daysLeft} ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'ngày nữa' : 'days left'}` : (state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Sắp giao' : 'Delivering soon')}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="delivery-card-meta">
                  <span>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Dự kiến' : 'ETA'}: ${formatOrderDateTime(etaDate)}</span>
                  <span>${o.status || 'Đã Xác Nhận'}</span>
                  <span>${o.totalAmount || ''}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="delivery-card-items">
                  ${o.items.map(i => `
                    <div class="delivery-card-item">
                      <img src="${i.image || ''}" alt="${i.name || ''}">
                      <div class="delivery-card-item-info">
                        <strong>${i.name || ''}</strong>
                        <span>${i.colorName || ''} · ${i.sizeLabel || i.size || ''} · x${i.qty || 1}</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  `).join('')}
                </div>
              </div>
            `;
          }).join('')}
        </div>`;
    }

    function updateDeliveryBadgeCount() {
      const badge = $('deliveryBadgeCount');
      if(!badge) return;
      badge.textContent = getShippingOrdersForCurrentUser().length;
    }

    function openDeliveryDrawer() {
      const overlay = $('deliveryOverlay');
      const drawer = $('deliveryDrawer');
      if(!overlay || !drawer) return;
      renderDeliveryDrawerContent();
      overlay.classList.add('open');
      drawer.classList.add('open');
    }

    function closeDeliveryDrawer() {
      const overlay = $('deliveryOverlay');
      const drawer = $('deliveryDrawer');
      if(overlay) overlay.classList.remove('open');
      if(drawer) drawer.classList.remove('open');
    }

    function renderCartOrderSummary() {
      const currentBox = $('cartCurrentSummary');
      const purchasedBox = $('cartPurchasedSummary');
      const shippingBox = $('cartShippingSummary');
      if(!currentBox || !purchasedBox || !shippingBox) return;

      const cartItems = (state.currentUser && Array.isArray(state.currentUser.cart)) ? state.currentUser.cart : [];
      const orders = (state.currentUser && Array.isArray(state.currentUser.orders)) ? state.currentUser.orders : [];
      const shippingOrders = orders.filter(o => !String(o.status || '').includes('Đã Hủy') && !String(o.status || '').includes('Đã Giao'));
      const latestPurchased = [...orders].slice(-3).reverse();
      const latestShipping = [...shippingOrders].slice(-3).reverse();

      const currentTab = $('cartTabCurrent');
      const purchasedTab = $('cartTabPurchased');
      const shippingTab = $('cartTabShipping');
      [currentTab, purchasedTab, shippingTab].forEach(el => el && el.classList.remove('active'));
      const activeTabEl = state.cartTab === 'purchased' ? purchasedTab : state.cartTab === 'shipping' ? shippingTab : currentTab;
      if(activeTabEl) activeTabEl.classList.add('active');

      $('cartOrderCountCurrent').textContent = cartItems.length;
      $('cartOrderCountPurchased').textContent = orders.length;
      $('cartOrderCountShipping').textContent = shippingOrders.length;

      currentBox.innerHTML = cartItems.length ? cartItems.slice(0, 3).map(i => `
        <div class="cart-mini-entry">
          <strong>${i.name}</strong>
          <div>${i.sizeLabel || i.size || ''} · x${i.qty}</div>
          <div class="cart-mini-meta"><span>${i.colorName || ''}</span><span>${formatMoney(toNumber(i.price, 0) * toNumber(i.qty, 1))}</span></div>
        </div>
      `).join('') : `<div class="cart-mini-entry" style="text-align:center; color:var(--muted);">Chưa có sản phẩm.</div>`;

      purchasedBox.innerHTML = latestPurchased.length ? latestPurchased.map(o => `
        <div class="cart-mini-entry">
          <strong>${o.orderId}</strong>
          <div>${o.items.length} sản phẩm · ${o.status}</div>
