          <div class="cart-mini-meta"><span>${o.totalAmount}</span><span>${o.paymentMethod === 'bank' ? 'Ngân hàng' : 'COD'}</span></div>
        </div>
      `).join('') : `<div class="cart-mini-entry" style="text-align:center; color:var(--muted);">Chưa có đơn hàng.</div>`;

      shippingBox.innerHTML = latestShipping.length ? latestShipping.map(o => `
        <div class="cart-mini-entry">
          <strong>${o.orderId}</strong>
          <div>${o.status}</div>
          <div class="cart-mini-meta"><span>${o.items.map(i => i.name).slice(0,2).join(', ')}</span><span>${o.totalAmount}</span></div>
        </div>
      `).join('') : `<div class="cart-mini-entry" style="text-align:center; color:var(--muted);">Chưa có đơn sắp giao.</div>`;
    }

    function renderCartDrawerContent() {
      const body = $('cartDrawerBody');
      if(!body) return;

      const currentCart = (state.currentUser && Array.isArray(state.currentUser.cart)) ? state.currentUser.cart : [];

      if(!currentCart.length) {
        body.innerHTML = `
          <div class="cart-new-banner"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đây là bố cục giỏ hàng mới, gọn hơn và tập trung vào sản phẩm đang có.' : 'This is the new cart layout, cleaner and focused on the items in your cart.'}</div>
          <div class="cart-new-empty">
            <div>
              <i class="fa-solid fa-basket-shopping"></i>
              <h4 style="margin:0 0 6px 0; font-size:1rem; font-weight:800; color:var(--text);">${msg('emptyCart')}</h4>
              <p style="margin:0; font-size:0.84rem; line-height:1.5;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Hãy thêm sản phẩm để xem giao diện mới của giỏ hàng.' : 'Add products to see the new cart design.'}</p>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        return;
      }

      const renderLine = (item) => {
        const lineProd = state.products.find(p => p.id === item.id);
        const lineImg = item.image || (lineProd && (getProductImages(lineProd)[0] || lineProd.variants?.[0]?.mainImg || '')) || '';
        return `
          <div class="cart-new-item">
            <img src="${lineImg}" alt="${item.name}">
            <div class="cart-new-item-copy">
              <h5>${item.name}</h5>
              <div class="cart-new-item-tags">
                <span>${item.colorName || ''}</span>
                <span>${item.sizeLabel || item.size || ''}</span>
                <span>x${item.qty}</span>
              </div>
              <div class="quantity-control">
                <button onclick="changeCartQty('${item.cartKey}', -1)"><i class="fa-solid fa-minus"></i></button>
                <span>${item.qty}</span>
                <button onclick="changeCartQty('${item.cartKey}', 1)"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i></button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="cart-new-item-actions">
              <div class="cart-new-item-price">${formatMoney(toNumber(item.price, 0) * Math.max(1, toNumber(item.qty, 1)))}</div>
              <div class="cart-line-trash" onclick="removeCartItem('${item.cartKey}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash-can"></i></div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
      };

      body.innerHTML = `
        <div class="cart-new-banner"><i class="fa-solid fa-truck-fast"></i>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Free skip · Miễn phí vận chuyển đã được bật sẵn trong giỏ hàng.' : 'Free skip · Free shipping is enabled in your cart.'}</div>
        <div class="cart-new-list">
          ${currentCart.map(renderLine).join('')}
        </div>
      `;
    }

    function setCartTab(tab) {
      state.cartTab = tab;
      renderCartDrawerContent();
    }

    function renderCart() {
      const body = $('cartDrawerBody');
      if(!body) return;
      let badgeTotalQty = 0;
      let subtotal = 0;

      const currentCart = (state.currentUser && Array.isArray(state.currentUser.cart)) ? state.currentUser.cart : [];
      currentCart.forEach(item => {
        const qty = Math.max(1, toNumber(item.qty, 1));
        const price = toNumber(item.price, 0);
        badgeTotalQty += qty;
        subtotal += price * qty;
      });

      renderCartOrderSummary();
      renderCartDrawerContent();
      renderDeliveryDrawerContent();
      updateDeliveryBadgeCount();

      const cartBadgeEl = $('cartBadgeCount');
      if (cartBadgeEl) cartBadgeEl.textContent = badgeTotalQty;
      const floatingBadgeEl = $('floatingCartBadge');
      if (floatingBadgeEl) floatingBadgeEl.textContent = badgeTotalQty > 99 ? '99+' : String(badgeTotalQty);

      const subtotalEl = $('sumSubtotal');
      if (subtotalEl) subtotalEl.textContent = formatMoney(subtotal);

      let discountVal = 0;
      const couponPercent = getCouponDiscountPercent(state.currentCoupon);
      if (couponPercent > 0) {
        discountVal = subtotal * (couponPercent / 100);
      }
      const discountEl = $('sumDiscount');
      if (discountEl) discountEl.textContent = `-${formatMoney(discountVal)}`;

      const shippingFee = 0;
      const alertEl = $('shippingAlertMsg');
      if (alertEl) {
        alertEl.innerHTML = state.lang === 'vi'
          ? `<i class="fa-solid fa-truck-fast"></i><span>Free skip · Miễn phí vận chuyển</span>`
          : `<i class="fa-solid fa-truck-fast"></i><span>Free skip · Free shipping</span>`;
      }
      const progressEl = $('shippingProgressBar');
      if (progressEl) progressEl.style.width = "100%";

      const shippingEl = $('sumShipping');
      if (shippingEl) shippingEl.textContent = formatMoney(shippingFee);
      const totalEl = $('sumTotal');
      if (totalEl) totalEl.textContent = formatMoney(Math.max(0, subtotal - discountVal + shippingFee));
    }

    const PASSWORD_RESET_KEY = 'al_password_reset_otp';

    function getPasswordResetState() {
      try {
        return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(PASSWORD_RESET_KEY) || 'null');
      } catch (_) {
        return null;
      }
    }

    function setPasswordResetState(payload) {
      localStorage.setItem(PASSWORD_RESET_KEY, JSON.stringify(payload));
    }

    function clearPasswordResetState() {
      localStorage.removeItem(PASSWORD_RESET_KEY);
    }

    function findUserByUsername(username) {
      return state.users.find(user => user.username === username);
    }

    function findUserIndexByUsername(username) {
      return state.users.findIndex(user => user.username === username);
    }

    $('loginForm').onsubmit = () => {
      const u = $('loginUser').value.trim();
      const p = $('loginPass').value.trim();

      if (u === ADMIN_CONFIG.userToken && p === ADMIN_CONFIG.secretPass) {
        state.currentUser = { username: ADMIN_CONFIG.userToken, role: "admin", name: "AquaLuxe Executive", avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1606041008023-472dfb5e530f?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80" };
        state.pendingWheelOpen = false;
        showToast(msg('authOk'));
        authOverlay.classList.remove('open');
        updateHeaderAuthUI();
        syncStorage();
        renderAdminDashboard();
        updateChatInterface();
        return;
      }

      const found = state.users.find(user => user.username === u && user.password === p);
      if (found) {
        const normalized = ensureWheelCredits(normalizeUser(found), true);
        state.currentUser = { 
          username: normalized.username, 
          password: normalized.password || "",
          name: normalized.name, 
          role: "user",
          avatar: normalized.avatar || "",
          phone: normalized.phone || "",
          address: normalized.address || "",
          paymentMethod: normalized.paymentMethod || (normalized.bankName ? 'bank' : 'cash'),
          bankName: normalized.bankName || "Vietcombank",
          cart: normalized.cart || [],
          orders: normalized.orders || [],
          vouchers: normalized.vouchers || [],
          spinHistory: normalized.spinHistory || [],
          spinCredits: Math.max(1, Number(normalized.spinCredits) || 0),
          welcomeSpinGranted: true,
          usedCouponCodes: normalized.usedCouponCodes || []
        };
        state.currentUser = ensureWheelCredits(state.currentUser, false);
        showToast(msg('authOk'));
        authOverlay.classList.remove('open');
        updateHeaderAuthUI();
        renderCart(); 
        updateChatInterface();
        syncStorage();
        renderAdminDashboard();
        if (state.pendingWheelOpen && state.currentUser.role !== 'admin') {
          state.pendingWheelOpen = false;
          setTimeout(() => openWheelModal(), 150);
        } else {
          state.pendingWheelOpen = false;
        }
      } else {
        showToast(msg('authErr'));
      }
    };

    $('sendOtpBtn').onclick = () => {
      const username = $('fpUser').value.trim();
      const phone = $('fpPhone').value.trim();

      if (!username || !phone) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Vui lòng nhập tên tài khoản và số điện thoại.' : 'Please enter username and phone number.');
        return;
      }

      const user = findUserByUsername(username);
      if (!user || String(user.phone || '').trim() !== phone) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Không tìm thấy tài khoản khớp với số điện thoại này.' : 'No account matches this phone number.');
        return;
      }

      const otp = String(Math.floor(100000 + Math.random() * 900000));
      setPasswordResetState({
        username,
        phone,
        otp,
        expiresAt: Date.now() + 5 * 60 * 1000
      });

      $('fpOtpGroup').style.display = "block";
      $('fpNewPassGroup').style.display = "block";
      $('fpConfirmPassGroup').style.display = "block";
      $('confirmResetBtn').style.display = "inline-flex";
      $('sendOtpBtn').style.display = "none";
      $('fpResetHint').innerHTML = state.lang === 'vi'
        ? `Mã OTP demo cho <b>${phone}</b> là <b>${otp}</b> (bản demo chỉ mô phỏng gửi SMS).`
        : `Demo OTP for <b>${phone}</b> is <b>${otp}</b> (this build simulates SMS delivery).`;
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã tạo mã OTP xác minh.' : 'OTP verification code created.');
    };

    $('confirmResetBtn').onclick = () => {
      const reset = getPasswordResetState();
      const username = $('fpUser').value.trim();
      const phone = $('fpPhone').value.trim();
      const otp = $('fpOtp').value.trim();
      const newPass = $('fpNewPass').value.trim();
      const confirmPass = $('fpConfirmPass').value.trim();

      if (!reset || reset.expiresAt < Date.now()) {
        clearPasswordResetState();
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mã OTP đã hết hạn, vui lòng gửi lại.' : 'OTP expired, please send it again.');
        return;
      }

      if (reset.username !== username || reset.phone !== phone) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Thông tin xác minh không khớp.' : 'Verification info does not match.');
        return;
      }

      if (String(reset.otp) !== otp) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mã OTP không đúng.' : 'Invalid OTP code.');
        return;
      }

      if (!newPass || newPass.length < 4) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mật khẩu mới phải có ít nhất 4 ký tự.' : 'New password must be at least 4 characters.');
        return;
      }

      if (newPass !== confirmPass) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mật khẩu nhập lại không khớp.' : 'Passwords do not match.');
        return;
      }

      const idx = findUserIndexByUsername(username);
      if (idx === -1) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Không tìm thấy tài khoản để đổi mật khẩu.' : 'Account not found for password reset.');
        return;
      }

      state.users[idx].password = newPass;
      if (state.currentUser && state.currentUser.username === username) {
        state.currentUser.password = newPass;
      }

      syncStorage();
      clearPasswordResetState();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đổi mật khẩu thành công!' : 'Password changed successfully!');
      $('loginUser').value = username;
      $('loginPass').value = newPass;
      showLoginAuthView();
    };

    $('registerForm').onsubmit = () => {
      const u = $('regUser').value.trim();
      const p = $('regPass').value.trim();
      const n = $('regName').value.trim();

      if (u === ADMIN_CONFIG.userToken || state.users.some(user => user.username === u)) {
        showToast(msg('regDup'));
        return;
      }

      const newUser = { username: u, password: p, name: n, avatar: "", phone: "", address: "", paymentMethod: "cash", bankName: "Vietcombank", cart: [], orders: [], vouchers: [], spinHistory: [], usedCouponCodes: [] };
      state.users.push(newUser);
      syncStorage();
      showToast(msg('regOk'));
      
      $('loginUser').value = u;
      $('loginPass').value = p;
      $('authRegisterContainer').style.display = "none";
      $('authLoginContainer').style.display = "block";
    };

    $('profileForm').onsubmit = () => {
      if (!state.currentUser) return;

      const oldUsername = state.currentUser.username || "";
      const newUsername = $('profUsername').value.trim();
      const recipientName = $('profRecipientName').value.trim();
      const currentPassword = $('profCurrentPassword').value.trim();
      const newPassword = $('profNewPassword').value.trim();
      const confirmPassword = $('profConfirmPassword').value.trim();

      if (!newUsername || !recipientName) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Vui lòng nhập tên tài khoản và tên người nhận.' : 'Please fill in username and recipient name.');
        return;
      }

      const duplicateIdx = state.users.findIndex(u => u.username === newUsername && u.username !== oldUsername);
      if (newUsername !== oldUsername && (newUsername === ADMIN_CONFIG.userToken || duplicateIdx !== -1)) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Tên tài khoản này đã tồn tại.' : 'This username already exists.');
        return;
      }

      if (newPassword || confirmPassword || currentPassword) {
        if (!currentPassword) {
          showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Vui lòng nhập mật khẩu hiện tại để đổi mật khẩu.' : 'Please enter your current password to change it.');
          return;
        }
        if (currentPassword !== (state.currentUser.password || '')) {
          showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mật khẩu hiện tại không đúng.' : 'Current password is incorrect.');
          return;
        }
        if (!newPassword || newPassword.length < 4) {
          showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mật khẩu mới phải có ít nhất 4 ký tự.' : 'New password must be at least 4 characters.');
          return;
        }
        if (newPassword !== confirmPassword) {
          showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mật khẩu nhập lại không khớp.' : 'Passwords do not match.');
          return;
        }
      }

      const userIndex = state.users.findIndex(u => u.username === oldUsername);
      if (userIndex !== -1) {
        state.users[userIndex].username = newUsername;
        state.users[userIndex].name = recipientName;
        state.users[userIndex].avatar = $('profAvatar').value.trim() || state.users[userIndex].avatar || "";
        state.users[userIndex].phone = $('profPhone').value.trim();
        state.users[userIndex].address = $('profAddress').value.trim();
        state.users[userIndex].paymentMethod = $('profPaymentMethod')?.value || 'cash';
        state.users[userIndex].bankName = state.users[userIndex].paymentMethod === 'bank' ? $('profBank').value : "";
        if (newPassword) state.users[userIndex].password = newPassword;
      }

      state.currentUser.username = newUsername;
      state.currentUser.name = recipientName;
      state.currentUser.avatar = $('profAvatar').value.trim() || state.currentUser.avatar || "";
      state.currentUser.phone = $('profPhone').value.trim();
      state.currentUser.address = $('profAddress').value.trim();
      state.currentUser.paymentMethod = $('profPaymentMethod')?.value || 'cash';
      state.currentUser.bankName = state.currentUser.paymentMethod === 'bank' ? $('profBank').value : "";
      if (newPassword) state.currentUser.password = newPassword;

      syncStorage();
      updateHeaderAuthUI();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Hồ sơ và thông tin tài khoản đã được cập nhật.' : 'Profile and account details updated.');
      authOverlay.classList.remove('open');
    };

    $('authLogoutBtn').onclick = () => {
      state.currentUser = null;
      syncStorage();
      updateHeaderAuthUI();
      renderCart(); 
      updateChatInterface();
      authOverlay.classList.remove('open');
      window.location.hash = ""; 
    };

    function updateHeaderAuthUI() {
      if (state.currentUser) {
        $('headerUserText').textContent = state.currentUser.username;
        if(state.currentUser.avatar) {
          $('headerUserAvatar').src = state.currentUser.avatar;
          $('headerUserAvatar').style.display = "block";
          $('headerUserIcon').style.display = "none";
        } else {
          $('headerUserAvatar').style.display = "none";
          $('headerUserIcon').style.display = "block";
        }
        if (state.currentUser.role === 'admin') {
          $('navAdminLink').style.display = "block";
        } else {
          $('navAdminLink').style.display = "none";
        }
      } else {
        $('headerUserText').textContent = state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đăng Nhập' : 'Sign In';
        $('headerUserAvatar').style.display = "none";
        $('headerUserIcon').style.display = "block";
        $('navAdminLink').style.display = "none";
        $('admin-zone').style.display = "none";
      }
      renderSavedCollections();
    }

    // ==========================================================================
    // 4. BANNER HERO CAROUSEL INTERACTIVE & HEADER CO DÃN
    // ==========================================================================
    let currentSlideIndex = 0;
    const slides = document.querySelectorAll('#heroSlider .slide');
    
    function showSlide(index) {
      if(slides.length === 0) return;
      slides.forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
      currentSlideIndex = (index + slides.length) % slides.length;
      slides[currentSlideIndex].classList.add('active');
    }
    
    $('nextSlide').onclick = () => showSlide(currentSlideIndex + 1);
    $('prevSlide').onclick = () => showSlide(currentSlideIndex - 1);
    setInterval(() => showSlide(currentSlideIndex + 1), 6000);

    window.onscroll = () => {
      $('mainHeader').classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 40);
    };

    $('menuToggleBtn').onclick = () => $('navMenu').classList.toggle('open');
    $('wheelMenuBtn').onclick = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); $('navMenu').classList.remove('open'); openWheelModal(); };

    $('mobileFilterOpenBtn').onclick = () => $('filterSidebar').classList.add('open');
    $('mobileFilterCloseBtn').onclick = () => $('filterSidebar').classList.remove('open');

    // ==========================================================================
    // 5. RENDER DANH SÁCH SẢN PHẨM & COLOR SWATCHES
    // ==========================================================================
    function focusPromoBoard() {
      const el = document.getElementById('featuredProductsShell') || document.getElementById('promoBoardContent');
      if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    }

    function renderTopCollections() {
      const box = $('topCollectionsGrid');
      if(!box) return;
      const activeTab = 'sale';
      box.innerHTML = `
        <button type="button" class="showcase-card glass active" aria-pressed="true"
          onclick="setCollectionTab('sale'); focusPromoBoard();"
          style="border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 58%, transparent); background: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 18%, transparent), rgba(255,255,255,.02));">
          <span class="showcase-pill" style="background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 15%, transparent); color: var(--accent);">01</span>
          <div class="showcase-icon" style="background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 12%, transparent); color: var(--accent);"><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i></div>
          <h3 style="color: var(--text);">Flash Sale</h3>
        </button>
      `;
    }

    function buildPromoProductOptionList(selectedValue = '') {
  const products = state.products || [];
  const opts = ['<option value="">— Chọn sản phẩm —</option>'];
  products.forEach((p, idx) => {
    const label = `${idx + 1}. ${escapeHtml(p.name)} · ${escapeHtml(p.category || '')} · ${formatMoney(calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, getDefaultSizeKey(p), p))}`;
    opts.push(`<option value="${escapeHtml(p.id)}" ${String(selectedValue) === String(p.id) ? 'selected' : ''}>${label}</option>`);
  });
  return opts.join('');
}

function promoCountOptions(currentCount) {
  return Array.from({ length: 9 }, (_, i) => i + 1)
    .map(n => `<option value="${n}" ${n === currentCount ? 'selected' : ''}>${n}</option>`)
    .join('');
}

function renderPromoSlotEditor(section, index, item, isSale = false) {
  const productSelectId = `promo${section}Select_${index}`;
  const discountInputId = `promo${section}Discount_${index}`;
  const endsAtInputId = `promo${section}EndsAt_${index}`;
  const title = `#${index + 1}`;
  return `
    <div style="padding:12px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);display:grid;gap:8px;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;">
        <div style="font-weight:800;">${title}</div>
        <span class="pill" style="display:inline-flex;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid var(--line);font-size:11px;font-weight:800;">${isSale ? 'Sale' : (section === 'Best' ? 'Best' : 'New')}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="field-label" data-vi="Chọn sản phẩm" data-en="Pick product">Chọn sản phẩm</div>
      <select class="sort-select promo-slot-select" id="${productSelectId}" data-section="${section}" data-index="${index}" style="width:100%">${buildPromoProductOptionList(item?.productId || '')}</select>
      ${isSale ? `
        <div class="field-label" data-vi="Giảm giá (%)" data-en="Discount (%)">Giảm giá (%)</div>
        <input type="number" class="form-control promo-slot-discount" id="${discountInputId}" data-section="${section}" data-index="${index}" min="5" max="90" step="1" value="${toNumber(item?.discount, 20)}">
      ` : ''}
    </div>
  `;
}

function syncPromoBoardFromAdmin(persist = true) {
  const board = normalizePromoBoard(state.promoBoard || {});
  const readCount = (id, fallback) => clampPromoCount($(id)?.value || fallback);

  const saleCount = readCount('promoSaleCount', board.saleCount || 1);
  const bestCount = readCount('promoBestCount', board.bestCount || 2);
  const newCount = readCount('promoNewCount', board.newCount || 3);

  const readSlot = (section, idx) => document.getElementById(`promo${section}Select_${idx}`)?.value || '';
  const readSaleItem = (idx) => ({
    productId: readSlot('Sale', idx),
    discount: toNumber(document.getElementById(`promoSaleDiscount_${idx}`)?.value, 20),
    endsAt: parseSaleEndsAt(board.flashSaleEndsAt || board.saleEndsAt || document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleEndsAt')?.value || '')
  });
  const readGenericItems = (section, count) => {
    const items = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) items.push({ productId: readSlot(section, i) });
    return items;
  };

  const flashSaleTheme = normalizeFlashSaleTheme({
    shellStart: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleShellStart')?.value,
    shellEnd: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleShellEnd')?.value,
    summaryBg: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleSummaryBg')?.value || board.flashSaleTheme?.summaryBg,
    brandColor: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleBrandColor')?.value,
    brandIconColor: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleBrandIconColor')?.value,
    timerLabelColor: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleTimerLabelColor')?.value,
    timerDigitBg: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleTimerDigitBg')?.value,
    timerDigitText: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleTimerDigitText')?.value,
    timerSepColor: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleTimerSepColor')?.value,
    timerBorder: document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleTimerBorder')?.value || board.flashSaleTheme?.timerBorder
  });
  const flashSaleEndsAt = parseSaleEndsAt(document.getElementById('promoFlashSaleEndsAt')?.value || board.flashSaleEndsAt || board.saleEndsAt || '');

  state.promoBoard = normalizePromoBoard({
    saleCount,
    saleItems: Array.from({ length: saleCount }, (_, i) => readSaleItem(i)),
    flashSaleEndsAt,
    flashSaleTheme,
    bestCount,
    bestItems: readGenericItems('Best', bestCount),
    newCount,
    newItems: readGenericItems('New', newCount)
  });

  state.collectionBoard = promoBoardToCollectionBoard(state.promoBoard);

  if (persist) {
    localStorage.setItem('al_promo_board', JSON.stringify(state.promoBoard));

    saveJson(COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY, state.collectionBoard);

    const grid = document.getElementById('collectionProductGrid');
    const prevBtn = document.getElementById('collectionScrollPrev');
    const nextBtn = document.getElementById('collectionScrollNext');

    if (grid && (prevBtn || nextBtn)) {
      const step = () => Math.max(220, Math.min(420, Math.round(grid.clientWidth * 0.72)));
      const updateButtons = () => {
        if (prevBtn) prevBtn.disabled = grid.scrollLeft <= 4;
        if (nextBtn) nextBtn.disabled = grid.scrollLeft + grid.clientWidth >= grid.scrollWidth - 4;
      };
      const scrollByDir = (dir) => {
        grid.scrollBy({ left: dir * step(), behavior: 'smooth' });
        window.setTimeout(updateButtons, 220);
      };
      if (prevBtn) prevBtn.onclick = () => scrollByDir(-1);
      if (nextBtn) nextBtn.onclick = () => scrollByDir(1);
      grid.addEventListener('scroll', updateButtons, { passive: true });
      window.requestAnimationFrame(updateButtons);
      window.setTimeout(updateButtons, 120);
    }
  }
}

function applyPromoSectionCount(section, nextCount) {
  state.promoBoard = normalizePromoBoard(state.promoBoard || {});
  const count = clampPromoCount(nextCount);

  const config = {
    sale: { countKey: 'saleCount', itemsKey: 'saleItems', fallback: { productId: '', discount: 20, endsAt: '' } },
    best: { countKey: 'bestCount', itemsKey: 'bestItems', fallback: { productId: '' } },
    new: { countKey: 'newCount', itemsKey: 'newItems', fallback: { productId: '' } }
  }[section];

  if (!config) return;

  state.promoBoard[config.countKey] = count;
  const items = Array.isArray(state.promoBoard[config.itemsKey]) ? [...state.promoBoard[config.itemsKey]] : [];
  while (items.length < count) items.push({ ...config.fallback });
  state.promoBoard[config.itemsKey] = items.slice(0, count).map(item => ({ ...config.fallback, ...item }));

  localStorage.setItem('al_promo_board', JSON.stringify(state.promoBoard));
  state.collectionBoard = promoBoardToCollectionBoard(state.promoBoard);
  saveJson(COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY, state.collectionBoard);
}

function wirePromoCountSelect(selectEl, section) {
  if (!selectEl || selectEl.dataset.promoCountBound === '1') return;
  selectEl.dataset.promoCountBound = '1';

  const handler = () => {
    syncPromoBoardFromAdmin(false);
    applyPromoSectionCount(section, selectEl.value);
    renderPromoAdminControls();
    renderPromoBoard();
  };

  selectEl.addEventListener('change', handler);
  selectEl.addEventListener('input', handler);
}

function renderPromoAdminControls() {
  const saleCount = $('promoSaleCount');
  const saleSlots = $('promoSaleSlots');
  if (!saleCount || !saleSlots) return;

  state.promoBoard = normalizePromoBoard(state.promoBoard || {});
  saleCount.innerHTML = promoCountOptions(state.promoBoard.saleCount);
  saleCount.value = String(state.promoBoard.saleCount || 1);

  const theme = normalizeFlashSaleTheme(state.promoBoard.flashSaleTheme || {});
  const endsAtValue = state.promoBoard.flashSaleEndsAt ? state.promoBoard.flashSaleEndsAt.slice(0, 16) : '';
  const setIfExists = (id, value) => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.value = value; };

  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleShellStart', theme.shellStart);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleShellEnd', theme.shellEnd);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleSummaryBg', theme.summaryBg);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleBrandColor', theme.brandColor);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleBrandIconColor', theme.brandIconColor);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleTimerLabelColor', theme.timerLabelColor);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleTimerDigitBg', theme.timerDigitBg);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleTimerDigitText', theme.timerDigitText);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleTimerSepColor', theme.timerSepColor);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleTimerBorder', theme.timerBorder);
  setIfExists('promoFlashSaleEndsAt', endsAtValue);

  saleSlots.innerHTML = Array.from({ length: state.promoBoard.saleCount || 1 }, (_, i) =>
    renderPromoSlotEditor('Sale', i, state.promoBoard.saleItems?.[i] || {}, true)
  ).join('');

  wirePromoCountSelect(saleCount, 'sale');

  const syncAndRender = () => {
    syncPromoBoardFromAdmin(true);
    renderPromoBoard();
  };

  saleSlots.querySelectorAll('.promo-slot-select, .promo-slot-discount').forEach(el => {
    el.onchange = syncAndRender;
  });

  saleSlots.querySelectorAll('.promo-slot-select').forEach((el, i) => {
    el.value = state.promoBoard.saleItems?.[i]?.productId || '';
  });
  saleSlots.querySelectorAll('.promo-slot-discount').forEach((el, i) => {
    el.value = toNumber(state.promoBoard.saleItems?.[i]?.discount, 20);
  });

  [
    'promoFlashSaleShellStart',
    'promoFlashSaleShellEnd',
    'promoFlashSaleSummaryBg',
    'promoFlashSaleBrandColor',
    'promoFlashSaleBrandIconColor',
    'promoFlashSaleTimerLabelColor',
    'promoFlashSaleTimerDigitBg',
    'promoFlashSaleTimerDigitText',
    'promoFlashSaleTimerSepColor',
    'promoFlashSaleTimerBorder',
    'promoFlashSaleEndsAt'
  ].forEach(id => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.onchange = syncAndRender; if (el) el.oninput = syncAndRender; });

  const saveBtn = $('promoSaveBtn');
  if (saveBtn) saveBtn.onclick = () => {
    syncPromoBoardFromAdmin(true);
    renderPromoBoard();
    renderAdminDashboard();
    focusPromoBoard();
    showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã lưu Flash Sale.' : 'Flash Sale saved.');
  };

  const autoBtn = $('promoAutoFillBtn');
  if (autoBtn) autoBtn.onclick = () => {
    autoFillPromoBoardFromProducts();
  };
}
function renderPromoBoard() {
  const host = $('promoBoardContent');
  if (!host) return;

  state.promoBoard = normalizePromoBoard(state.promoBoard || {});
  const makeCard = (p, idx, saleData = null) => {
    if (!p) {
      return `
        <div class="promo-mini-card empty">
          <div class="promo-mini-thumb" style="display:grid;place-items:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:0.8rem;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa chọn' : 'Empty'}</div>
          <p class="promo-mini-title">Sale #${idx + 1}</p>
          <div class="promo-mini-meta"><span>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa chọn' : 'Empty'}</span><span>#${idx + 1}</span></div>
        </div>
      `;
    }
    const img = getPrimaryProductImage(p);
    const price = formatMoney(calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, getDefaultSizeKey(p), p));
    const oldPrice = getSaleOldPriceBySize(p, getDefaultSizeKey(p)) ? formatMoney(getSaleOldPriceBySize(p, getDefaultSizeKey(p))) : '';
    const discount = saleData?.discount ?? getProductDiscountPercent(p);
    const countdown = saleData?.endsAt ? getSaleCountdownLabel(saleData.endsAt) : '';
    return `
      <div class="promo-mini-card">
        <div class="promo-mini-thumb" style="position:relative;">
          ${img ? `<img src="${img}" alt="${escapeHtml(p.name)}">` : `<div style="width:100%;height:100%;display:grid;place-items:center;color:var(--muted);font-weight:800;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa có ảnh' : 'No image'}</div>`}
          <span class="badge-tag sale" style="position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;">-${discount}%</span>
        </div>
        <p class="promo-mini-title">${escapeHtml(p.name)}</p>
        <div class="promo-mini-meta">
          <span>${escapeHtml(p.category || '')}</span>
          <span>${price}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="promo-mini-meta"><span>${discount ? `-${discount}%` : ''}</span><span>${countdown || (state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa đặt thời gian' : 'No timer set')}</span></div>
        <div class="promo-mini-meta"><span>${oldPrice ? `<s>${oldPrice}</s>` : ''}</span><span></span></div>
        <div class="promo-mini-actions">
          <button class="btn secondary" type="button" onclick="triggerQuickview('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i></button>
          <button class="btn primary" type="button" onclick="quickAddToCart('${p.id}', '${getDefaultSizeKey(p)}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-cart-shopping"></i></button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  };

  const saleItems = (state.promoBoard.saleItems || []).slice(0, state.promoBoard.saleCount || 1);
  const saleCards = saleItems.map((it, idx) => {
    const p = state.products.find(x => x.id === it.productId);
    return makeCard(p, idx, it);
  }).join('');

  host.innerHTML = `
    <div class="promo-section-panel" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
      <h3><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt" style="color:var(--accent)"></i> ${state.lang === 'vi' ? `Flash Sale (${saleItems.length} sản phẩm)` : `Flash Sale (${saleItems.length} items)`}</h3>
      <div class="promo-mini-grid" style="grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));">
        ${saleCards || `<div class="promo-mini-card empty" style="grid-column:1/-1;"><div class="promo-mini-thumb" style="display:grid;place-items:center;color:var(--muted);">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa có sản phẩm' : 'No products yet'}</div></div>`}
      </div>
    </div>
  `;

  saveJson('al_promo_board', state.promoBoard);
}

function savePromoBoardFromAdmin(autoFill = false) {
  syncPromoBoardFromAdmin(true);
  renderPromoBoard();
  renderAdminDashboard();
  focusPromoBoard();
  showToast(autoFill
    ? (state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã tự điền theo dữ liệu hiện tại.' : 'Auto-filled from current data.')
    : (state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã lưu Flash Sale.' : 'Flash Sale saved.'));
}

function autoFillPromoBoardFromProducts() {
  const fallback = normalizePromoBoard(buildDefaultPromoBoard());
  state.promoBoard = fallback;
  state.collectionBoard = promoBoardToCollectionBoard(fallback);
  localStorage.setItem('al_promo_board', JSON.stringify(state.promoBoard));
  saveJson(COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY, state.collectionBoard);
  renderPromoAdminControls();
  renderPromoBoard();
  renderAdminDashboard();
  showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã tự điền Flash Sale theo dữ liệu hiện tại.' : 'Auto-filled Flash Sale from current data.');
}

function syncFeaturedFilterButtons(active = 'all') {
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-feature-filter]').forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.featureFilter === (active || 'all'));
      });
    }

    function applyTopShortcut(action, value = '') {
      if(action === 'all') {
        state.featuredFilter = '';
        state.activeFilters = { category: [], capacity: [], material: [], color: [], price: [] };
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-checkbox').forEach(cb => cb.checked = false);
        syncFeaturedFilterButtons('all');
      } else if(action === 'sale' || action === 'best' || action === 'new') {
        state.featuredFilter = action;
        state.activeFilters.category = [];
        state.activeFilters.capacity = [];
        state.activeFilters.material = [];
        state.activeFilters.color = [];
        state.activeFilters.price = [];
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-checkbox').forEach(cb => cb.checked = false);
        syncFeaturedFilterButtons(action);
      } else if(action === 'category') {
        state.featuredFilter = '';
        state.activeFilters.category = [value];
        state.activeFilters.capacity = [];
        state.activeFilters.material = [];
        state.activeFilters.color = [];
        state.activeFilters.price = [];
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-checkbox').forEach(cb => {
          cb.checked = cb.dataset.type === 'category' && cb.value === value;
        });
        syncFeaturedFilterButtons('all');
      } else if(action === 'material') {
        state.featuredFilter = '';
        state.activeFilters.material = [value];
        state.activeFilters.category = [];
        state.activeFilters.capacity = [];
        state.activeFilters.color = [];
        state.activeFilters.price = [];
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-checkbox').forEach(cb => {
          cb.checked = cb.dataset.type === 'material' && cb.value === value;
        });
        syncFeaturedFilterButtons('all');
      } else if(action === 'capacity') {
        state.featuredFilter = '';
        state.activeFilters.capacity = [value];
        state.activeFilters.category = [];
        state.activeFilters.material = [];
        state.activeFilters.color = [];
        state.activeFilters.price = [];
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-checkbox').forEach(cb => {
          cb.checked = cb.dataset.type === 'capacity' && cb.value === value;
        });
        syncFeaturedFilterButtons('all');
      }
      renderProducts();
      window.location.hash = '#shop';
      const shop = $('shop');
      if (shop) shop.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    }

    function renderProducts() {

      const container = $('productGridContainer');
      container.innerHTML = '';
      
      const q = String(state.searchQuery || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      let filtered = state.products.filter(p => {
        if (state.featuredFilter && !matchesFeaturedFilter(p, state.featuredFilter)) return false;
        if (Array.isArray(state.activeFilters.category) && state.activeFilters.category.length && !state.activeFilters.category.includes(p.category)) return false;
        if (Array.isArray(state.activeFilters.capacity) && state.activeFilters.capacity.length && !state.activeFilters.capacity.includes(p.capacity)) return false;
        if (Array.isArray(state.activeFilters.material) && state.activeFilters.material.length && !state.activeFilters.material.includes(p.material)) return false;
        if (Array.isArray(state.activeFilters.color) && state.activeFilters.color.length && !hasProductColorMatch(p, state.activeFilters.color)) return false;
        if (Array.isArray(state.activeFilters.price) && state.activeFilters.price.length && !state.activeFilters.price.some(bucket => getNumericPriceBucket(calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, getDefaultSizeKey(p), p)) === bucket || getNumericPriceBucket(p.basePrice) === bucket)) return false;
        if(q) {
          const hay = buildProductSearchHaystack(p);
          if(!hay.includes(q)) return false;
        }
        return true;
      });

      if (state.sortBy === "price-asc") filtered.sort((a,b) => a.basePrice - b.basePrice);
      else if (state.sortBy === "price-desc") filtered.sort((a,b) => b.basePrice - a.basePrice);
      else if (state.sortBy === "rating") filtered.sort((a,b) => (b.rating || 5) - (a.rating || 5));

      $('filteredCount').textContent = filtered.length;
      syncFeaturedFilterButtons(state.featuredFilter || 'all');

      if(filtered.length === 0) {
        container.innerHTML = `<div style="grid-column:1/-1; text-align:center; padding:40px; color:var(--muted);">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Không có sản phẩm khớp tiêu chí.' : 'No matched nodes in directory.'}</div>`;
        renderTopCollections();
        return;
      }

      filtered.forEach(p => {
        if(cardSelectedVariantMap[p.id] === undefined) cardSelectedVariantMap[p.id] = 0;
        const currentIdx = cardSelectedVariantMap[p.id];
        const cardVariants = getCardVariants(p);
        const activeVar = cardVariants[currentIdx] || cardVariants[0] || { mainImg: getCardPrimaryImage(p), hoverImg: getCardPrimaryImage(p) };
        
        const card = document.createElement('div');
        card.className = 'product-card glass';
        card.id = `card-${p.id}`;
        
        const saleActive = isSaleActive(p);
        const saleCountdown = saleActive && p.saleEndsAt ? getSaleCountdownLabel(p.saleEndsAt) : '';
        card.innerHTML = `
          <div class="product-media" onclick="triggerQuickview('${p.id}')" style="cursor:pointer;">
            ${getProductDiscountPercent(p) > 0 ? `<div class="sale-percent-badge" style="background:${sanitizeHexColor(p.discountBadgeBg, '#e11d48')}; color:${sanitizeHexColor(p.discountTextColor, '#ffffff')};"><span>-${getProductDiscountPercent(p)}%</span></div>` : ''}
            <img class="product-img-main" id="img-main-${p.id}" src="${activeVar.mainImg}" alt="${p.name}">
            <img class="product-img-hover" id="img-hover-${p.id}" src="${activeVar.hoverImg || activeVar.mainImg}" alt="${p.name}">
          </div>
          <div class="product-info">
            <span class="product-cat">${p.category} · ${p.material}</span>
            ${renderProductBadges(p)}
            <h4 class="product-title" onclick="triggerQuickview('${p.id}')">${p.name}</h4>
            <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">
               <div class="product-rating"><i class="fa-solid fa-star"></i> ${(p.rating || 5.0).toFixed(1)}</div>
               <div class="product-meta-stats">
                  <span>Kho: ${p.stock !== undefined ? p.stock : 20}</span>
               </div>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--muted); font-weight:700;">Lượt mua: ${p.sold || 0}</div>
            
            <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--muted); font-weight:800;">${getCardVariants(p).length} màu</div>
              <div class="color-swatches">
                ${getCardVariants(p).map((v, idx) => `
                  <div class="swatch ${idx === currentIdx ? 'active' : ''}" 
                       style="background-color: ${v.colorHex}" 
                       title="${v.colorName}"
                       onclick="switchCardVariant('${p.id}', ${idx}, this, event)">
                  </div>
                `).join('')}
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="price-container">
              <span class="price-current" id="price-current-${p.id}">${formatMoney(getCardDisplayPrice(p, currentIdx))}</span>
              ${saleActive ? `<span class="price-old" id="price-old-${p.id}">${formatMoney(getCardDisplayOldPrice(p, currentIdx))}</span>` : ''}
            </div>
            ${saleCountdown ? `<span class="sale-countdown"><i class="fa-regular fa-clock"></i> ${saleCountdown}</span>` : ''}
            <div class="product-actions">
              <button class="btn secondary" onclick="triggerQuickview('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> <span data-vi="Xem" data-en="View">Xem</span></button>
              <button class="btn primary" onclick="quickAddToCart('${p.id}', '${getDefaultSizeKey(p)}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-cart-shopping"></i> + <span data-vi="Giỏ" data-en="Cart">Giỏ</span></button>
            </div>
            <div class="product-mini-tools">
              <button type="button" class="mini-tool-btn wish ${isWishlisted(p.id) ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="toggleWishlist('${p.id}', event)"><i class="fa-solid fa-heart"></i> <span data-vi="Yêu thích" data-en="Wishlist">Yêu thích</span></button>
              <button type="button" class="mini-tool-btn compare ${isCompared(p.id) ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="toggleCompare('${p.id}', event)"><i class="fa-solid fa-code-compare"></i> <span data-vi="So sánh" data-en="Compare">So sánh</span></button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        container.appendChild(card);
      });
    }

    function getRecentlyViewedIds() {
      return Array.isArray(state.recentlyViewed) ? state.recentlyViewed : [];
    }

    function setRecentlyViewedIds(list) {
      state.recentlyViewed = [...new Set((list || []).filter(Boolean))].slice(0, 8);
      syncStorage();
      renderRecentlyViewed();
      updateFloatingActions();
    }

    function addRecentlyViewed(id) {
      if (!id) return;
      const next = [id, ...getRecentlyViewedIds().filter(item => item !== id)].slice(0, 8);
      setRecentlyViewedIds(next);
    }

    function clearRecentlyViewed() {
      state.recentlyViewed = [];
      syncStorage();
      renderRecentlyViewed();
      updateFloatingActions();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã xóa lịch sử xem gần đây.' : 'Recently viewed history cleared.');
    }

    function renderRecentlyViewed() {
      const host = $('recentlyViewedContainer');
      const section = $('recentlyViewedSection');
      const clearBtn = $('clearRecentlyViewedBtn');
      if (!host || !section) return;

      const ids = getRecentlyViewedIds();
      const items = ids.map(id => state.products.find(p => p.id === id)).filter(Boolean);
      section.style.display = 'block';

      if (clearBtn) clearBtn.style.display = ids.length ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';

      if (!items.length) {
        host.innerHTML = `<div class="recently-viewed-empty"><i class="fa-regular fa-clock"></i><div>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa có sản phẩm nào trong lịch sử xem.' : 'No items in your recent history yet.'}</div></div>`;
        return;
      }

      host.innerHTML = items.map(p => {
        const activeVar = getCardVariants(p)[0] || { mainImg: getCardPrimaryImage(p) };
        const price = formatMoney(calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, p.capacity, p));
        const saleTag = isSaleActive(p) ? `<span class="product-badge-pill" style="background:rgba(225,29,72,.10);color:#e11d48;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đang giảm' : 'On sale'}</span>` : '';
        return `
          <article class="recently-viewed-card">
            <img src="${activeVar.mainImg || getCardPrimaryImage(p)}" alt="${escapeHtml(p.name)}">
            <div class="recently-viewed-card-body">
              <div style="display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap;">${saleTag}<span class="product-badge-pill" style="background:rgba(37,99,235,.10);color:var(--primary);">${escapeHtml(p.category || '')}</span></div>
              <h4>${escapeHtml(p.name)}</h4>
              <div class="meta">${escapeHtml(p.material || '')} · ${escapeHtml(p.capacity || '')}</div>
              <div class="price">${price}</div>
              <div class="recently-viewed-actions">
                <button type="button" class="btn secondary" onclick="triggerQuickview('${p.id}')">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Xem nhanh' : 'Quick view'}</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn primary" onclick="quickAddToCart('${p.id}', '${getDefaultSizeKey(p)}')">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mua' : 'Buy'}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </article>
        `;
      }).join('');
    }

    function updateFloatingActions() {
      const wrap = $('floatingQuickActions');
      if (!wrap) return;
      const total = Number($('cartBadgeCount')?.textContent || 0) || 0;
      const shouldShow = window.scrollY > 420 || total > 0 || (getRecentlyViewedIds().length > 0);
      wrap.classList.toggle('visible', shouldShow);
      const badge = $('floatingCartBadge');
      if (badge) badge.textContent = total > 99 ? '99+' : String(total);
    }

    function scrollToTopSmooth() {
      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    }

    function focusShopSearch() {
      const input = $('shopSearchInput') || $('productSearchInput');
      if (!input) return;
      input.focus({ preventScroll: true });
      input.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
    }

    function switchCardVariant(prodId, varIdx, element, event) {
      event.stopPropagation();
      const p = state.products.find(prod => prod.id === prodId);
      if(!p) return;
      cardSelectedVariantMap[prodId] = varIdx;
      element.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.swatch').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
      element.classList.add('active');
      const variants = getCardVariants(p);
      const chosen = variants[varIdx] || variants[0];
      const img = chosen?.mainImg || getCardPrimaryImage(p);
      $(`img-main-${prodId}`).src = img;
      $(`img-hover-${prodId}`).src = img;
      const priceEl = $(`price-current-${prodId}`);
      const oldPriceEl = $(`price-old-${prodId}`);
      if (priceEl) priceEl.textContent = formatMoney(getCardDisplayPrice(p, varIdx));
      if (oldPriceEl) oldPriceEl.textContent = formatMoney(getCardDisplayOldPrice(p, varIdx));
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('.filter-checkbox').forEach(cb => {
      cb.onchange = () => {
        const type = cb.dataset.type;
        if (!Array.isArray(state.activeFilters[type])) state.activeFilters[type] = [];
        if(cb.checked) state.activeFilters[type].push(cb.value);
        else state.activeFilters[type] = state.activeFilters[type].filter(item => item !== cb.value);
        renderProducts();
      };
    });

    $('sortSelect').onchange = (e) => {
      state.sortBy = e.target.value;
      renderProducts();
    };
    function renderSearchSuggestions() {
      const box = $('searchSuggestions');
      if (!box) return;
      const q = String(state.searchQuery || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (!q) {
        box.innerHTML = '';
        box.classList.remove('open');
        return;
      }
      const matches = state.products.filter(p => buildProductSearchHaystack(p).includes(q)).slice(0, 6);
      if (!matches.length) {
        box.innerHTML = `<div class="collection-empty" style="padding:12px;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Không tìm thấy gợi ý phù hợp.' : 'No matching suggestions.'}</div>`;
        box.classList.add('open');
        return;
      }
      box.innerHTML = matches.map(p => `
        <div class="search-suggestion-item" role="button" tabindex="0" onclick="triggerQuickview('${p.id}')">
          <img src="${getCardPrimaryImage(p)}" alt="${escapeHtml(p.name)}">
          <div>
            <strong>${escapeHtml(p.name)}</strong>
            <span>${escapeHtml(p.category)} · ${escapeHtml(p.material)}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="hint">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Xem' : 'Open'}</div>
        </div>
      `).join('');
      box.classList.add('open');
    }

    const searchInput = $('productSearchInput');
    if(searchInput) searchInput.oninput = e => {
      state.searchQuery = e.target.value || '';
      const mirror = $('shopSearchInput');
      if (mirror && mirror.value !== state.searchQuery) mirror.value = state.searchQuery;
      renderSearchSuggestions();
      renderProducts();
    };
    const shopSearchInput = $('shopSearchInput');
    if (shopSearchInput) shopSearchInput.oninput = e => {
      state.searchQuery = e.target.value || '';
      if (searchInput && searchInput.value !== state.searchQuery) searchInput.value = state.searchQuery;
      renderSearchSuggestions();
      renderProducts();
    };
    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const box = $('searchSuggestions');
      const wrap = $('shopSearchInput')?.closest('.shop-search-wrap');
      if (!box || !wrap) return;
      if (!wrap.contains(e.target) && !box.contains(e.target)) {
        box.classList.remove('open');
      }
    });

    // ==========================================================================
    // 6. QUICK VIEW MODAL & HỆ THỐNG ĐÁNH GIÁ (BÌNH LUẬN)
    // ==========================================================================
    function triggerQuickview(id) {
      const p = state.products.find(prod => prod.id === id);
      if(!p) return;
      addRecentlyViewed(id);

      state.currentQvProduct = p;
      state.qvSelectedSize = getDefaultSizeKey(p);
      state.qvImageIndex = 0;

      const initialVariants = getProductVariantsForSize(p, state.qvSelectedSize);
      const qvSwatches = $('qvSwatchesContainer');
      qvSwatches.innerHTML = '';
      initialVariants.forEach((v, idx) => {
        const dot = document.createElement('div');
        dot.className = `swatch ${idx === 0 ? 'active' : ''}`;
        dot.style.backgroundColor = v.colorHex;
        dot.onclick = () => {
          qvSwatches.querySelectorAll('.swatch').forEach(d => d.classList.remove('active'));
          dot.classList.add('active');
          state.qvSelectedColorIdx = idx;
          state.qvImageIndex = 0;
          updateQvPriceAndImage();
        };
        qvSwatches.appendChild(dot);
      });
      state.qvSelectedColorIdx = 0;

      $('qvTargetTitle').textContent = p.name;
      $('qvTargetCat').textContent = `${p.category} · ${p.material}`;
      $('qvTargetDesc').textContent = p.detailStory || p.details || p.shortDescription || p.description || '';
      const qvSubtitle = $('qvTargetSubtitle');
      if (qvSubtitle) qvSubtitle.textContent = p.detailSubtitle || 'Chi tiết sản phẩm được hiển thị theo màu và dung tích bạn chọn.';
      $('qvQtyText').textContent = '1';

      const topBadges = $('qvTopBadges');
      if (topBadges) {
        const badges = [];
        if (p.detailKicker) badges.push(`<span class="qv-status-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> ${escapeHtml(p.detailKicker)}</span>`);
        if (p.isBestSeller) badges.push(`<span class="qv-status-chip success"><i class="fa-solid fa-fire"></i> Bán chạy</span>`);
        if (p.isNewArrival) badges.push(`<span class="qv-status-chip warn"><i class="fa-solid fa-sparkles"></i> Mới</span>`);
        if (toNumber(p.stock, 0) > 0) badges.push(`<span class="qv-status-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-box"></i> Kho: ${escapeHtml(String(toNumber(p.stock, 0)))}</span>`);
        topBadges.innerHTML = badges.join('');
      }

      $('quickviewOverlay').classList.add('open');
      setQuickviewScrollLock(true);

      updateQvPriceAndImage();
      renderQvGallery();
      renderProductReviewsDOM();

      if(state.currentUser) {
        $('reviewInputFormBlock').style.display = 'block';
        $('reviewAuthAlert').style.display = 'none';
      } else {
        $('reviewInputFormBlock').style.display = 'none';
        $('reviewAuthAlert').style.display = 'block';
      }

      $('qvSelectedColorText').textContent = initialVariants[0]?.colorName || 'Tiêu chuẩn';
      $('qvWishBtn').classList.toggle('active', isWishlisted(p.id));
      $('qvCompareBtn').classList.toggle('active', isCompared(p.id));

      const sizeTabsContainer = $('qvSizeTabsContainer');
      sizeTabsContainer.innerHTML = '';
      getSizeOptionsForProduct(p).forEach(size => {
        const tab = document.createElement('div');
        tab.className = `size-tab ${String(size.key) === String(state.qvSelectedSize) ? 'active' : ''}`;
        tab.innerHTML = `<strong>${escapeHtml(size.label || size.key)}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(formatMoney(calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, size.key, p)))}</small>`;
        tab.onclick = () => {
          state.qvSelectedSize = size.key;
          state.qvSelectedColorIdx = 0;
          state.qvImageIndex = 0;
          sizeTabsContainer.querySelectorAll('.size-tab').forEach(d => d.classList.remove('active'));
          tab.classList.add('active');

          const variants = getProductVariantsForSize(p, size.key);
          qvSwatches.innerHTML = '';
          variants.forEach((v, idx) => {
            const dot = document.createElement('div');
            dot.className = `swatch ${idx === 0 ? 'active' : ''}`;
            dot.style.backgroundColor = v.colorHex;
            dot.onclick = () => {
              qvSwatches.querySelectorAll('.swatch').forEach(d => d.classList.remove('active'));
              dot.classList.add('active');
              state.qvSelectedColorIdx = idx;
              state.qvImageIndex = 0;
              updateQvPriceAndImage();
            };
            qvSwatches.appendChild(dot);
          });
          $('qvSelectedColorText').textContent = variants[0]?.colorName || 'Tiêu chuẩn';
          updateQvPriceAndImage();
        };
        sizeTabsContainer.appendChild(tab);
      });
    }

    function setQuickviewScrollLock(isOpen) {
      document.body.style.overflow = isOpen ? 'hidden' : '';
    }

    function updateQuickviewInfoCards(p) {
      const featureGrid = $('qvFeatureGrid');
      const metaRow = $('qvMetaRow');
      const topBadges = $('qvTopBadges');
      const summaryText = $('qvSummaryText');
      const mediaStockPill = $('qvMediaStockPill');
      const priceNote = $('qvPriceNote');
      const sizeText = $('qvSelectedSizeText');
      const mediaCaption = $('qvMediaCaption');
      if (!p) return;

      const sizeOpt = getSizeOption(p, state.qvSelectedSize);
      const qvSubtitle = $('qvTargetSubtitle');
      const variant = getPrimaryVariantForSize(p, state.qvSelectedSize, state.qvSelectedColorIdx);
      const stock = toNumber(p.stock, 0);
      const sold = toNumber(p.sold, 0);
      const rating = Number(p.rating || 5).toFixed(1);
      const colorText = variant?.colorName || 'Tiêu chuẩn';
      const sizeLabel = sizeOpt?.label || state.qvSelectedSize || '—';
      const sizeKey = sizeOpt?.key || state.qvSelectedSize || '—';
      const features = Array.isArray(p.quickviewHighlights) && p.quickviewHighlights.length
        ? p.quickviewHighlights
        : [
            { title: 'Chất liệu', value: p.material || 'Cao cấp' },
            { title: 'Phù hợp', value: p.suitableFor || p.category || 'Nhiều mục đích' },
            { title: 'Màu đang chọn', value: colorText },
            { title: 'Dung tích', value: sizeLabel }
          ];
      const metas = [
        `Đang xem: ${escapeHtml(colorText)}`,
        `Mức: ${escapeHtml(sizeKey)}`,
        `Màu: ${escapeHtml(String(getUniqueColorCount(p, state.qvSelectedSize) || 0))}`
      ];
      const summary = p.detailStory || p.details || p.shortDescription || p.description || 'Sản phẩm được tối ưu để xem nhanh với hình, màu và dung tích rõ ràng.';

      const ratingEl = $('qvTargetRating');
      if (ratingEl) ratingEl.innerHTML = `★ ${rating} <span style="color:var(--muted); font-weight:700;">· ${sold} lượt mua</span>`;

      if (sizeText) sizeText.textContent = `${sizeLabel}`;
      if (priceNote) priceNote.textContent = `${colorText} · ${sizeLabel} · Giá cập nhật tức thời theo lựa chọn.`;
      if (mediaCaption) mediaCaption.innerHTML = `<strong>${escapeHtml(colorText)}</strong> · ${escapeHtml(sizeLabel)} · ${escapeHtml(String(getUniqueColorCount(p, state.qvSelectedSize) || 0))} màu`;
      if (mediaStockPill) mediaStockPill.innerHTML = `<i class="fa-solid fa-box-open"></i> ${stock > 0 ? `Kho: ${escapeHtml(String(stock))}` : 'Hết hàng'}`;
      if (summaryText) summaryText.textContent = summary;
      if (qvSubtitle) qvSubtitle.textContent = p.detailSubtitle || 'Chi tiết sản phẩm được hiển thị theo màu và dung tích bạn chọn.';
      if (featureGrid) {
        featureGrid.innerHTML = features.map(item => `<div class="qv-feature-card"><span>${escapeHtml(item.title)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(item.value)}</strong></div>`).join('');
      }
      if (metaRow) {
        metaRow.innerHTML = metas.map(text => `<span class="qv-meta-chip">${text}</span>`).join('');
      }
      if (topBadges) {
        // giữ nguyên nếu đã có badge, chỉ bổ sung nếu thiếu thông tin
        if (!topBadges.innerHTML.trim()) {
          const badges = [];
          if (p.detailKicker) badges.push(`<span class="qv-status-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> ${escapeHtml(p.detailKicker)}</span>`);
          if (p.isBestSeller) badges.push(`<span class="qv-status-chip success"><i class="fa-solid fa-fire"></i> Bán chạy</span>`);
          if (p.isNewArrival) badges.push(`<span class="qv-status-chip warn"><i class="fa-solid fa-sparkles"></i> Mới</span>`);
          topBadges.innerHTML = badges.join('');
        }
      }
    }

    function updateQvPriceAndImage() {
      if(!state.currentQvProduct) return;
      const p = state.currentQvProduct;
      const calculatedPrice = calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, state.qvSelectedSize, p);
      const saleActive = isSaleActive(p);
      const discountPercent = getProductDiscountPercent(p);
      $('qvTargetPrice').textContent = formatMoney(calculatedPrice);
      $('qvTargetOldPrice').textContent = saleActive ? formatMoney(getSaleOldPriceBySize(p, state.qvSelectedSize)) : '';
      const discountEl = $('qvTargetDiscount');
      if (discountEl) {
        if (discountPercent > 0) {
          discountEl.textContent = `-${discountPercent}%`;
          discountEl.style.display = 'inline-flex';
        } else {
          discountEl.textContent = '';
          discountEl.style.display = 'none';
        }
      }
      const activeImg = getProductImages(p, state.qvSelectedSize, state.qvSelectedColorIdx)[state.qvImageIndex] || getPrimaryProductImage(p, state.qvSelectedSize, state.qvSelectedColorIdx);
      $('qvTargetImg').src = activeImg;
      updateQuickviewInfoCards(p);
      renderQvGallery();
    }

    function renderQvGallery() {
      const p = state.currentQvProduct;
      const dots = $('qvGalleryDots');
      if(!p || !dots) return;
      const gallery = getProductImages(p, state.qvSelectedSize, state.qvSelectedColorIdx);
      dots.innerHTML = gallery.map((src, idx) => `<div class="qv-gallery-dot ${idx === state.qvImageIndex ? 'active' : ''}" title="Ảnh ${idx + 1}" onclick="setQvImageIndex(${idx})"></div>`).join('');
      $('qvPrevImgBtn').onclick = () => setQvImageIndex(state.qvImageIndex - 1);
      $('qvNextImgBtn').onclick = () => setQvImageIndex(state.qvImageIndex + 1);
      if(!gallery.length) {
        dots.innerHTML = '';
        $('qvPrevImgBtn').style.display = 'none';
        $('qvNextImgBtn').style.display = 'none';
      } else {
        $('qvPrevImgBtn').style.display = gallery.length > 1 ? 'grid' : 'none';
        $('qvNextImgBtn').style.display = gallery.length > 1 ? 'grid' : 'none';
      }
    }

    function setQvImageIndex(idx) {
      const p = state.currentQvProduct;
      const gallery = getProductImages(p, state.qvSelectedSize, state.qvSelectedColorIdx);
      if(!gallery.length) return;
      state.qvImageIndex = (idx + gallery.length) % gallery.length;
      $('qvTargetImg').src = gallery[state.qvImageIndex];
      renderQvGallery();
    }

    function renderProductReviewsDOM() {
      const container = $('qvReviewsLogContainer');
      container.innerHTML = '';
      const p = state.currentQvProduct;
      if(!p.reviews || p.reviews.length === 0) {
        container.innerHTML = `<p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--muted); text-align:center; padding:10px;">Chưa có lượt bình luận nào.</p>`;
        return;
      }
      p.reviews.forEach((r, rIdx) => {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'review-item';
        div.innerHTML = `
          <div class="review-header">
            <img src="${r.avatar || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80'}" class="review-avatar">
            <span style="font-weight:700;">${r.username}</span>
            <div class="review-stars">${'★'.repeat(r.rating)}${'☆'.repeat(5-r.rating)}</div>
            ${(state.currentUser && state.currentUser.role === 'admin') ? `<button class="btn danger" style="padding:2px 6px; font-size:10px; margin-left:auto;" onclick="adminEraseReview(${rIdx})">Xóa</button>` : ''}
          </div>
          <p class="review-comment"><b>${r.rating}/5</b> · ${r.comment}</p>
        `;
        container.appendChild(div);
      });
    }

    // Xử lý chọn sao đánh giá
    document.querySelectorAll('#starPickerNode i').forEach(star => {
      star.onclick = () => {
        const val = parseInt(star.dataset.val);
        state.selectedRating = val;
        document.querySelectorAll('#starPickerNode i').forEach(s => {
          if(parseInt(s.dataset.val) <= val) s.classList.add('active');
          else s.classList.remove('active');
        });
      };
    });

    // Submit Review
    $('submitReviewBtn').onclick = () => {
      const text = $('reviewTextInput').value.trim();
      if(!text) return;
      if(!state.currentQvProduct.reviews) state.currentQvProduct.reviews = [];
      
      state.currentQvProduct.reviews.push({
        username: state.currentUser.username,
        rating: state.selectedRating,
        comment: text,
        avatar: state.currentUser.avatar || ""
      });

      // Tính toán lại rating trung bình
      const totalStars = state.currentQvProduct.reviews.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.rating, 0);
      state.currentQvProduct.rating = totalStars / state.currentQvProduct.reviews.length;

      syncStorage();
      renderProductReviewsDOM();
      renderProducts();
      $('reviewTextInput').value = '';
      state.selectedRating = 5;
      document.querySelectorAll('#starPickerNode i').forEach(s => s.classList.add('active'));
    };

    const DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG = {
      title: 'Vòng quay may mắn',
      description: 'Mỗi tài khoản có 1 lượt quay khi đăng nhập, và mỗi đơn hàng hoàn tất sẽ cộng thêm 1 lượt. Mỗi lượt quay tạo 1 mã voucher riêng cho đúng tài khoản đó.',
      titleColor: '#2563eb',
      infoColor: '#6b7280',
      spinLabel: 'QUAY',
      slots: [
        { label: '5% OFF', discount: 5, color: '#2563eb', weight: 20 },
        { label: '8% OFF', discount: 8, color: '#0ea5e9', weight: 18 },
        { label: '10% OFF', discount: 10, color: '#10b981', weight: 16 },
        { label: '12% OFF', discount: 12, color: '#f59e0b', weight: 14 },
        { label: '15% OFF', discount: 15, color: '#ef4444', weight: 12 },
        { label: '18% OFF', discount: 18, color: '#8b5cf6', weight: 10 },
        { label: '20% OFF', discount: 20, color: '#14b8a6', weight: 6 },
        { label: '25% OFF', discount: 25, color: '#e11d48', weight: 4 }
      ]
    };
    const WHEEL_CONFIG_KEY = 'al_wheel_config';

    let wheelCurrentAngle = 0;
    let wheelSpinning = false;

    function clampWheelCount(value) {
      return Math.max(1, Math.min(9, parseInt(value, 10) || 1));
    }

    function normalizeWheelConfig(raw = {}) {
      const source = Array.isArray(raw.slots) ? raw.slots : [];
      const count = clampWheelCount(raw.count || source.length || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.slots.length);
      const out = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        const s = source[i] || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.slots[i] || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.slots[0];
        out.push({
          label: String(s.label || `Ô quay ${i + 1}`).trim(),
          discount: Math.max(1, Math.min(90, parseInt(s.discount, 10) || 5)),
          color: String(s.color || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.slots[i % DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.slots.length].color || '#2563eb'),
          weight: Math.max(1, Math.min(100, parseInt(s.weight, 10) || 10))
        });
      }
      return {
        title: String(raw.title || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.title).trim(),
        description: String(raw.description || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.description).trim(),
        titleColor: String(raw.titleColor || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.titleColor || '#2563eb'),
        infoColor: String(raw.infoColor || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.infoColor || '#6b7280'),
        spinLabel: String(raw.spinLabel || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.spinLabel || 'QUAY').trim(),
        count,
        slots: out
      };
    }

    function loadWheelConfig() {
      try {
        return normalizeWheelConfig(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(WHEEL_CONFIG_KEY) || 'null') || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG);
      } catch (e) {
        return normalizeWheelConfig(DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG);
      }
    }

    function saveWheelConfig(config) {
      state.wheelConfig = normalizeWheelConfig(config || state.wheelConfig || loadWheelConfig());
      localStorage.setItem(WHEEL_CONFIG_KEY, JSON.stringify(state.wheelConfig));
      renderWheelUI(state.wheelConfig);
      if (state.currentUser && state.currentUser.role === 'admin') renderWheelAdminPanel(state.wheelConfig);
      showToast('Đã lưu cấu hình vòng quay.');
    }

    state.wheelConfig = loadWheelConfig();

    function ensureWheelCredits(user, grantWelcome = false) {
      if (!user) return user;
      const oldCredits = Number.isFinite(Number(user.spinCredits)) ? Number(user.spinCredits) : null;
      if (oldCredits === null) {
        const legacyCredits = Math.max(0, (Array.isArray(user.orders) ? user.orders.length : 0) - (Array.isArray(user.spinHistory) ? user.spinHistory.length : 0));
        user.spinCredits = legacyCredits;
      } else {
        user.spinCredits = Math.max(0, oldCredits);
      }
      if (user.role !== 'admin') {
        if (grantWelcome && !user.welcomeSpinGranted) {
          user.spinCredits = Math.max(1, Number(user.spinCredits) || 0);
          user.welcomeSpinGranted = true;
        }
      }
      return user;
    }

    function getWheelConfigSlots() {
      return normalizeWheelConfig(state.wheelConfig || loadWheelConfig()).slots;
    }

    function getWheelAvailableSpins() {
      if(!state.currentUser || state.currentUser.role === 'admin') return 0;
      return Math.max(0, Number(state.currentUser.spinCredits) || 0);
    }

    function getWheelAdminAccountOptions(selectedUsername = '') {
      const selected = String(selectedUsername || '').trim();
      const candidates = [];
      candidates.push({ username: ADMIN_CONFIG.userToken, label: `Admin (${ADMIN_CONFIG.userToken})` });
      (Array.isArray(state.users) ? state.users : []).forEach(u => {
        if (!u || !u.username) return;
        candidates.push({
          username: u.username,
          label: `${u.username}${u.role === 'admin' ? ' (admin)' : ''}${u.name ? ` · ${u.name}` : ''}`
        });
      });
      const seen = new Set();
      return ['<option value="">-- Chọn tài khoản --</option>'].concat(
        candidates.filter(item => {
          if (!item.username || seen.has(item.username)) return false;
          seen.add(item.username);
          return true;
        }).map(item => `
          <option value="${escapeHtml(item.username)}" ${item.username === selected ? 'selected' : ''}>${escapeHtml(item.label)}</option>
        `)
      ).join('');
    }

    function adminSetUserSpinCreditsExact(username, value, clampToWheelRange = false) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'cấp lượt quay khách hàng' : 'assign customer spin credits')) return false;
      const targetUsername = String(username || '').trim();
      if (!targetUsername) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Vui lòng chọn tài khoản.' : 'Please select an account.');
        return false;
      }
      const parsed = parseInt(value, 10);
      const exact = clampToWheelRange
        ? Math.max(1, Math.min(9, Number.isNaN(parsed) ? 1 : parsed))
        : Math.max(0, Number.isNaN(parsed) ? 0 : parsed);
      const isAdminAccount = targetUsername === ADMIN_CONFIG.userToken;
      const target = (Array.isArray(state.users) ? state.users : []).find(u => u.username === targetUsername);
      if (target) target.spinCredits = exact;
      if (isAdminAccount) {
        if (state.currentUser && state.currentUser.username === targetUsername) {
          state.currentUser.spinCredits = exact;
        }
      }
      syncStorage();
      renderAdminDashboard();
      showToast(`Đã cấp đúng ${exact} lượt quay cho ${targetUsername}.`);
      return true;
    }

    function getUserVoucherByCode(code) {
      if(!state.currentUser) return null;
      return (state.currentUser.vouchers || []).find(v => v.code.toUpperCase() === code.toUpperCase() && v.owner === state.currentUser.username);
    }

    function getCouponDiscountPercent(code) {
      const normalizedCode = String(code || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      if (!normalizedCode) return 0;
      if (COUPONS[normalizedCode] !== undefined) {
        return Math.max(0, Number(COUPONS[normalizedCode]) || 0) * 100;
      }
      const voucher = getUserVoucherByCode(normalizedCode);
      if (voucher && !voucher.used) {
        const rawDiscount = Number(voucher.discount);
        if (!Number.isFinite(rawDiscount) || rawDiscount <= 0) return 0;
        return rawDiscount <= 1 ? rawDiscount * 100 : rawDiscount;
      }
      return 0;
    }

    function weightedWheelPick(slots) {
      const pool = slots.map(s => Math.max(1, Number(s.weight) || 1));
      const total = pool.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
      let roll = Math.random() * total;
      for (let i = 0; i < slots.length; i++) {
        roll -= pool[i];
        if (roll <= 0) return i;
      }
      return Math.max(0, slots.length - 1);
    }

    function getWheelDraftConfigFromAdminPanel() {
      const countSelect = $('wheelAdminCount');
      const rowsWrap = $('wheelAdminRows');
      if (!countSelect || !rowsWrap) return normalizeWheelConfig(state.wheelConfig || loadWheelConfig());
      const count = clampWheelCount(countSelect.value);
      const labels = [...rowsWrap.querySelectorAll('.wheel-label-input')];
      const discounts = [...rowsWrap.querySelectorAll('.wheel-discount-input')];
      const colors = [...rowsWrap.querySelectorAll('.wheel-color-input')];
      const weights = [...rowsWrap.querySelectorAll('.wheel-weight-input')];
      const slots = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        slots.push({
          label: labels[i]?.value.trim() || `Ô quay ${i + 1}`,
          discount: Math.max(1, Math.min(90, parseInt(discounts[i]?.value, 10) || 5)),
          color: colors[i]?.value || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.slots[i % DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.slots.length].color,
          weight: Math.max(1, Math.min(100, parseInt(weights[i]?.value, 10) || 10))
        });
      }
      const titleInput = $('wheelAdminTitleInput');
      const descInput = $('wheelAdminDescInput');
      const titleColorInput = $('wheelAdminTitleColorInput');
      const infoColorInput = $('wheelAdminInfoColorInput');
      const spinLabelInput = $('wheelAdminSpinLabelInput');
      return normalizeWheelConfig({
        title: titleInput?.value || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.title,
        description: descInput?.value || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.description,
        titleColor: titleColorInput?.value || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.titleColor,
        infoColor: infoColorInput?.value || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.infoColor,
        spinLabel: spinLabelInput?.value || DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG.spinLabel,
        count,
        slots
      });
    }

    function renderWheelAdminPanel(draftConfig = null, selectedUsername = '', selectedCredits = 1) {
      if (!state.currentUser || state.currentUser.role !== 'admin') return;
      const host = $('adminProductPanel');
      if (!host) return;
      let card = $('wheelAdminCard');
      if (!card) {
        card = document.createElement('div');
        card.id = 'wheelAdminCard';
        card.className = 'wheel-admin-card';
        host.appendChild(card);
      }
      const cfg = normalizeWheelConfig(draftConfig || state.wheelConfig || loadWheelConfig());
      const selectedUser = String(selectedUsername || $('wheelAdminTargetUser')?.value || '').trim();
      const selectedCount = Math.max(1, Math.min(9, parseInt(selectedCredits, 10) || parseInt($('wheelAdminGrantCount')?.value, 10) || 1));
      card.innerHTML = `
        <div class="wheel-admin-head">
          <div>
            <h4>Chỉnh sửa vòng quay may mắn</h4>
            <div class="wheel-admin-note">Admin có thể chỉnh tiêu đề, mô tả, chữ nút, màu sắc, số ô từ 1 đến 9, tỷ lệ xuất hiện cho từng ô, và cấp đúng số lượt quay cho tài khoản đã chọn.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="badge-tag" style="background:rgba(0,240,255,0.12); color:var(--primary);">Số ô: ${cfg.count}</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:grid; gap:12px;">
          <div class="admin-grid-inputs" style="margin-bottom:0;">
            <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1 / span 1;">
              <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Số lượng ô quay</label>
              <select class="sort-select" id="wheelAdminCount">
                ${Array.from({length: 9}, (_, i) => `<option value="${i + 1}" ${cfg.count === i + 1 ? 'selected' : ''}>${i + 1} ô</option>`).join('')}
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:2 / -1;">
              <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Gợi ý</label>
              <div style="font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.55;">Chọn số ô trước, hệ thống sẽ tạo đúng số hàng nhập liệu bên dưới. Ô nào có màu gì thì phần chữ và viền hiển thị cũng theo màu đó.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1 / span 2;">
              <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Chọn tài khoản</label>
              <select class="sort-select" id="wheelAdminTargetUser">
                ${getWheelAdminAccountOptions(selectedUser)}
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:3 / span 1;">
              <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Số lượt quay (1-9)</label>
              <input class="form-control" id="wheelAdminGrantCount" type="number" min="1" max="9" value="${selectedCount}">
            </div>
            <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:4 / -1; align-self:end;">
              <div class="wheel-admin-note">Chọn tài khoản rồi bấm Lưu & xác nhận để cấp đúng số lượt quay cho tài khoản đó.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1 / -1; display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap:10px;">
              <div>
                <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Tiêu đề vòng quay</label>
                <input class="form-control" id="wheelAdminTitleInput" value="${String(cfg.title).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}">
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Mô tả vòng quay</label>
                <input class="form-control" id="wheelAdminDescInput" value="${String(cfg.description).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}">
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Màu tiêu đề</label>
                <input class="form-control" id="wheelAdminTitleColorInput" type="color" value="${cfg.titleColor}">
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Màu nội dung</label>
                <input class="form-control" id="wheelAdminInfoColorInput" type="color" value="${cfg.infoColor}">
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Chữ nút quay</label>
                <input class="form-control" id="wheelAdminSpinLabelInput" value="${String(cfg.spinLabel).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}">
              </div>
              <div style="grid-column:2 / -1; align-self:end;">
                <div class="wheel-admin-note" id="wheelAdminTotalWeight">Tổng tỷ lệ: ${cfg.slots.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (Number(s.weight) || 0), 0)}%</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="wheelAdminRows" style="display:grid; gap:10px;"></div>
          <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center;">
            <button class="btn primary" type="button" id="wheelAdminSaveBtn">Lưu & xác nhận</button>
            <button class="btn secondary" type="button" id="wheelAdminResetBtn">Khôi phục mặc định</button>
