            <button class="btn success" type="button" id="wheelAdminOpenBtn">Mở vòng quay</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
      const rowsWrap = $('wheelAdminRows');
      rowsWrap.innerHTML = cfg.slots.map((s, idx) => `
        <div style="border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:18px; padding:12px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02); display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 100px 110px 100px; gap:10px; align-items:end;">
          <div class="form-group" style="margin:0;">
            <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Ô ${idx + 1} · Chữ hiển thị</label>
            <input class="form-control wheel-label-input" data-idx="${idx}" value="${String(s.label).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" style="margin:0;">
            <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Giảm giá %</label>
            <input class="form-control wheel-discount-input" type="number" min="1" max="90" data-idx="${idx}" value="${s.discount}">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" style="margin:0;">
            <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Màu</label>
            <input class="form-control wheel-color-input" type="color" data-idx="${idx}" value="${s.color}">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" style="margin:0;">
            <label style="display:block; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--muted);">Tỷ lệ</label>
            <input class="form-control wheel-weight-input" type="number" min="1" max="100" data-idx="${idx}" value="${s.weight}">
          </div>
        </div>
      `).join('');
      const totalEl = $('wheelAdminTotalWeight');
      if (totalEl) totalEl.textContent = `Tổng tỷ lệ: ${cfg.slots.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (Number(s.weight) || 0), 0)}%`;

      $('wheelAdminSaveBtn').onclick = () => {
        const draft = getWheelDraftConfigFromAdminPanel();
        const targetUsername = String($('wheelAdminTargetUser')?.value || '').trim();
        const targetCredits = Math.max(1, Math.min(9, parseInt($('wheelAdminGrantCount')?.value, 10) || 1));
        saveWheelConfig(draft);
        if (targetUsername) {
          adminSetUserSpinCreditsExact(targetUsername, targetCredits, true);
          renderWheelAdminPanel(state.wheelConfig, targetUsername, targetCredits);
        } else {
          renderWheelAdminPanel(state.wheelConfig, '', targetCredits);
        }
      };

      $('wheelAdminResetBtn').onclick = () => {
        saveWheelConfig(DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG);
        renderWheelAdminPanel(DEFAULT_WHEEL_CONFIG, '', 1);
      };

      $('wheelAdminCount').onchange = () => renderWheelAdminPanel(getWheelDraftConfigFromAdminPanel(), $('wheelAdminTargetUser')?.value || '', $('wheelAdminGrantCount')?.value || 1);
      $('wheelAdminOpenBtn').onclick = () => openWheelModal();
      ['wheelAdminTitleInput','wheelAdminDescInput','wheelAdminTitleColorInput','wheelAdminInfoColorInput','wheelAdminSpinLabelInput']
        .forEach(id => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.oninput = () => renderWheelUI(getWheelDraftConfigFromAdminPanel()); });
      renderWheelUI(cfg);
    }

    function renderWheelUI(config = null) {
      const face = $('wheelFace');
      const list = $('wheelPrizeList');
      const labelLayer = $('wheelLabelLayer');
      if(!face || !list || !labelLayer) return;
      const cfg = normalizeWheelConfig(config || state.wheelConfig || loadWheelConfig());
      const seg = 360 / cfg.slots.length;
      const titleEl = $('wheelModalTitle');
      const descEl = $('wheelModalDesc');
      const spinBtn = $('wheelSpinBtn');
      if (titleEl) {
        titleEl.textContent = cfg.title;
        titleEl.style.color = cfg.titleColor;
      }
      if (descEl) {
        descEl.textContent = cfg.description;
        descEl.style.color = cfg.infoColor;
      }
      if (spinBtn) spinBtn.textContent = cfg.spinLabel || 'QUAY';
      face.style.background = `conic-gradient(${cfg.slots.map((p, i) => `${p.color} ${i * seg}deg ${(i + 1) * seg}deg`).join(', ')})`;
      labelLayer.innerHTML = cfg.slots.map((p, i) => {
        const angle = (i * seg) + (seg / 2) - 90;
        const color = p.color;
        return `<div class="wheel-label-item" style="--label-color:${color}; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(${angle}deg) translateY(-105px) rotate(${-angle}deg); border-color:${color}; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px ${color} inset, 0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.12);">
          ${p.label}
          <small>${p.discount}% · ${p.weight}%</small>
        </div>`;
      }).join('');
      list.innerHTML = cfg.slots.map(p => `<div class="wheel-prize-chip" style="--chip-color:${p.color}; border-color:${p.color};"><b>${p.label}</b><span style="color:${p.color}; font-weight:800;">${p.discount}% giảm</span> · Tỷ lệ ${p.weight}%</div>`).join('');
      updateWheelInfo('', '', cfg);
      if (spinBtn) spinBtn.disabled = getWheelAvailableSpins() <= 0 || wheelSpinning;
    }

    function updateWheelInfo(resultText = '', prizeColor = '', config = null) {
      const cfg = normalizeWheelConfig(config || state.wheelConfig || loadWheelConfig());
      const isAdmin = !!(state.currentUser && state.currentUser.role === 'admin');
      $('wheelSpinCount').textContent = isAdmin ? 'Lượt quay: Xem trước' : `Lượt quay: ${getWheelAvailableSpins()}`;
      $('wheelUserTag').textContent = `Tài khoản: ${state.currentUser ? state.currentUser.username : '-'}`;
      const box = $('wheelResultBox');
      if (box) {
        box.style.borderColor = prizeColor || 'var(--line)';
        box.style.boxShadow = prizeColor ? `0 0 0 2px ${prizeColor}22, 0 14px 24px ${prizeColor}14` : '';
        box.style.color = prizeColor || cfg.infoColor;
      }
      if(resultText) {
        $('wheelResultBox').innerHTML = resultText;
      } else {
        $('wheelResultBox').innerHTML = `<strong style="color:${cfg.titleColor};">Kết quả:</strong><div style="margin-top:6px; color:${cfg.infoColor};">Bấm ${cfg.spinLabel || 'QUAY'} để nhận ưu đãi. Mỗi tài khoản có 1 lượt khi đăng nhập và thêm lượt khi hoàn tất đơn hàng.</div>`;
      }
    }

    function setWheelModalScrollLock(isOpen) {
      document.body.style.overflow = isOpen ? 'hidden' : '';
    }

    function openWheelModal() {
      if(!state.currentUser) {
        state.pendingWheelOpen = true;
        showToast(msg('loginReq'));
        authOverlay.classList.add('open');
        showCorrectAuthView();
        return;
      }

      renderWheelUI();
      $('wheelOverlay').classList.add('open');
      setWheelModalScrollLock(true);

      if(state.currentUser.role === 'admin') {
        updateWheelInfo(`<strong>Chế độ quản trị:</strong><div style="margin-top:6px; color:var(--muted);">Admin có thể mở vòng quay để xem trước và chỉnh trực tiếp trong khung quản trị. Mỗi ô sẽ hiển thị đúng màu, đúng chữ, đúng tỷ lệ đã cài.</div>`);
      } else if(getWheelAvailableSpins() <= 0) {
        showToast('Bạn chưa có lượt quay. Hệ thống sẽ tự cộng 1 lượt khi bạn đăng nhập, hoặc thêm lượt khi đơn hàng hoàn tất.');
      }

      $('wheelSpinBtn').disabled = state.currentUser?.role !== 'admin' && getWheelAvailableSpins() <= 0;
    }

    function closeWheelModal() {
      $('wheelOverlay').classList.remove('open');
      setWheelModalScrollLock(false);
    }

    function generateVoucherCode() {
      const letters = 'ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789';
      let code = 'ALX-';
      for(let i = 0; i < 8; i++) code += letters[Math.floor(Math.random() * letters.length)];
      return code;
    }

    function spinWheel() {
      if (wheelSpinning) return;
      if (!state.currentUser) return;
      const isAdmin = state.currentUser.role === 'admin';
      if (!isAdmin && getWheelAvailableSpins() <= 0) {
        updateWheelInfo('<strong>Kết quả:</strong><div style="margin-top:6px; color:var(--muted);">Bạn chưa có lượt quay hợp lệ.</div>');
        return;
      }

      wheelSpinning = true;
      $('wheelSpinBtn').disabled = true;
      const cfg = normalizeWheelConfig(state.wheelConfig || loadWheelConfig());
      const idx = weightedWheelPick(cfg.slots);
      const segment = 360 / cfg.slots.length;
      const landing = 360 * 5 + (360 - (idx * segment + segment / 2));
      wheelCurrentAngle = wheelCurrentAngle + landing;
      $('wheelFace').style.transform = `rotate(${wheelCurrentAngle}deg)`;

      const prize = cfg.slots[idx];
      setTimeout(() => {
        const code = generateVoucherCode();
        const voucher = {
          code,
          discount: prize.discount / 100,
          label: prize.label,
          color: prize.color,
          used: false,
          owner: state.currentUser.username,
          createdAt: Date.now()
        };
        if(!state.currentUser.vouchers) state.currentUser.vouchers = [];
        if(!state.currentUser.spinHistory) state.currentUser.spinHistory = [];
        state.currentUser.vouchers.push(voucher);
        state.currentUser.spinHistory.push({ code, prize: prize.label, color: prize.color, createdAt: Date.now() });
        if (state.currentUser.role !== 'admin') {
          state.currentUser.spinCredits = Math.max(0, Number(state.currentUser.spinCredits) - 1);
        }
        syncStorage();
        updateWheelInfo(`<strong>Kết quả:</strong> <span style="color:${prize.color}; font-weight:900;">${prize.label}</span><div style="margin-top:6px; color:var(--muted);">Mã voucher của bạn: <strong style="color:${prize.color};">${code}</strong><br>Màu và viền của ô trúng sẽ đồng bộ theo màu bạn đã chọn trong phần admin.</div>`, prize.color, cfg);
        renderCart();
        renderAdminDashboard();
        wheelSpinning = false;
        $('wheelSpinBtn').disabled = state.currentUser?.role !== 'admin' && getWheelAvailableSpins() <= 0;
      }, 5100);
    }

    function adminEraseReview(idx) {
      if(!confirm("Xác nhận xóa bình luận này của khách hàng?")) return;
      state.currentQvProduct.reviews.splice(idx, 1);
      if(state.currentQvProduct.reviews.length > 0) {
        const totalStars = state.currentQvProduct.reviews.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.rating, 0);
        state.currentQvProduct.rating = totalStars / state.currentQvProduct.reviews.length;
      } else {
        state.currentQvProduct.rating = 5.0;
      }
      syncStorage();
      renderProductReviewsDOM();
      renderProducts();
    }

    $('qvCloseBtn').onclick = () => { $('quickviewOverlay').classList.remove('open'); setQuickviewScrollLock(false); };
    $('quickviewOverlay').onclick = (e) => { if (e.target && e.target.id === 'quickviewOverlay') { $('quickviewOverlay').classList.remove('open'); setQuickviewScrollLock(false); } };
    $('wheelCloseBtn').onclick = closeWheelModal;
    $('wheelSpinBtn').onclick = spinWheel;
    $('wheelOverlay').onclick = (e) => { if (e.target && e.target.id === 'wheelOverlay') closeWheelModal(); };
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape' && $('wheelOverlay')?.classList.contains('open')) closeWheelModal(); });
    $('qvIncBtn').onclick = () => { $('qvQtyText').textContent = parseInt($('qvQtyText').textContent) + 1; };
    $('qvDecBtn').onclick = () => { let q = parseInt($('qvQtyText').textContent); if(q > 1) $('qvQtyText').textContent = q - 1; };

    $('qvAddToCartBtn').onclick = () => {
      if(!state.currentQvProduct) return;
      addToCartFlow(state.currentQvProduct.id, state.qvSelectedColorIdx, state.qvSelectedSize, parseInt($('qvQtyText').textContent));
      $('quickviewOverlay').classList.remove('open');
      setQuickviewScrollLock(false);
    };
    $('qvWishBtn').onclick = () => { if (state.currentQvProduct) toggleWishlist(state.currentQvProduct.id); $('qvWishBtn')?.classList.toggle('active', isWishlisted(state.currentQvProduct?.id)); };
    $('qvCompareBtn').onclick = () => { if (state.currentQvProduct) toggleCompare(state.currentQvProduct.id); $('qvCompareBtn')?.classList.toggle('active', isCompared(state.currentQvProduct?.id)); };

    $('collectionToggleBtn').onclick = () => openCollectionModal('wishlist');
    $('collectionCloseBtn').onclick = closeCollectionModal;
    $('collectionOverlay').onclick = (e) => { if (e.target && e.target.id === 'collectionOverlay') closeCollectionModal(); };
    $('collectionTabWishlistBtn').onclick = () => activateCollectionTab('wishlist');
    $('collectionTabCompareBtn').onclick = () => activateCollectionTab('compare');

    // ==========================================================================
    // 7. HỆ THỐNG GIỎ HÀNG BẢO MẬT & ÉP BUỘC ĐĂNG NHẬP
    // ==========================================================================
    function quickAddToCart(id, defaultSize) {
      const currentIdx = cardSelectedVariantMap[id] || 0;
      addToCartFlow(id, currentIdx, defaultSize, 1);
    }

    function addToCartFlow(id, varIdx, size, qty) {
      if (!state.currentUser) {
        showToast(msg('loginReq'));
        authOverlay.classList.add('open');
        showCorrectAuthView();
        return;
      }
      // Admin được phép mua hàng giống tài khoản khách hàng

      const p = state.products.find(prod => prod.id === id);
      if(!p) return;
      
      if (!state.currentUser.cart) state.currentUser.cart = [];
      
      const actualPrice = calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, size, p);
      const cartKey = `${id}_${varIdx}_${size}`;
      const existing = state.currentUser.cart.find(item => item.cartKey === cartKey);
      
      if(existing) {
        existing.qty += qty;
      } else {
        const sizeOpt = getSizeOption(p, size);
        state.currentUser.cart.push({
          cartKey, id, varIdx, size, qty,
          sizeLabel: sizeOpt ? sizeOpt.label : size,
          name: p.name,
          price: actualPrice,
          colorName: p.variants[varIdx].colorName,
          image: p.variants[varIdx].mainImg
        });
      }
      
      syncStorage();
      renderCart();
      openCartDrawer();
      showToast(msg('addCartOk'));
    }

    function changeCartQty(cartKey, offset) {
      if (!state.currentUser || !state.currentUser.cart) return;
      const item = state.currentUser.cart.find(i => i.cartKey === cartKey);
      if(!item) return;
      item.qty += offset;
      if(item.qty <= 0) state.currentUser.cart = state.currentUser.cart.filter(i => i.cartKey !== cartKey);
      syncStorage();
      renderCart();
    }

    function removeCartItem(cartKey) {
      if (!state.currentUser || !state.currentUser.cart) return;
      state.currentUser.cart = state.currentUser.cart.filter(i => i.cartKey !== cartKey);
      syncStorage();
      renderCart();
      showToast(msg('delCartOk'));
    }

    $('applyCouponBtn').onclick = () => {
      const code = $('couponInput').value.trim().toUpperCase();
      if(!code) { showToast(msg('couponErr')); return; }
      const userVoucher = getUserVoucherByCode(code);
      if(userVoucher && !userVoucher.used) {
        state.currentCoupon = code;
        showToast(msg('couponOk'));
        renderCart();
        return;
      }
      if(COUPONS[code] !== undefined) {
        state.currentCoupon = code;
        showToast(msg('couponOk'));
        renderCart();
      } else {
        showToast(msg('couponErr'));
      }
    };

    function syncCartSummaryToggleUI() {
      const drawer = $('cartDrawer');
      const btn = $('cartSummaryToggleBtn');
      if (!drawer || !btn) return;
      const isOpen = drawer.classList.contains('summary-open');
      const icon = btn.querySelector('i');
      if (icon) icon.className = isOpen ? 'fa-solid fa-eye-slash' : 'fa-solid fa-eye';
      btn.setAttribute('aria-label', isOpen ? 'Ẩn phần tóm tắt đơn hàng' : 'Hiển thị phần tóm tắt đơn hàng');
      btn.title = isOpen ? 'Ẩn phần tóm tắt đơn hàng' : 'Hiển thị phần tóm tắt đơn hàng';
    }
    function openCartSummary() {
      $('cartDrawer').classList.add('summary-open');
      syncCartSummaryToggleUI();
    }
    function closeCartSummary() {
      $('cartDrawer').classList.remove('summary-open');
      syncCartSummaryToggleUI();
    }
    function openCartDrawer() { $('cartDrawer').classList.add('open'); $('cartOverlay').classList.add('open'); closeCartSummary(); }
    function closeCartDrawer() { $('cartDrawer').classList.remove('open'); $('cartOverlay').classList.remove('open'); closeCartSummary(); }
    $('cartToggleBtn').onclick = openCartDrawer;
    $('cartCloseBtn').onclick = closeCartDrawer;
    $('cartOverlay').onclick = closeCartDrawer;
    $('cartSummaryToggleBtn').onclick = () => {
      const drawer = $('cartDrawer');
      if (!drawer) return;
      drawer.classList.toggle('summary-open');
      syncCartSummaryToggleUI();
    };
    syncCartSummaryToggleUI();

    $('deliveryToggleBtn').onclick = openDeliveryDrawer;
    $('deliveryCloseBtn').onclick = closeDeliveryDrawer;
    $('deliveryOverlay').onclick = closeDeliveryDrawer;

    // ==========================================================================
    // 8. ĐIỀU HƯỚNG MUA HÀNG - RÀ NẠP HỒ SƠ & BIỂU MẪU ĐẶT HÀNG
    // ==========================================================================
    $('checkoutTriggerBtn').onclick = () => {
      if(!state.currentUser || !state.currentUser.cart || state.currentUser.cart.length === 0) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? "Giỏ hàng rỗng!" : "Workspace empty!");
        return;
      }
      
      // BẮT BUỘC ĐIỀN THÔNG TIN TRƯỚC KHI MUA HÀNG
      if(!state.currentUser.name || !state.currentUser.phone || !state.currentUser.address) {
        showToast(msg('profileReq'));
        closeCartDrawer();
        authOverlay.classList.add('open');
        showCorrectAuthView();
        return;
      }

      closeCartDrawer();
      
      $('billingName').value = state.currentUser.name;
      $('billingPhone').value = state.currentUser.phone;
      $('billingAddress').value = state.currentUser.address;
      $('checkoutFormContent').style.display = "block";
      $('checkoutSuccessContent').style.display = "none";
      const codRadio = document.querySelector('input[name="paymentMethod"][value="cod"]');
      if (codRadio) codRadio.checked = true;
      refreshPaymentUI();
      $('checkoutOverlay').classList.add('open');
    };
    
    $('checkoutCloseBtn').onclick = () => $('checkoutOverlay').classList.remove('open');

    function refreshPaymentUI() {
      const bankMode = document.querySelector('input[name="paymentMethod"][value="bank"]').checked;
      $('checkoutBankBox').style.display = bankMode ? 'block' : 'none';
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('input[name="paymentMethod"]').forEach(r => {
      r.onchange = refreshPaymentUI;
    });
    refreshPaymentUI();

    $('billingForm').onsubmit = () => {
      let globalOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_global_orders')) || [];
      const selectedPayment = document.querySelector('input[name="paymentMethod"]:checked')?.value || 'cod';
const defaultDays = selectedPayment === 'bank' ? 5 : 3;
      const newOrder = {
        orderId: `ALX-${Date.now().toString().slice(-6)}`,
        userOwner: state.currentUser.username,
        userAvatar: state.currentUser.avatar || "",
        customerName: state.currentUser.name,
        customerPhone: state.currentUser.phone,
        customerAddress: state.currentUser.address,
        paymentMethod: selectedPayment,
        bankName: selectedPayment === 'bank' ? $('checkoutBankSelect').value : "",
        items: [...state.currentUser.cart],
        totalAmount: $('sumTotal').textContent,
        status: selectedPayment === 'bank' ? "Chờ xác nhận ngân hàng" : "Đang giao",
        createdAt: Date.now(),
        estimatedDays: defaultDays,
        confirmedAt: null,
        deliveryDate: null,
};

      // Trừ số lượng kho và tăng lượt bán
      newOrder.items.forEach(cartItem => {
         const targetProd = state.products.find(p => p.id === cartItem.id);
         if(targetProd) {
            if(targetProd.stock !== undefined) {
               targetProd.stock = Math.max(0, targetProd.stock - cartItem.qty);
            }
            targetProd.sold = (targetProd.sold || 0) + cartItem.qty;
         }
      });

      globalOrders.push(newOrder);
      localStorage.setItem('al_global_orders', JSON.stringify(globalOrders));

      if (!state.currentUser.orders) state.currentUser.orders = [];
      state.currentUser.orders.push(newOrder);
      state.currentUser.cart = [];
state.currentUser.spinCredits = Math.max(0, Number(state.currentUser.spinCredits) || 0) + 1;

      const usedVoucher = state.currentCoupon ? getUserVoucherByCode(state.currentCoupon) : null;
      if (usedVoucher) {
        usedVoucher.used = true;
        if(!state.currentUser.usedCouponCodes) state.currentUser.usedCouponCodes = [];
        state.currentUser.usedCouponCodes.push(usedVoucher.code);
      }
      state.currentCoupon = null;

      syncStorage();
      renderCart();
      renderProducts();
      renderAdminDashboard();

      $('checkoutFormContent').style.display = "none";
      $('checkoutSuccessContent').style.display = "block";
      initConfetti();
    };

    $('successCloseBtn').onclick = () => { $('checkoutOverlay').classList.remove('open'); stopConfetti(); };

    // CANVAS CONFETTI SYSTEM
    let confettiActive = false; let confettiParticles = [];
    const canvas = $('confetti-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

    function initConfetti() {
      canvas.style.display = "block"; canvas.width = window.innerWidth; canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
      confettiParticles = []; confettiActive = true;
      for (let i = 0; i < 120; i++) {
        confettiParticles.push({
          x: Math.random() * canvas.width, y: Math.random() * canvas.height - canvas.height,
          r: Math.random() * 5 + 3, d: Math.random() * canvas.height,
          color: `hsl(${Math.random() * 360}, 100%, 50%)`, tilt: Math.random() * 10 - 5,
          tiltAngleIncremental: Math.random() * 0.06 + 0.02, tiltAngle: 0
        });
      }
      requestAnimationFrame(updateConfettiLoop);
    }

    function updateConfettiLoop() {
      if(!confettiActive) return; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      confettiParticles.forEach((p, idx) => {
        p.tiltAngle += p.tiltAngleIncremental; p.y += (Math.cos(p.d) + 3 + p.r / 2) / 2; p.x += Math.sin(p.tiltAngle); p.tilt = Math.sin(p.tiltAngle - idx / 3) * 12;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.lineWidth = p.r; ctx.strokeStyle = p.color; ctx.moveTo(p.x + p.tilt + p.r / 2, p.y); ctx.lineTo(p.x + p.tilt, p.y + p.tilt + p.r / 2); ctx.stroke();
        if (p.y > canvas.height) { p.x = Math.random() * canvas.width; p.y = -20; }
      });
      requestAnimationFrame(updateConfettiLoop);
    }
    function stopConfetti() { confettiActive = false; canvas.style.display = "none"; }

    // ==========================================================================
    // 9. CORE CHAT ENGINE (ĐÁM MÂY TIN NHẮN TỰ ĐỘNG CHO KHÁCH & ADMIN)
    // ==========================================================================
    const chatTrigger = $('chatCloudTrigger');
    const chatWindow = $('chatWindowNode');
    
    chatTrigger.onclick = () => {
      if(!state.currentUser) {
         showToast(msg('loginReq'));
         authOverlay.classList.add('open');
         showCorrectAuthView();
         return;
      }
      chatWindow.classList.toggle('open');
      if(chatWindow.classList.contains('open')) {
         clearChatUnreadCount();
         updateChatInterface();
      }
    };
    
    $('chatCloseBtnNode').onclick = () => chatWindow.classList.remove('open');

    // Chức năng gắn sản phẩm vào chat từ Quickview
    $('qvAttachToChatBtn').onclick = () => {
       if(!state.currentUser) {
          showToast(msg('loginReq'));
          return;
       }
       state.chatAttachment = {
          type: 'product',
          name: state.currentQvProduct.name,
          image: state.currentQvProduct.variants[state.qvSelectedColorIdx].mainImg,
          size: state.qvSelectedSize
       };
       showToast("Đã đính kèm sản phẩm vào khung chat đám mây!");
       $('quickviewOverlay').classList.remove('open'); setQuickviewScrollLock(false);
       chatWindow.classList.add('open');
       updateChatInterface();
    };

    function getMessagesFromStorage() {
       return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_chat_messages')) || [];
    }

    function saveMessagesToStorage(msgs) {
       localStorage.setItem('al_chat_messages', JSON.stringify(msgs));
    }

    function pushNewChatMessage(text, imgUrl = "") {
       if(!state.currentUser) return;
       let msgs = getMessagesFromStorage();
       
       const newMsg = {
          sender: state.currentUser.username,
          senderAvatar: state.currentUser.avatar || "",
          receiver: state.currentUser.role === 'admin' ? state.activeChatAdminUser : 'admin',
          text: text,
          image: imgUrl,
          product: state.chatAttachment,
          timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'}),
          read: false
       };

       msgs.push(newMsg);
       saveMessagesToStorage(msgs);
       state.chatAttachment = null; // Clear product attachment after send
       state.chatImageAttachment = null; // Clear image attachment after send
       updateChatInterface();
       triggerCloudNotification(newMsg);
    }

    function triggerCloudNotification(msgObj) {
       // Phát tín hiệu thông báo dạng mây nổi nếu đối phương đang không mở cửa sổ
       let unreadCount = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('al_unread_chat_' + msgObj.receiver)) || 0;
       localStorage.setItem('al_unread_chat_' + msgObj.receiver, unreadCount + 1);
       updateUnreadBadgeDOM();
       showToast(`[Tin nhắn mới] ${msgObj.sender}: ${msgObj.text || 'Đã gửi một tệp đính kèm'}`);
    }

    function updateUnreadBadgeDOM() {
       if(!state.currentUser) return;
       let count = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('al_unread_chat_' + state.currentUser.username)) || 0;
       if(count > 0) {
          $('chatUnreadBadge').textContent = count;
          $('chatUnreadBadge').style.display = 'grid';
       } else {
          $('chatUnreadBadge').style.display = 'none';
       }
    }

    function markVisibleMessagesRead() {
       if(!state.currentUser) return;
       const msgs = getMessagesFromStorage();
       let changed = false;
       msgs.forEach(m => {
          const relevant = state.currentUser.role === 'admin'
            ? (m.sender === state.activeChatAdminUser && m.receiver === 'admin')
            : (m.sender === 'admin' && m.receiver === state.currentUser.username);
          if(relevant && !m.read) {
             m.read = true;
             m.readAt = new Date().toISOString();
             changed = true;
          }
       });
       if(changed) saveMessagesToStorage(msgs);
    }

    function clearChatUnreadCount() {
       if(!state.currentUser) return;
       localStorage.setItem('al_unread_chat_' + state.currentUser.username, 0);
       updateUnreadBadgeDOM();
    }

    function updateChatInterface() {
       const container = $('chatInterfaceWrapper');
       if(!container) return;
       container.innerHTML = '';

       if(!state.currentUser) return;

       // GIAO DIỆN CHAT DÀNH CHO ADMIN (CHIA ĐÔI MÀN HÌNH CHAT VỚI NHIỀU KHÁCH)
       if(state.currentUser.role === 'admin') {
          $('chatHeaderTitle').textContent = "AquaLuxe Master Hub";
          let msgs = getMessagesFromStorage();

          // Lọc danh sách các user đã từng nhắn tin
          let activeUsersSet = new Set();
          msgs.forEach(m => {
             if(m.sender !== 'admin') activeUsersSet.add(m.sender);
             if(m.receiver !== 'admin') activeUsersSet.add(m.receiver);
          });
          let activeUsers = Array.from(activeUsersSet);
          if(!state.activeChatAdminUser && activeUsers.length > 0) {
             state.activeChatAdminUser = activeUsers[0];
          }

          const layout = document.createElement('div');
          layout.className = 'admin-chat-layout';

          // Cột bên trái: Danh sách user
          const leftBar = document.createElement('div');
          leftBar.className = 'admin-chat-users-list';
          activeUsers.forEach(uName => {
             const userMsg = msgs.find(m => m.sender === uName) || msgs.find(m => m.receiver === uName) || {};
             const tab = document.createElement('div');
             tab.className = `admin-chat-user-tab ${state.activeChatAdminUser === uName ? 'active' : ''}`;
             tab.innerHTML = `
                <img src="${userMsg.senderAvatar || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80'}">
                <span>${uName}</span>
                <div class="admin-chat-user-delete" title="Xóa cuộc trò chuyện" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); deleteChatThread('${uName}')">×</div>
             `;
             tab.onclick = () => {
                state.activeChatAdminUser = uName;
                updateChatInterface();
             };
             leftBar.appendChild(tab);
          });
          layout.appendChild(leftBar);

          // Cột bên phải: Nội dung chat chat với user được chọn
          const rightPane = document.createElement('div');
          rightPane.style = 'display:flex; flex-direction:column; overflow:hidden; flex:1;';

          const bodyLog = document.createElement('div');
          bodyLog.className = 'chat-body';

          let filteredMsgs = msgs.filter(m => 
             (m.sender === 'admin' && m.receiver === state.activeChatAdminUser) ||
             (m.sender === state.activeChatAdminUser && m.receiver === 'admin')
          );

          filteredMsgs.forEach(m => {
             renderSingleMessageRow(bodyLog, m);
          });
          rightPane.appendChild(bodyLog);
          renderChatFooterDOM(rightPane);

          layout.appendChild(rightPane);
          container.appendChild(layout);
          markVisibleMessagesRead();
          bodyLog.scrollTop = bodyLog.scrollHeight;

       } else {
          // GIAO DIỆN CHAT DÀNH CHO KHÁCH HÀNG THƯỜNG
          $('chatHeaderTitle').textContent = "AquaLuxe Premium Support";
          const bodyLog = document.createElement('div');
          bodyLog.className = 'chat-body';

          let msgs = getMessagesFromStorage().filter(m => m.sender === state.currentUser.username || m.receiver === state.currentUser.username);
          msgs.forEach(m => {
             renderSingleMessageRow(bodyLog, m);
          });
          container.appendChild(bodyLog);
          renderChatFooterDOM(container);
          markVisibleMessagesRead();
          bodyLog.scrollTop = bodyLog.scrollHeight;
       }
    }

    function renderSingleMessageRow(bodyContainer, m) {
       const isOutgoing = m.sender === state.currentUser.username;
       const row = document.createElement('div');
       row.className = `msg-row ${isOutgoing ? 'outgoing' : 'incoming'}`;

       let attachmentHTML = '';
       if(m.product) {
          attachmentHTML = `
             <div class="chat-attachment-preview">
                <img src="${m.product.image}">
                <div>
                   <b>${m.product.name}</b><br>
                   <small>Size: ${m.product.size}</small>
                </div>
             </div>
          `;
       }
       if(m.image) {
          attachmentHTML += `<img src="${m.image}" style="max-width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-top:6px; max-height:120px; object-fit:cover;">`;
       }

       row.innerHTML = `
          <img src="${m.senderAvatar || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80'}" class="msg-avatar">
          <div class="msg-bubble">
             ${m.text ? `<div>${m.text}</div>` : ''}
             ${attachmentHTML}
             ${isOutgoing ? `<div class="message-status ${m.read ? 'seen' : 'unseen'}">${m.read ? 'Đã xem' : 'Chưa xem'}</div>` : ''}
             <small style="display:block; font-size:9px; text-align:right; opacity:0.6; margin-top:2px;">${m.timestamp}</small>
          </div>
       `;
       bodyContainer.appendChild(row);
    }

    function renderChatFooterDOM(parentContainer) {

       const footer = document.createElement('div');
       footer.className = 'chat-footer';
       
       let attachIndicator = '';
       if(state.chatAttachment || state.chatImageAttachment) {
          const parts = [];
          if(state.chatAttachment) {
             parts.push(`
                <div class="chat-attachment-preview" style="margin:0;">
                   <i class="fa-solid fa-paperclip"></i> Đang đính kèm: ${state.chatAttachment.name}
                   <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-xmark" style="margin-left:auto; cursor:pointer;" onclick="state.chatAttachment=null; updateChatInterface();"></i>
                </div>
             `);
          }
          if(state.chatImageAttachment) {
             parts.push(`
                <div class="chat-attachment-preview" style="margin:0;">
                   <img src="${state.chatImageAttachment.dataUrl}" alt="Ảnh đính kèm">
                   <div style="min-width:0;">
                      <b style="display:block; font-size:12px; line-height:1.3;">Ảnh đã chọn</b>
                      <small style="display:block; opacity:0.8; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; max-width:180px;">${state.chatImageAttachment.name}</small>
                   </div>
                   <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-xmark" style="margin-left:auto; cursor:pointer;" onclick="state.chatImageAttachment=null; updateChatInterface();"></i>
                </div>
             `);
          }
          attachIndicator = parts.join('');
       }

       footer.innerHTML = `
          ${attachIndicator}
          <div class="chat-input-row">
             <input type="text" class="form-control" id="chatMsgInput" placeholder="Nhập tin nhắn..." style="padding:8px 12px;">
             <input type="file" id="chatImgFileInput" accept="image/*" style="display:none;">
             <button class="btn secondary" id="chatImgAttachBtn" style="padding:8px;" title="Chọn ảnh từ thiết bị"><i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i></button>
             <button class="btn primary" id="chatSendMsgBtn" style="padding:8px 14px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane"></i></button>
          </div>
       `;

       // Event Handlers
       const chatMsgInput = footer.querySelector('#chatMsgInput');
       const chatImgFileInput = footer.querySelector('#chatImgFileInput');

       footer.querySelector('#chatSendMsgBtn').onclick = () => {
          const txt = chatMsgInput.value.trim();
          const imgUrl = state.chatImageAttachment?.dataUrl || "";
          if(!txt && !state.chatAttachment && !imgUrl) return;
          pushNewChatMessage(txt, imgUrl);
          chatMsgInput.value = '';
          state.chatImageAttachment = null;
       };

       footer.querySelector('#chatImgAttachBtn').onclick = () => {
          chatImgFileInput.click();
       };

       chatImgFileInput.onchange = () => {
          const file = chatImgFileInput.files && chatImgFileInput.files[0];
          if(!file) return;
          if(!file.type || !file.type.startsWith('image/')) {
             showToast("Vui lòng chọn một file ảnh hợp lệ.");
             chatImgFileInput.value = '';
             return;
          }
          const reader = new FileReader();
          reader.onload = () => {
             state.chatImageAttachment = {
                name: file.name,
                dataUrl: reader.result
             };
             updateChatInterface();
          };
          reader.readAsDataURL(file);
          chatImgFileInput.value = '';
       };

       chatMsgInput.onkeydown = (e) => {
          if(e.key === 'Enter') {
             const txt = chatMsgInput.value.trim();
             const imgUrl = state.chatImageAttachment?.dataUrl || "";
             if(!txt && !state.chatAttachment && !imgUrl) return;
             pushNewChatMessage(txt, imgUrl);
             chatMsgInput.value = '';
             state.chatImageAttachment = null;
          }
       };

       parentContainer.appendChild(footer);
    }

    function deleteChatThread(username) {
       if(!confirm(`Xóa cuộc trò chuyện với ${username}?`)) return;
       const msgs = getMessagesFromStorage().filter(m => !((m.sender === username && m.receiver === 'admin') || (m.sender === 'admin' && m.receiver === username)));
       saveMessagesToStorage(msgs);
       if(state.activeChatAdminUser === username) state.activeChatAdminUser = null;
       updateChatInterface();
    }

    // ==========================================================================
    // 10. POWERFUL ADMIN ZONE CRITICAL ENGINE (QUYỀN LỰC TUYỆT ĐỐI)
    // ==========================================================================
    window.addEventListener('hashchange', () => {
      if(window.location.hash === '#admin-zone') {
        if(state.currentUser && state.currentUser.role === 'admin') {
          $('admin-zone').style.display = "block";
          renderAdminDashboard();
        } else {
          $('admin-zone').style.display = "none";
          showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? "Từ chối truy cập! Khối quản trị bảo mật." : "Access Denied.");
          window.location.hash = "";
        }
      }
    });

    $('tabProductBtn').onclick = () => switchAdminTab('product');
    $('tabOrderBtn').onclick = () => switchAdminTab('order');
    $('tabUserBtn').onclick = () => switchAdminTab('user');
    const promoSaveBtn = $('promoSaveBtn');
    if (promoSaveBtn) promoSaveBtn.onclick = () => savePromoBoardFromAdmin(false);
    const promoAutoFillBtn = $('promoAutoFillBtn');
    if (promoAutoFillBtn) promoAutoFillBtn.onclick = () => autoFillPromoBoardFromProducts();

    function switchAdminTab(type) {
       document.querySelectorAll('.admin-tabs .btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
       $('adminProductPanel').style.display = "none";
       $('adminOrderPanel').style.display = "none";
       $('adminUserPanel').style.display = "none";

       if(type === 'product') { $('tabProductBtn').classList.add('active'); $('adminProductPanel').style.display = "block"; }
       if(type === 'order') { $('tabOrderBtn').classList.add('active'); $('adminOrderPanel').style.display = "block"; }
       if(type === 'user') { $('tabUserBtn').classList.add('active'); $('adminUserPanel').style.display = "block"; }
    }
// ADMIN ĐIỀU CHỈNH SỐ LƯỢNG KHO HÀNG TRỰC TIẾP
    function adminModifyStock(prodId, offset) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'chỉnh kho hàng' : 'edit inventory')) return;
       const p = state.products.find(prod => prod.id === prodId);
       if(!p) return;
       if(p.stock === undefined) p.stock = 20;
       p.stock = Math.max(0, p.stock + offset);
       syncStorage();
       renderProducts();
       renderAdminDashboard();
    }

    // ADMIN DUYỆT ĐƠN HÀNG (TÍCH XANH / DẤU X ĐỎ CỦA BẠN)
    function updateUserTargetOrderFields(username, orderId, fields = {}) {
       let allUsers = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_registered_users')) || [];
       let u = allUsers.find(user => user.username === username);
       if(u && u.orders) {
          let o = u.orders.find(ord => ord.orderId === orderId);
          if(o) Object.assign(o, fields);
          localStorage.setItem('al_registered_users', JSON.stringify(allUsers));
       }
       if(state.currentUser && state.currentUser.username === username && Array.isArray(state.currentUser.orders)) {
          let o = state.currentUser.orders.find(ord => ord.orderId === orderId);
          if(o) Object.assign(o, fields);
          localStorage.setItem('al_session_user', JSON.stringify(state.currentUser));
       }
    }

    function adminApproveOrderWithDays(orderId, days) {
       if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'duyệt đơn hàng' : 'approve orders')) return;
       const normalizedDays = Math.max(1, Math.min(30, parseInt(days, 10) || 3));
       let globalOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_global_orders')) || [];
       let target = globalOrders.find(o => o.orderId === orderId);
       if(target) {
          target.status = "Đã Xác Nhận";
          target.estimatedDays = normalizedDays;
          target.confirmedAt = Date.now();
          target.deliveryDate = Date.now() + normalizedDays * 86400000;
          localStorage.setItem('al_global_orders', JSON.stringify(globalOrders));
          updateUserTargetOrderFields(target.userOwner, orderId, {
            status: "Đã Xác Nhận",
            estimatedDays: normalizedDays,
            confirmedAt: target.confirmedAt,
            deliveryDate: target.deliveryDate
          });
          showToast(`Đã xác nhận đơn ${orderId} · ${normalizedDays} ngày`);
          renderAdminDashboard();
          renderCart();
       }
    }

    function adminApproveOrder(orderId) {
       const days = (() => {
         const el = document.getElementById(`adminShipDays_${orderId}`);
         return el ? el.value : 3;
       })();
       adminApproveOrderWithDays(orderId, days);
    }

    function adminRejectOrder(orderId) {
       if(!confirm("Bạn có chắc chắn muốn hủy đơn hàng này?")) return;
       let globalOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_global_orders')) || [];
       let target = globalOrders.find(o => o.orderId === orderId);
       if(target) {
          target.status = "Đã Hủy";

          // Hoàn trả lại số lượng kho
          target.items.forEach(cartItem => {
             const targetProd = state.products.find(p => p.id === cartItem.id);
             if(targetProd && targetProd.stock !== undefined) {
                targetProd.stock += cartItem.qty;
             }
          });

          localStorage.setItem('al_global_orders', JSON.stringify(globalOrders));
          updateUserTargetOrderFields(target.userOwner, orderId, { status: "Đã Hủy" });
          showToast(`Đã từ chối (X) hủy đơn hàng ${orderId}. Hoàn trả kho hàng thành công.`);
          renderProducts();
          renderAdminDashboard();
       }
    }

    function adminDeleteProduct(id) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'xóa sản phẩm' : 'delete products')) return;
      if (!confirm(msg('confirmDel'))) return;
      state.products = state.products.filter(p => p.id !== id);
      if (adminProductEditorState.editingId === id) {
        adminProductEditorState.editingId = null;
        adminProductEditorState.gallery = [];
        adminProductEditorState.variantsText = '';
        adminProductEditorState.sizesText = '';
      }
      state.promoBoard = normalizePromoBoard(state.promoBoard || {});
      localStorage.setItem('al_promo_board', JSON.stringify(state.promoBoard));
      syncStorage(); renderProducts(); renderPromoBoard(); renderAdminDashboard();
    }

    function adminToggleProductFlag(id, flagName) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'đánh dấu sản phẩm' : 'product flags')) return;
      const p = state.products.find(prod => prod.id === id);
      if(!p) return;
      p[flagName] = !p[flagName];
      syncStorage();
      renderProducts();
      renderAdminDashboard();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã cập nhật nhãn sản phẩm.' : 'Product label updated.');
    }

    function adminEditSizes(id) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'chỉnh dung tích' : 'edit sizes')) return;
      const p = state.products.find(prod => prod.id === id);
      if(!p) return;
      const current = getSizeOptionsForProduct(p).map(s => `${s.key}|${toNumber(s.price, 0)}|${s.label}`).join('\n');
      const input = prompt(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Nhập size theo dạng: size|giá|nhãn, mỗi dòng một size:' : 'Enter sizes in the form: size|price|label, one per line:', current);
      if(input === null) return;
      const rows = input.split(/\n+/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
      if(!rows.length) return;
      const sizeOptions = rows.map((line, idx) => {
        const [key, priceText, labelText] = line.split('|').map(s => (s || '').trim());
        return {
          key: key || `size-${idx + 1}`,
          label: labelText || key || `Dung tích ${idx + 1}`,
          price: toNumber(priceText, p.basePrice)
        };
      });
      p.sizeOptions = sizeOptions;
      p.capacity = sizeOptions[0]?.key || p.capacity;
      syncStorage();
      renderProducts();
      renderAdminDashboard();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã cập nhật dung tích và giá.' : 'Sizes and prices updated.');
    }

    function adminEditPrice(id) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'chỉnh giá' : 'edit price')) return;
      const p = state.products.find(prod => prod.id === id);
      if(!p) return;
      const newBase = prompt(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Nhập giá mới cho sản phẩm:' : 'Enter new base price:', toNumber(p.basePrice, 0));
      if(newBase === null) return;
      const newOld = prompt(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Nhập giá cũ / giá gạch (để trống nếu không dùng):' : 'Enter old/strike-through price (leave blank to hide):', toNumber(p.oldPrice, 0));
      const baseNum = parseInt(newBase);
      if(isNaN(baseNum)) { showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Giá mới không hợp lệ.' : 'Invalid price.'); return; }
      p.basePrice = baseNum;
      if(newOld !== null && String(newOld).trim() !== '') {
        const oldNum = parseInt(newOld);
        if(!isNaN(oldNum)) p.oldPrice = oldNum;
      }
      syncStorage();
      renderProducts();
      renderAdminDashboard();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã cập nhật giá sản phẩm.' : 'Price updated.');
    }

    function adminEditSaleTime(id) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'chỉnh thời gian giảm giá' : 'edit sale timer')) return;
      const p = state.products.find(prod => prod.id === id);
      if(!p) return;
      if(!(toNumber(p.oldPrice,0) > toNumber(p.basePrice,0))) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Sản phẩm này chưa có giá giảm.' : 'This product is not on sale.');
        return;
      }
      const current = p.saleEndsAt ? p.saleEndsAt.slice(0,16) : '';
      const input = prompt(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Nhập thời gian kết thúc giảm giá (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM):' : 'Enter sale end time (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM):', current);
      if(input === null) return;
      const iso = parseSaleEndsAt(input);
      if(input.trim() && !iso) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Thời gian không hợp lệ.' : 'Invalid time.');
        return;
      }
      p.saleEndsAt = iso;
      syncStorage();
      renderProducts();
      renderAdminDashboard();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã cập nhật thời gian giảm giá.' : 'Sale time updated.');
    }

    function adminDeleteUser(username) {
      if (!confirm(msg('confirmDel'))) return;
      state.users = state.users.filter(u => u.username !== username);
      syncStorage(); renderAdminDashboard();
    }

    function adminAdjustUserSpinCredits(username, delta) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'chỉnh lượt quay khách hàng' : 'edit customer spin credits')) return;
      const target = state.users.find(u => u.username === username);
      if (!target) return;
      target.spinCredits = Math.max(0, (Number(target.spinCredits) || 0) + delta);
      syncStorage();
      if (state.currentUser && state.currentUser.username === username) {
        state.currentUser.spinCredits = target.spinCredits;
      }
      renderAdminDashboard();
      showToast(`Đã cập nhật lượt quay cho ${username}: ${target.spinCredits}`);
    }

    function adminSetUserSpinCredits(username) {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'chỉnh lượt quay khách hàng' : 'edit customer spin credits')) return;
      const target = state.users.find(u => u.username === username);
      if (!target) return;
      const input = prompt('Nhập số lượt quay mới cho tài khoản này:', String(Number(target.spinCredits) || 0));
      if (input === null) return;
      const value = parseInt(input, 10);
      if (Number.isNaN(value) || value < 0) {
        showToast('Số lượt quay không hợp lệ.');
        return;
      }
      adminSetUserSpinCreditsExact(username, value, false);
    }


    let adminProductEditorState = {
      editingId: null,
      gallery: [],
      variantsText: '',
      sizesText: '',
      previewOpen: false
    };

    function parseAdminLines(text = '') {
      return String(text || '').split(/\n+/).map(line => line.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    }

    function parseAdminVariantsText(text = '') {
      return parseAdminLines(text).map((line, idx) => {
        const parts = line.split('|').map(s => s.trim());
        return {
          colorName: parts[0] || `Màu ${idx + 1}`,
          colorHex: sanitizeHexColor(parts[1] || '#2563eb', '#2563eb'),
          mainImg: parts[2] || '',
          hoverImg: parts[3] || ''
        };
      }).filter(v => v.colorName || v.mainImg || v.hoverImg);
    }

    function parseAdminSizesText(text = '') {
      return parseAdminLines(text).map((line, idx) => {
        const parts = line.split('|').map(s => s.trim());
        return {
          key: parts[0] || `size-${idx + 1}`,
          label: parts[1] || parts[0] || `Dung tích ${idx + 1}`,
          price: toNumber(parts[2], 0),
          image: parts[3] || '',
          hoverImage: parts[4] || '',
          variants: []
        };
      }).filter(s => s.key || s.label);
    }

    function parseAdminHighlightsText(text = '') {
      return parseAdminLines(text).map(line => {
        const parts = line.split('|').map(s => s.trim());
        return { title: parts[0] || '', value: parts.slice(1).join('|') || '' };
      }).filter(item => item.title || item.value);
    }

    function getAdminBadgeSlots() {
      const slots = [];
      for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i += 1) {
        const type = document.querySelector(`[data-badge-type="${i}"]`)?.value || '';
        const color = sanitizeHexColor(document.querySelector(`[data-badge-color="${i}"]`)?.value, getBadgePreset(type).color);
        if (type && PRODUCT_BADGE_PRESETS[type] && !slots.some(s => s.type === type)) {
          slots.push({ type, color });
        }
      }
      return slots;
    }

    function collectAdminProductFormData() {
      const name = String($('adminProductName')?.value || '').trim();
      const gallerySource = [...(adminProductEditorState.gallery || []), String($('adminPrimaryImage')?.value || '').trim()].filter(Boolean);
      const gallery = [...new Set(gallerySource)];
      const data = normalizeProduct({
        id: String($('adminProductId')?.value || '').trim() || `${slugifyText(name) || 'prod'}-${Date.now().toString(36)}`,
        name,
        collection: String($('adminCollection')?.value || '').trim(),
        category: String($('adminCategory')?.value || '').trim(),
        material: String($('adminMaterial')?.value || '').trim(),
        capacity: String($('adminCapacity')?.value || '').trim(),
        shortDescription: String($('adminShortDescription')?.value || '').trim(),
        description: String($('adminDescription')?.value || '').trim(),
        details: String($('adminDetails')?.value || '').trim(),
        detailStory: String($('adminDetailStory')?.value || '').trim(),
        detailSubtitle: String($('adminDetailSubtitle')?.value || '').trim(),
        detailKicker: String($('adminDetailKicker')?.value || '').trim(),
        suitableFor: String($('adminSuitableFor')?.value || '').trim(),
        basePrice: toNumber($('adminBasePrice')?.value, 0),
        oldPrice: toNumber($('adminOldPrice')?.value, 0),
        discountPercent: toNumber($('adminDiscountPercent')?.value, 0),
        stock: toNumber($('adminStock')?.value, 0),
        sold: toNumber($('adminSold')?.value, 0),
        rating: toNumber($('adminRating')?.value, 5),
        saleEndsAt: String($('adminSaleEndsAt')?.value || '').trim(),
        discountBadgeBg: String($('adminDiscountBadgeBg')?.value || '#e11d48').trim() || '#e11d48',
        discountTextColor: String($('adminDiscountTextColor')?.value || '#ffffff').trim() || '#ffffff',
        image: gallery[0] || '',
        mainImg: gallery[0] || '',
        thumbnail: gallery[0] || '',
        gallery,
        variants: parseAdminVariantsText($('adminVariantsText')?.value || ''),
        sizeOptions: parseAdminSizesText($('adminSizesText')?.value || ''),
        badges: getAdminBadgeSlots(),
        quickviewHighlights: parseAdminHighlightsText($('adminHighlightsText')?.value || ''),
        specs: parseAdminHighlightsText($('adminSpecsText')?.value || ''),
        tags: normalizeTextList($('adminTags')?.value || ''),
        isBestSeller: !!$('adminIsBestSeller')?.checked,
        isNewArrival: !!$('adminIsNewArrival')?.checked,
        isFeatured: !!$('adminIsFeatured')?.checked
      });
      return data;
    }

    function renderAdminImageList() {
      const host = $('adminGalleryList');
      const primaryHost = $('adminPrimaryImagePreview');
      const statusHost = $('adminGalleryUploadHint');
      const hiddenPrimary = $('adminPrimaryImage');
      if (!host) return;
      const list = Array.isArray(adminProductEditorState.gallery) ? adminProductEditorState.gallery : [];
      const primary = list[0] || String(hiddenPrimary?.value || '').trim();
      if (hiddenPrimary) hiddenPrimary.value = primary || '';
      if (primaryHost) {
        primaryHost.innerHTML = primary ? `
          <img src="${primary}" alt="${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ảnh đại diện' : 'Cover image'}">
        ` : `
          <div class="file-meta">
            <span>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa chọn ảnh đại diện' : 'No cover image selected'}</span>
            <small>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Bấm vào ô chọn file bên trên để tải ảnh từ thiết bị.' : 'Use the file picker above to upload an image from your device.'}</small>
          </div>
        `;
      }
      if (statusHost) {
        statusHost.innerHTML = `
          <div class="file-meta">
            <span>${state.lang === 'vi' ? `${list.length} ảnh trong thư viện` : `${list.length} images in gallery`}</span>
            <small>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ảnh đầu tiên là ảnh đại diện. Bạn có thể xoá riêng hoặc đổi thứ tự bên dưới.' : 'The first image is the cover. You can remove, reorder or promote images below.'}</small>
          </div>
        `;
      }
      host.innerHTML = list.length ? list.map((src, idx) => `
        <div class="admin-image-item">
          <img src="${src}" alt="Ảnh ${idx + 1}">
          <div class="admin-image-item-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.72rem; color:var(--muted); font-weight:800;">${idx === 0 ? (state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ảnh đại diện' : 'Cover image') : `${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ảnh' : 'Image'} ${idx + 1}`}</div>
            <div class="admin-image-item-actions">
              <button class="btn secondary" type="button" onclick="adminMoveGalleryImage(${idx}, -1)" ${idx === 0 ? 'disabled' : ''}><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up"></i></button>
              <button class="btn secondary" type="button" onclick="adminMoveGalleryImage(${idx}, 1)" ${idx === list.length - 1 ? 'disabled' : ''}><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-down"></i></button>
              <button class="btn secondary" type="button" onclick="adminSetCoverImage(${idx})"><i class="fa-solid fa-star"></i></button>
              <button class="btn danger" type="button" onclick="adminRemoveGalleryImage(${idx})"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      `).join('') : `<div class="collection-empty">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa có ảnh nào trong thư viện.' : 'No images added yet.'}</div>`;
    }

    function adminToggleProductPreview(force = null) {
      const nextState = force === null ? !adminProductEditorState.previewOpen : !!force;
      adminProductEditorState.previewOpen = nextState;
      const shell = $('adminPreviewShell');
      const collapsed = $('adminPreviewCollapsed');
      if (shell) shell.style.display = nextState ? 'grid' : 'none';
      if (collapsed) collapsed.style.display = nextState ? 'none' : 'grid';
      if (nextState) renderAdminProductPreview();
    }

    function renderAdminProductPreview() {
      const host = $('adminProductPreviewHost');
      if (!host) return;
      const data = collectAdminProductFormData();
      const previewImage = getPrimaryProductImage(data, getDefaultSizeKey(data), 0) || data.image || data.mainImg || '';
      const badges = normalizeProductBadges(data.badges, data);
      const summary = data.detailStory || data.details || data.shortDescription || data.description || '';
      const highlights = Array.isArray(data.quickviewHighlights) && data.quickviewHighlights.length ? data.quickviewHighlights.slice(0, 4) : [
        { title: 'Chất liệu', value: data.material || '—' },
        { title: 'Dung tích', value: data.capacity || '—' },
        { title: 'Kho', value: String(toNumber(data.stock, 0)) },
        { title: 'Màu', value: String((getCardVariants(data) || []).length || 0) }
      ];
      host.innerHTML = `
        <div class="admin-preview-card">
          <div class="admin-preview-media"><img src="${previewImage}" alt="${escapeHtml(data.name || 'Preview')}"></div>
          <div class="admin-preview-badges">
            ${badges.map(b => `<span class="admin-preview-chip" style="color:${b.color}; border-color:${b.color}; background:${b.color}18;">${escapeHtml(getBadgeLabel(b.type))}</span>`).join('')}
            ${data.isFeatured ? `<span class="admin-preview-chip" style="color:var(--primary); border-color:rgba(0,240,255,.24);">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Nổi bật' : 'Featured'}</span>` : ''}
            ${data.isBestSeller ? `<span class="admin-preview-chip" style="color:var(--warning); border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.24);">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Bán chạy' : 'Best seller'}</span>` : ''}
          </div>
          <div>
            <strong style="display:block; font-size:1rem; line-height:1.35; margin-bottom:4px;">${escapeHtml(data.name || (state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa có tên' : 'Untitled'))}</strong>
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--muted);">${escapeHtml([data.category, data.material, data.capacity].filter(Boolean).join(' · '))}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="price-container" style="margin:0;">
            <span class="price-current">${formatMoney(calculatePriceBySize(toNumber(data.basePrice, 0), getDefaultSizeKey(data), data))}</span>
            ${getProductDiscountPercent(data) > 0 ? `<span class="price-old">${formatMoney(getSaleOldPriceBySize(data, getDefaultSizeKey(data)))}</span>` : ''}
          </div>
          <div class="admin-preview-summary">${escapeHtml(summary)}</div>
          <div class="admin-preview-grid">
            ${highlights.map(h => `<div class="qv-feature-card"><span>${escapeHtml(h.title)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(h.value)}</strong></div>`).join('')}
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
    }

    function adminSetProductDraft(product = null) {
      adminProductEditorState.editingId = product ? product.id : null;
      adminProductEditorState.previewOpen = false;
      adminProductEditorState.gallery = product ? getProductImages(product).slice() : [];
      adminProductEditorState.variantsText = product ? (Array.isArray(product.variants) ? product.variants.map(v => `${v.colorName || ''}|${v.colorHex || ''}|${v.mainImg || ''}|${v.hoverImg || ''}`).join('\n') : '') : '';
      adminProductEditorState.sizesText = product ? (Array.isArray(product.sizeOptions) ? product.sizeOptions.map(s => `${s.key || ''}|${s.label || ''}|${toNumber(s.price, 0)}|${s.image || ''}|${s.hoverImage || ''}`).join('\n') : '') : '';
    }

    function renderAdminProductEditor(product = null) {
      const host = $('adminProductEditorHost');
      if (!host) return;
      const editingProduct = product || (adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
      if (editingProduct && product) adminSetProductDraft(editingProduct);
      const isEdit = !!adminProductEditorState.editingId;
      const productData = editingProduct ? normalizeProduct(editingProduct) : normalizeProduct({
        id: '',
        name: '',
        category: '',
        collection: '',
        material: '',
        capacity: '750ml',
        basePrice: 0,
        oldPrice: 0,
        discountPercent: 0,
        stock: 20,
        sold: 0,
        rating: 5,
        shortDescription: '',
        description: '',
        details: '',
        detailStory: '',
        detailSubtitle: '',
        detailKicker: '',
        suitableFor: '',
        tags: [],
        gallery: [],
        variants: [],
        sizeOptions: [],
        quickviewHighlights: [],
        specs: [],
        badges: []
      });

      host.innerHTML = `
        <div class="admin-product-editor">
          <div class="admin-editor-section glass">
            <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:flex-start;">
              <div>
                <h4>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Quản lý sản phẩm đầy đủ' : 'Full product management'}</h4>
                <div class="admin-editor-hint">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Tạo, sửa, xóa và đồng bộ sản phẩm vào toàn bộ storefront.' : 'Create, edit, delete and sync products across the storefront.'}</div>
              </div>
              <div class="admin-inline-actions">
                <button type="button" class="btn secondary" onclick="adminResetProductForm()"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i> ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Tạo mới' : 'New product'}</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn secondary" onclick="adminReloadProductEditor()"><i class="fa-solid fa-rotate"></i> ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Nạp lại' : 'Reload'}</button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="admin-grid-inputs">
              <div class="form-group"><label>ID sản phẩm</label><input class="form-control" id="adminProductId" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.id || '')}" ${isEdit ? 'readonly' : ''} placeholder="prod-unique-id"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Tên sản phẩm</label><input class="form-control" id="adminProductName" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.name || '')}" placeholder="Tên sản phẩm"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Danh mục</label><input class="form-control" id="adminCategory" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.category || '')}" placeholder="Văn phòng / Thể thao / Đi phượt"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Bộ sưu tập</label><input class="form-control" id="adminCollection" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.collection || '')}" placeholder="Collection"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Chất liệu</label><input class="form-control" id="adminMaterial" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.material || '')}" placeholder="Inox 316"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Dung tích mặc định</label><input class="form-control" id="adminCapacity" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.capacity || '')}" placeholder="750ml"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Giá gốc</label><input class="form-control" id="adminBasePrice" type="number" min="0" value="${toNumber(editingProduct?.basePrice, 0)}"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Giá giảm / giá cũ</label><input class="form-control" id="adminOldPrice" type="number" min="0" value="${toNumber(editingProduct?.oldPrice, 0)}"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>% giảm</label><input class="form-control" id="adminDiscountPercent" type="number" min="0" max="100" value="${getProductDiscountPercent(product || {})}"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Tồn kho</label><input class="form-control" id="adminStock" type="number" min="0" value="${toNumber(editingProduct?.stock, 20)}"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Đã bán</label><input class="form-control" id="adminSold" type="number" min="0" value="${toNumber(editingProduct?.sold, 0)}"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Đánh giá</label><input class="form-control" id="adminRating" type="number" min="0" max="5" step="0.1" value="${toNumber(editingProduct?.rating, 5)}"></div>
            </div>

            <div class="admin-grid-inputs">
              <div class="form-group"><label>Mô tả ngắn</label><textarea class="form-control" id="adminShortDescription" rows="3">${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.shortDescription || '')}</textarea></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Mô tả chi tiết</label><textarea class="form-control" id="adminDescription" rows="3">${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.description || '')}</textarea></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Thông tin chi tiết</label><textarea class="form-control" id="adminDetails" rows="3">${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.details || '')}</textarea></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Story / nội dung dài</label><textarea class="form-control" id="adminDetailStory" rows="3">${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.detailStory || '')}</textarea></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Subtitle trong chi tiết</label><input class="form-control" id="adminDetailSubtitle" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.detailSubtitle || '')}" placeholder="Chi tiết theo màu/dung tích"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Nhãn mở đầu / kicker</label><input class="form-control" id="adminDetailKicker" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.detailKicker || '')}" placeholder="Premium / New / Best"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Phù hợp với</label><input class="form-control" id="adminSuitableFor" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.suitableFor || '')}" placeholder="Thể thao, văn phòng..."></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Tags / nhãn</label><textarea class="form-control" id="adminTags" rows="3">${escapeHtml((editingProduct?.tags || []).join(', '))}</textarea></div>
            </div>

            
            <div class="admin-editor-section">
              <h4>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Quản lý ảnh' : 'Image management'}</h4>
              <div class="admin-editor-hint">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chọn ảnh trực tiếp từ thiết bị. Ảnh đầu tiên là ảnh đại diện, các ảnh sau là ảnh phụ. Mọi ảnh đều xem trước, xoá riêng và đổi thứ tự được ngay bên dưới.' : 'Choose images directly from your device. The first image becomes the cover image, the rest are gallery images. Every image can be previewed, removed individually and reordered below.'}</div>
              <div class="admin-image-manager">
                <div class="admin-image-toolbar">
                  <div class="admin-image-pick-card">
                    <div class="admin-image-pick-head">
                      <div class="admin-image-pick-title">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ảnh đại diện / cover' : 'Cover image'}</div>
                      <div class="admin-image-pick-note">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chọn 1 ảnh từ điện thoại hoặc PC. Ảnh này sẽ dùng cho card, xem nhanh và chi tiết.' : 'Pick one image from phone or PC. It will be used for cards, quick view and product detail.'}</div>
                    </div>
                    <input type="file" id="adminPrimaryImageUpload" accept="image/*" class="admin-image-file-input">
                    <input type="hidden" id="adminPrimaryImage" value="${escapeHtml(editingProduct?.image || editingProduct?.mainImg || editingProduct?.thumbnail || '')}">
                    <div class="admin-image-selected" id="adminPrimaryImagePreview"></div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="admin-image-pick-card">
                    <div class="admin-image-pick-head">
                      <div class="admin-image-pick-title">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ảnh phụ / thư viện ảnh' : 'Gallery images'}</div>
                      <div class="admin-image-pick-note">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chọn nhiều ảnh một lần từ thiết bị. Ảnh sẽ được thêm vào thư viện ngay.' : 'Select multiple images at once from your device. They will be added to the gallery immediately.'}</div>
                    </div>
                    <input type="file" id="adminGalleryUpload" accept="image/*" multiple class="admin-image-file-input">
                    <div class="admin-image-selected" id="adminGalleryUploadHint">
                      <div class="file-meta">
                        <span>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mở thư viện ảnh để thêm nhiều file.' : 'Open your photo library to add multiple files.'}</span>
                        <small>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ảnh sẽ xếp vào thư viện bên dưới, file đầu tiên sẽ được ưu tiên làm ảnh đại diện nếu đang trống.' : 'Images will appear in the gallery below; the first file is used as the cover if the cover is empty.'}</small>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="admin-image-list" id="adminGalleryList"></div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="admin-editor-section">
              <h4>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Quản lý biến thể màu' : 'Color variants'}</h4>
              <div class="admin-editor-hint">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mỗi dòng: Tên màu | Mã màu | Ảnh chính | Ảnh hover.' : 'Each line: Color name | Color hex | Main image | Hover image.'}</div>
              <textarea class="form-control" id="adminVariantsText" rows="5">${escapeHtml(adminProductEditorState.variantsText || '')}</textarea>
            </div>

            <div class="admin-editor-section">
              <h4>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Quản lý dung tích / size' : 'Size / capacity management'}</h4>
              <div class="admin-editor-hint">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mỗi dòng: key | nhãn | giá | ảnh chính | ảnh hover.' : 'Each line: key | label | price | main image | hover image.'}</div>
              <textarea class="form-control" id="adminSizesText" rows="5">${escapeHtml(adminProductEditorState.sizesText || '')}</textarea>
            </div>

            <div class="admin-editor-section">
              <h4>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Hiển thị thương mại' : 'Commercial display'}</h4>
              <div class="admin-grid-inputs" style="margin-bottom:0;">
                <div class="form-group"><label>Thông tin nổi bật</label><textarea class="form-control" id="adminHighlightsText" rows="4">${escapeHtml((editingProduct?.quickviewHighlights || []).map(item => `${item.title || ''} | ${item.value || ''}`).join('\n'))}</textarea></div>
                <div class="form-group"><label>Thông số / specs</label><textarea class="form-control" id="adminSpecsText" rows="4">${escapeHtml((editingProduct?.specs || []).map(item => `${item.title || ''} | ${item.value || ''}`).join('\n'))}</textarea></div>
              </div>
              <div class="admin-badge-editor-lite">${renderAdminBadgeSlotsEditor('product', product ? normalizeProductBadges(product.badges, product).map(b => ({ type: b.type, color: b.color })) : [])}</div>
              <div class="admin-grid-inputs" style="margin-bottom:0;">
                <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" id="adminIsBestSeller" ${editingProduct?.isBestSeller ? 'checked' : ''}> Bán chạy</label>
                <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" id="adminIsNewArrival" ${editingProduct?.isNewArrival ? 'checked' : ''}> Sản phẩm mới</label>
                <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" id="adminIsFeatured" ${editingProduct?.isFeatured ? 'checked' : ''}> Sản phẩm nổi bật</label>
                <div class="form-group"><label>Ngày kết thúc sale</label><input class="form-control" id="adminSaleEndsAt" type="datetime-local" value="${String(editingProduct?.saleEndsAt || '').slice(0, 16)}"></div>
                <div class="form-group"><label>Màu nền badge sale</label><input class="form-control" id="adminDiscountBadgeBg" type="color" value="${sanitizeHexColor(editingProduct?.discountBadgeBg, '#e11d48')}"></div>
                <div class="form-group"><label>Màu chữ badge sale</label><input class="form-control" id="adminDiscountTextColor" type="color" value="${sanitizeHexColor(editingProduct?.discountTextColor, '#ffffff')}"></div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <button type="button" class="btn primary" onclick="adminSaveProductFromEditor()"><i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i> ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Lưu sản phẩm' : 'Save product'}</button>
              ${isEdit ? `<button type="button" class="btn secondary" onclick="adminCloneCurrentProduct()"><i class="fa-solid fa-copy"></i> ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Nhân bản' : 'Clone'}</button>` : ''}
              ${isEdit ? `<button type="button" class="btn danger" onclick="adminDeleteProduct('${escapeHtml(adminProductEditorState.editingId)}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i> ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Xóa' : 'Delete'}</button>` : ''}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="admin-preview-collapsed" id="adminPreviewCollapsed" style="display:${adminProductEditorState.previewOpen ? 'none' : 'grid'};">
            <button type="button" class="admin-preview-toggle-btn" onclick="adminToggleProductPreview(true)" aria-label="${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mở xem trước' : 'Open preview'}" title="${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Bấm để mở xem trước' : 'Click to open preview'}">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i>
            </button>
            <div>
              <strong style="display:block; font-size:1.06rem; margin-bottom:6px;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Xem trước đang ẩn' : 'Preview is hidden'}</strong>
              <div class="admin-editor-hint" style="font-size:0.88rem; line-height:1.7;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Bấm biểu tượng mắt để hiện khung xem trước sản phẩm. Khung này sẽ tự ẩn lại khi bạn đổi sản phẩm hoặc tải dữ liệu mới.' : 'Click the eye icon to open the preview panel. It will hide again when you switch products or load new data.'}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="admin-preview-shell" id="adminPreviewShell" style="display:${adminProductEditorState.previewOpen ? 'grid' : 'none'};">
            <div class="admin-preview-card glass">
              <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:10px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap;">
                <div>
                  <h4 style="margin:0; font-size:1rem;">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Xem trước' : 'Preview'}</h4>
                  <div class="admin-editor-hint">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Kết quả cập nhật từ dữ liệu đang nhập.' : 'The preview updates from the data you enter.'}</div>
                </div>
                <div class="admin-inline-actions">
                  <button type="button" class="btn secondary" onclick="renderAdminProductPreview()"><i class="fa-solid fa-rotate"></i> ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Cập nhật' : 'Refresh'}</button>
                  <button type="button" class="btn secondary" onclick="adminToggleProductPreview(false)"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye-slash"></i> ${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ẩn' : 'Hide'}</button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div id="adminProductPreviewHost"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      `;

      $('adminPrimaryImageUpload')?.addEventListener('change', e => adminUploadPrimaryImage(e.target.files));
      $('adminGalleryUpload')?.addEventListener('change', e => adminUploadGalleryFiles(e.target.files));
      ['adminProductId','adminProductName','adminCategory','adminCollection','adminMaterial','adminCapacity','adminBasePrice','adminOldPrice','adminDiscountPercent','adminStock','adminSold','adminRating','adminShortDescription','adminDescription','adminDetails','adminDetailStory','adminDetailSubtitle','adminDetailKicker','adminSuitableFor','adminTags','adminPrimaryImage','adminVariantsText','adminSizesText','adminHighlightsText','adminSpecsText','adminSaleEndsAt','adminDiscountBadgeBg','adminDiscountTextColor','adminIsBestSeller','adminIsNewArrival','adminIsFeatured'].forEach(id => {
        $(id)?.addEventListener('input', renderAdminProductPreview);
        $(id)?.addEventListener('change', renderAdminProductPreview);
      });

      renderAdminImageList();
      renderAdminProductPreview();
    }

    function adminResetProductForm(product = null) {
      adminSetProductDraft(product ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(product)) : null);
      const hidden = $('adminPrimaryImage');
      if (hidden) hidden.value = (adminProductEditorState.gallery || [])[0] || '';
      renderAdminProductEditor(adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
      if (!adminProductEditorState.previewOpen) adminToggleProductPreview(false);
    }

    function adminOpenProductEditor(productId = null) {
      const product = productId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === productId) : null;
      adminResetProductForm(product);
      adminToggleProductPreview(false);
    }

    function adminReloadProductEditor() {
      const hidden = $('adminPrimaryImage');
      if (hidden) hidden.value = (adminProductEditorState.gallery || [])[0] || '';
      renderAdminProductEditor(adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
    }

    function adminCloneProduct(id) {
      const product = state.products.find(p => p.id === id);
      if (!product) return;
      adminSetProductDraft(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(product)));
      renderAdminProductEditor(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(product)));
      adminToggleProductPreview(false);
      adminCloneCurrentProduct();
    }

    function adminAddGalleryUrls() {
      const input = $('adminGalleryUrlInput');
      const raw = String(input?.value || '').trim();
      if (!raw) return;
      const urls = raw.split(/[\n,]+/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
      if (!adminProductEditorState.gallery) adminProductEditorState.gallery = [];
      urls.forEach(url => {
        if (!adminProductEditorState.gallery.includes(url)) adminProductEditorState.gallery.push(url);
      });
      input.value = '';
      const hidden = $('adminPrimaryImage');
      if (hidden) hidden.value = (adminProductEditorState.gallery || [])[0] || '';
      renderAdminProductEditor(adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
    }

    async function adminUploadPrimaryImage(fileList) {
      const file = Array.from(fileList || [])[0];
      if (!file) return;
      if (!file.type || !file.type.startsWith('image/')) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Vui lòng chọn một file ảnh hợp lệ.' : 'Please choose a valid image file.');
        return;
      }
      const dataUrl = await readFileAsDataURL(file);
      if (!dataUrl) return;
      const list = Array.isArray(adminProductEditorState.gallery) ? adminProductEditorState.gallery.slice() : [];
      const cleaned = [dataUrl, ...list.filter(src => src && src !== dataUrl)];
      adminProductEditorState.gallery = cleaned;
      const hidden = $('adminPrimaryImage');
      if (hidden) hidden.value = dataUrl;
      renderAdminProductEditor(adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
    }

    async function adminUploadGalleryFiles(fileList) {
      const files = Array.from(fileList || []);
      if (!files.length) return;
      const urls = [];
      for (const file of files) {
        const dataUrl = await readFileAsDataURL(file);
        if (dataUrl) urls.push(dataUrl);
      }
      if (!adminProductEditorState.gallery) adminProductEditorState.gallery = [];
      urls.forEach(url => {
        if (!adminProductEditorState.gallery.includes(url)) adminProductEditorState.gallery.push(url);
      });
      renderAdminProductEditor(adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
    }
