    function adminMoveGalleryImage(index, delta) {
      const list = adminProductEditorState.gallery || [];
      const target = index + delta;
      if (target < 0 || target >= list.length) return;
      [list[index], list[target]] = [list[target], list[index]];
      renderAdminProductEditor(adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
    }

    function adminSetCoverImage(index) {
      const list = adminProductEditorState.gallery || [];
      if (index <= 0 || index >= list.length) return;
      const [item] = list.splice(index, 1);
      list.unshift(item);
      renderAdminProductEditor(adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
    }

    function adminRemoveGalleryImage(index) {
      const list = adminProductEditorState.gallery || [];
      list.splice(index, 1);
      renderAdminProductEditor(adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
    }

    function adminSaveProductFromEditor() {
      if(!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'lưu sản phẩm' : 'save product')) return;
      const product = collectAdminProductFormData();
      if (!product.name) {
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Vui lòng nhập tên sản phẩm.' : 'Please enter product name.');
        return;
      }
      const idx = state.products.findIndex(p => p.id === product.id || p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId);
      if (idx >= 0) state.products[idx] = { ...state.products[idx], ...product };
      else state.products.unshift(product);
      adminProductEditorState.editingId = product.id;
      adminProductEditorState.gallery = getProductImages(product).slice();
      adminProductEditorState.variantsText = Array.isArray(product.variants) ? product.variants.map(v => `${v.colorName || ''}|${v.colorHex || ''}|${v.mainImg || ''}|${v.hoverImg || ''}`).join('\n') : '';
      adminProductEditorState.sizesText = Array.isArray(product.sizeOptions) ? product.sizeOptions.map(s => `${s.key || ''}|${s.label || ''}|${toNumber(s.price, 0)}|${s.image || ''}|${s.hoverImage || ''}`).join('\n') : '';
      syncStorage();
      renderProducts();
      renderSearchSuggestions();
      renderTopCollections();
      renderPromoBoard();
      renderSavedCollections();
      renderCart();
      renderAdminDashboard();
      showToast(msg('prodAddOk'));
    }

    function adminCloneCurrentProduct() {
      const product = collectAdminProductFormData();
      const clone = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(product));
      clone.id = `${slugifyText(clone.name)}-${Date.now().toString(36)}`;
      adminProductEditorState.editingId = null;
      adminProductEditorState.gallery = getProductImages(product).slice();
      adminProductEditorState.variantsText = Array.isArray(product.variants) ? product.variants.map(v => `${v.colorName || ''}|${v.colorHex || ''}|${v.mainImg || ''}|${v.hoverImg || ''}`).join('\n') : '';
      adminProductEditorState.sizesText = Array.isArray(product.sizeOptions) ? product.sizeOptions.map(s => `${s.key || ''}|${s.label || ''}|${toNumber(s.price, 0)}|${s.image || ''}|${s.hoverImage || ''}`).join('\n') : '';
      renderAdminProductEditor(clone);
      $('adminProductId').value = clone.id;
    }

    function renderAdminDashboard() {
      if (!state.currentUser || state.currentUser.role !== 'admin') return;

      const editorHost = $('adminProductEditorHost');
      if (editorHost && !editorHost.childElementCount) {
        renderAdminProductEditor(adminProductEditorState.editingId ? state.products.find(p => p.id === adminProductEditorState.editingId) || null : null);
      }

      // Render Sản Phẩm & Kho Hàng
      const pBody = $('adminProductTableBody'); pBody.innerHTML = '';
      state.products.forEach(p => {
        const r = document.createElement('tr');
        r.innerHTML = `
          <td><img src="${getPrimaryProductImage(p, getDefaultSizeKey(p))}" style="width:40px; height:40px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:6px;"></td>
          <td><b>${p.name}</b><br><small style="color:var(--muted)">${p.id}</small></td>
          <td>${p.category}</td>
          <td>
             <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;">
                <button class="btn secondary" style="padding:2px 6px;" onclick="adminModifyStock('${p.id}', -1)">-</button>
                <b style="min-width:20px; text-align:center;">${p.stock !== undefined ? p.stock : 20}</b>
                <button class="btn secondary" style="padding:2px 6px;" onclick="adminModifyStock('${p.id}', 1)">+</button>
             </div>
          </td>
          <td><b style="color:var(--primary)">${p.sold || 0}</b> lượt</td>
          <td style="font-weight:700;">${formatMoney(p.basePrice)}${isSaleActive(p) && p.saleEndsAt ? `<br><small style="color:var(--warning);">Hết hạn: ${new Date(p.saleEndsAt).toLocaleString('vi-VN')}</small>` : ''}<br><small style="color:var(--muted)">${getSizeOptionsForProduct(p).length} mức dung tích</small><br><small style="color:var(--muted)">${p.description || ''}</small></td>
          <td>
             <div style="display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:8px;">
                <button class="btn secondary" style="padding:6px 10px; font-size:11px;" onclick="adminOpenProductEditor('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square"></i></button>
                <button class="btn secondary" style="padding:6px 10px; font-size:11px;" onclick="adminCloneProduct('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-copy"></i></button>
                <button class="btn danger" style="padding:6px 10px; font-size:11px;" onclick="adminDeleteProduct('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button>
             </div>
             <div class="admin-badge-editor" id="badge-editor-${p.id}">
                <div class="admin-badge-count-row">
                   <label>${state.lang==='vi' ? 'Số nhãn' : 'Label count'}</label>
                   <select class="admin-badge-select admin-badge-count-select" onchange="toggleAdminBadgeSlots('${p.id}', this.value)">
                      <option value="1">1</option>
                      <option value="2">2</option>
                      <option value="3">3</option>
                   </select>
                </div>
                <div class="admin-badge-slot-row" data-slot-row="1">
                   <select class="admin-badge-select admin-badge-type">
                      <option value="">${state.lang==='vi' ? 'Chọn nhãn' : 'Choose label'}</option>
                      <option value="sale">${getBadgeLabel('sale')}</option>
                      <option value="best">${getBadgeLabel('best')}</option>
                      <option value="new">${getBadgeLabel('new')}</option>
                   </select>
                   <input class="admin-badge-color" type="color" value="#e11d48" title="Màu nhãn">
                </div>
                <div class="admin-badge-slot-row" data-slot-row="2">
                   <select class="admin-badge-select admin-badge-type">
                      <option value="">${state.lang==='vi' ? 'Chọn nhãn' : 'Choose label'}</option>
                      <option value="sale">${getBadgeLabel('sale')}</option>
                      <option value="best">${getBadgeLabel('best')}</option>
                      <option value="new">${getBadgeLabel('new')}</option>
                   </select>
                   <input class="admin-badge-color" type="color" value="#f59e0b" title="Màu nhãn">
                </div>
                <div class="admin-badge-slot-row" data-slot-row="3">
                   <select class="admin-badge-select admin-badge-type">
                      <option value="">${state.lang==='vi' ? 'Chọn nhãn' : 'Choose label'}</option>
                      <option value="sale">${getBadgeLabel('sale')}</option>
                      <option value="best">${getBadgeLabel('best')}</option>
                      <option value="new">${getBadgeLabel('new')}</option>
                   </select>
                   <input class="admin-badge-color" type="color" value="#10b981" title="Màu nhãn">
                </div>
                <div class="admin-sale-editor" data-sale-editor>
                   <div class="admin-sale-row">
                      <label>${state.lang==='vi' ? 'Giảm %' : 'Discount %'}</label>
                      <input class="admin-sale-percent" type="number" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="0">
                      <span style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--muted); font-weight:800;">%</span>
                   </div>
                   <div class="admin-sale-row">
                      <label>${state.lang==='vi' ? 'Màu ô %' : 'Badge bg'}</label>
                      <input class="admin-sale-swatch admin-sale-bg" type="color" value="#e11d48" title="Màu ô %">
                      <label>${state.lang==='vi' ? 'Màu chữ' : 'Text color'}</label>
                      <input class="admin-sale-swatch admin-sale-text" type="color" value="#ffffff" title="Màu chữ">
                   </div>
                   <div class="admin-sale-row">
                      <span style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--muted); font-weight:800; min-width:72px;">Preview</span>
                      <span class="admin-sale-preview" data-sale-preview>-0%</span>
                   </div>
                </div>
                <div class="admin-inline-actions">
                   <button class="btn admin-badge-save" onclick="adminSaveProductBadges('${p.id}')" title="Xác nhận"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></button>
                   <button class="btn danger" onclick="adminDeleteProduct('${p.id}')">${state.lang==='vi'?'Xóa':'Wipe'}</button>
                </div>
             </div>
          </td>
        `;
        pBody.appendChild(r);
        const editor = document.getElementById(`badge-editor-${p.id}`);
        if (editor) {
          const badges = normalizeProductBadges(p.badges, p);
          const countSelect = editor.querySelector('.admin-badge-count-select');
          const discountPercent = getProductDiscountPercent(p);
          if (countSelect) countSelect.value = String(Math.max(1, Math.min(3, badges.length || 1)));
          editor.querySelectorAll('[data-slot-row]').forEach(row => {
            const idx = parseInt(row.getAttribute('data-slot-row'), 10) || 1;
            const badge = badges[idx - 1] || badges[0] || null;
            const typeSelect = row.querySelector('.admin-badge-type');
            const colorInput = row.querySelector('.admin-badge-color');
            if (typeSelect) typeSelect.value = badge ? badge.type : '';
            if (badge && colorInput) colorInput.value = badge.color;
          });
          const saleEditor = editor.querySelector('.admin-sale-editor');
          const salePercentInput = editor.querySelector('.admin-sale-percent');
          const saleBgInput = editor.querySelector('.admin-sale-bg');
          const saleTextInput = editor.querySelector('.admin-sale-text');
          const salePreview = editor.querySelector('[data-sale-preview]');
          if (salePercentInput) salePercentInput.value = String(discountPercent);
          if (saleBgInput) saleBgInput.value = p.discountBadgeBg || '#e11d48';
          if (saleTextInput) saleTextInput.value = p.discountTextColor || '#ffffff';
          const updateSalePreview = () => {
            const pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, parseInt(salePercentInput?.value || '0', 10) || 0));
            if (salePreview) {
              salePreview.textContent = `-${pct}%`;
              salePreview.style.background = saleBgInput?.value || '#e11d48';
              salePreview.style.color = saleTextInput?.value || '#ffffff';
            }
          };
          updateSalePreview();
          [salePercentInput, saleBgInput, saleTextInput].forEach(el => el && el.addEventListener('input', updateSalePreview));
          editor.querySelectorAll('.admin-badge-type').forEach(sel => sel.addEventListener('change', () => toggleAdminBadgeSlots(p.id, countSelect ? countSelect.value : String(Math.max(1, Math.min(3, badges.length || 1))))));
          toggleAdminBadgeSlots(p.id, countSelect ? countSelect.value : String(Math.max(1, Math.min(3, badges.length || 1))));
        }
      });

      // Render Hóa Đơn Đơn Hàng (có chọn ngày giao & xác nhận)
      const oBody = $('adminOrderTableBody'); oBody.innerHTML = '';
      const globalOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('al_global_orders')) || [];
      if(globalOrders.length === 0) {
        oBody.innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center; color:var(--muted);">${state.lang==='vi'?'Chưa có đơn hàng nào.':'No orders logged.'}</td></tr>`;
      } else {
        globalOrders.forEach(o => {
          const itemsSummary = o.items.map(i => `${i.name} (${i.size}) x${i.qty}`).join('<br>');
          const r = document.createElement('tr');

          const days = Math.max(1, Math.min(30, parseInt(o.estimatedDays, 10) || 3));
          const confirmed = String(o.status || '') === 'Đã Xác Nhận';
          let statusStyle = 'color:var(--warning)';
          if(confirmed) statusStyle = 'color:var(--success); font-weight:800;';
          if(o.status === "Đã Hủy") statusStyle = 'color:var(--accent); text-decoration:line-through;';

          r.innerHTML = `
            <td><code style="color:var(--primary); font-weight:700;">${o.orderId}</code></td>
            <td>
               <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
                  <img src="${o.userAvatar || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80'}" style="width:28px; height:28px; border-radius:50%; object-fit:cover;">
                  <b>${o.userOwner}</b>
               </div>
            </td>
            <td><b>${o.customerName}</b><br><small>${o.customerPhone}</small></td>
            <td>
               <div style="font-size:11px; max-width:220px; line-height:1.3;">${itemsSummary}</div>
               <div class="order-img-strip">
                  ${o.items.map(i => `<img src="${i.image}" class="order-thumbnail">`).join('')}
               </div>
            </td>
            <td><div style="font-size:11px; max-width:180px;">${o.customerAddress}</div><span class="badge-tag" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color:var(--primary); font-size:9px; padding:2px 6px;">${o.bankName}</span></td>
            <td>
              <span style="${statusStyle}"><i class="fa-solid ${confirmed ? 'fa-circle-check' : 'fa-circle-dot'}"></i> ${o.status}</span><br>
              <small style="font-weight:700;">${o.totalAmount}</small><br>
              <small style="color:var(--muted);">ETA: ${days} ngày</small>
            </td>
            <td>
               <div style="display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center;">
                  <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:4px;">
                    <small style="color:var(--muted); font-size:10px; font-weight:700;">${state.lang==='vi'?'Ngày giao':'Delivery days'}</small>
                    <input type="number" min="1" max="30" value="${days}" id="adminShipDays_${o.orderId}" class="form-control" style="width:74px; padding:6px 8px; font-size:12px;">
                  </div>
                  <button class="btn success" style="padding:6px 10px; font-size:12px;" onclick="adminApproveOrder('${o.orderId}')" title="Duyệt đơn & chọn số ngày">✓</button>
                  <button class="btn danger" style="padding:6px 10px; font-size:12px;" onclick="adminRejectOrder('${o.orderId}')" title="Hủy đơn hàng">✕</button>
               </div>
            </td>
          `;
          oBody.appendChild(r);
        });
      }

      // Render Khách hàng
      const uBody = $('adminUserTableBody'); uBody.innerHTML = '';
      state.users.forEach(u => {
        const credits = Math.max(0, Number(u.spinCredits) || 0);
        const paymentMethod = u.paymentMethod || (u.bankName ? 'bank' : 'cash');
        const bankName = paymentMethod === 'bank' ? (u.bankName || 'Chưa chọn ngân hàng') : '';
        const r = document.createElement('tr');
        r.innerHTML = `
          <td><b>${u.username}</b></td>
          <td>${u.name || '<i style="color:var(--muted)">Chưa thiết lập</i>'}</td>
          <td>${u.address || '<i style="color:var(--muted)">Chưa điền</i>'}</td>
          <td>
            <span class="badge-tag" style="background:${paymentMethod === 'bank' ? 'rgba(0,240,255,0.1)' : 'rgba(245,158,11,0.12)'}; color:${paymentMethod === 'bank' ? 'var(--primary)' : 'var(--warning)'};">
              ${paymentMethod === 'bank' ? 'Chuyển khoản ngân hàng' : 'Tiền mặt'}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            ${paymentMethod === 'bank'
              ? `<span class="badge-tag" style="background:rgba(0,240,255,0.1); color:var(--primary);">${bankName}</span>`
              : '<i style="color:var(--muted)">—</i>'}
          </td>
          <td>
            <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <button class="btn secondary" style="padding:4px 8px; font-size:11px;" onclick="adminAdjustUserSpinCredits('${u.username}', -1)">-</button>
              <b style="min-width:22px; text-align:center;">${credits}</b>
              <button class="btn secondary" style="padding:4px 8px; font-size:11px;" onclick="adminAdjustUserSpinCredits('${u.username}', 1)">+</button>
              <button class="btn secondary" style="padding:4px 8px; font-size:11px;" onclick="adminSetUserSpinCredits('${u.username}')">Nhập</button>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><button class="btn danger" style="padding:6px 10px; font-size:11px;" onclick="adminDeleteUser('${u.username}')">Xóa tài khoản</button></td>
        `;
        uBody.appendChild(r);
      });

      renderWheelAdminPanel();
    }

    // ==========================================================================
    // 11. TOAST SYSTEM INTEGRATION
    // ==========================================================================
    function showToast(text) {
      const t = document.createElement('div'); t.className = 'toast'; t.textContent = text;
      $('toastContainer').appendChild(t);
      setTimeout(() => t.remove(), 4000);
    }

    applyTheme();
    refreshPaymentUI();
    setInterval(() => { if($('promoBoardContent')) renderPromoBoard(); }, 60000);

    // KHỞI CHẠY KHỐI CORE KHI TẢI TRANG HỒ SƠ CHUẨN
    window.onload = () => {
      initLocalImageUploaders();
    $('profPaymentMethod')?.addEventListener('change', toggleProfileBankTypeBox);
    toggleProfileBankTypeBox();
      updateHeaderAuthUI();
      renderSavedCollections();
      renderSearchSuggestions();
      renderProducts();
      renderTopCollections();
      renderPromoBoard();
      renderCart();
      updateUnreadBadgeDOM();
      if(window.location.hash === '#admin-zone') {
         $('admin-zone').style.display = "block";
         renderAdminDashboard();
      }
    };
  </script>

<script>
(() => {
  const HERO_STORAGE_KEY = 'al_hero_slides';
  const HERO_ACTIVE_KEY = 'al_hero_active_index';
  const HERO_COUNT_KEY = 'al_hero_visible_count';
  const COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY = 'al_collection_board_v2';

  const HERO_MAX = 9;
  const COLLECTION_MAX = 9;
  const TAB_KEYS = ['sale'];

  const TAB_META = {
    sale: { vi: 'Hàng giảm giá', en: 'Sale Picks', icon: 'fa-tag', accent: 'var(--accent)' },
    best: { vi: 'Bán chạy', en: 'Best Sellers', icon: 'fa-fire', accent: 'var(--warning)' },
    new: { vi: 'Hàng mới', en: 'New Arrivals', icon: 'fa-sparkles', accent: 'var(--success)' }
  };

  const defaultHeroSlides = () => ([
    {
      badge: 'Bộ sưu tập Outdoor',
      badgeColor: '#2563eb',
      title: 'Bứt Phá Giới Hạn Cùng Stanley Classic',
      desc: 'Sở hữu cơ chế nắp bật FreeSip thông minh chống rò rỉ tuyệt đối. Thiết kế công thái học hoàn hảo cho mọi chuyến phiêu lưu.',
      ctaText: 'Khám Phá',
      ctaLink: '#shop',
      image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1514820639969-4f6e8d2e8bfa?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=80',
      logo: ''
    },
    {
      badge: 'Bộ sưu tập Sáng Tạo',
      badgeColor: '#7c3aed',
      title: 'Nâng Cấp Bàn Làm Việc Của Bạn',
      desc: 'Tối giản, sang trọng, dễ thay đổi phong cách. Banner phù hợp cho dòng sản phẩm văn phòng, học tập và quà tặng.',
      ctaText: 'Xem ngay',
      ctaLink: '#shop',
      image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1495474472287-4d71bcdd2085?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=80',
      logo: ''
    },
    {
      badge: 'Bộ sưu tập Thể thao',
      badgeColor: '#0ea5e9',
      title: 'Thiết Kế Năng Động Cho Mọi Chuyến Đi',
      desc: 'Khung hình rộng, tương thích điện thoại, PC và nhiều phong cách banner khác nhau. Dễ chỉnh sửa bằng ảnh local.',
      ctaText: 'Mua ngay',
      ctaLink: '#shop',
      image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506157786151-b8491531f063?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=80',
      logo: ''
    },
    {
      badge: 'Bộ sưu tập Ceramic',
      badgeColor: '#f59e0b',
      title: 'Hiệu Ứng Mềm Mại, Tinh Tế Và Sạch Sẽ',
      desc: 'Phù hợp khi muốn chuyển đổi nhanh nội dung hero bằng ảnh và chữ có thể chỉnh trực tiếp trong admin.',
      ctaText: 'Khám phá',
      ctaLink: '#shop',
      image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=80',
      logo: ''
    },
    {
      badge: 'Bộ sưu tập Premium',
      badgeColor: '#ec4899',
      title: 'Tối Ưu Cho Trang Chủ Từ 1 Đến 9 Banner',
      desc: 'Bạn có thể thay chữ, đổi ảnh nền, chọn link sản phẩm và sắp xếp lại thứ tự từng banner ngay trong trang quản trị.',
      ctaText: 'Tùy chỉnh',
      ctaLink: '#admin-zone',
      image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=80',
      logo: ''
    },
    {
      badge: 'Banner 6',
      badgeColor: '#14b8a6',
      title: 'Banner trống #6',
      desc: 'Chọn ảnh mới, tiêu đề mới và link sản phẩm cho banner này trong khu quản trị.',
      ctaText: 'Thay banner',
      ctaLink: '#admin-zone',
      image: '',
      logo: ''
    },
    {
      badge: 'Banner 7',
      badgeColor: '#ef4444',
      title: 'Banner trống #7',
      desc: 'Mẫu này sẵn sàng để bạn thêm nội dung riêng cho chiến dịch hoặc sản phẩm nổi bật.',
      ctaText: 'Thay banner',
      ctaLink: '#admin-zone',
      image: '',
      logo: ''
    },
    {
      badge: 'Banner 8',
      badgeColor: '#22c55e',
      title: 'Banner trống #8',
      desc: 'Bạn có thể thêm tiêu đề, ảnh và logo mới để đồng bộ với bố cục cửa hàng.',
      ctaText: 'Thay banner',
      ctaLink: '#admin-zone',
      image: '',
      logo: ''
    },
    {
      badge: 'Banner 9',
      badgeColor: '#a855f7',
      title: 'Banner trống #9',
      desc: 'Khi không dùng, banner này vẫn có thể giữ chỗ cho đợt nội dung tiếp theo.',
      ctaText: 'Thay banner',
      ctaLink: '#admin-zone',
      image: '',
      logo: ''
    }
  ]);

  const defaultCollectionBoard = () => {
    const products = Array.isArray(state.products) ? [...state.products] : [];
    const unique = (arr) => [...new Set((arr || []).filter(Boolean))].slice(0, COLLECTION_MAX);
    const bySold = [...products].sort((a, b) => toNumber(b.sold, 0) - toNumber(a.sold, 0)).map(p => p.id);
    const sale = [...products]
      .filter(p => getProductDiscountPercent(p) > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => {
        const da = Math.max(0, toNumber(a.oldPrice, 0) - toNumber(a.basePrice, 0));
        const db = Math.max(0, toNumber(b.oldPrice, 0) - toNumber(b.basePrice, 0));
        return db - da;
      })
      .map(p => p.id)
      .concat(bySold);

    return {
      activeTab: 'sale',
      saleIds: unique(sale).slice(0, COLLECTION_MAX)
    };
  };

  const normalizeCollectionBoard = (board = {}) => {
    const fallback = defaultCollectionBoard();
    const validIds = new Set((state.products || []).map(p => p.id));
    const clean = (input, fallbackIds) => {
      const out = [];
      const source = Array.isArray(input) ? input : [];
      source.concat(fallbackIds || []).forEach(id => {
        if (id && validIds.has(id) && !out.includes(id) && out.length < COLLECTION_MAX) out.push(id);
      });
      return out;
    };

    return {
      activeTab: 'sale',
      saleIds: clean(board.saleIds || (board.saleId ? [board.saleId] : []), fallback.saleIds)
    };
  };

  const collectionBoardToPromoBoard = (board = {}) => {
    const normalized = normalizeCollectionBoard(board);
    const pad = (arr, count) => {
      const out = Array.isArray(arr) ? arr.slice(0, count) : [];
      while (out.length < count) out.push('');
      return out;
    };
    const saleCount = Math.max(1, Math.min(COLLECTION_MAX, normalized.saleIds.length || 1));
    return {
      saleCount,
      saleItems: pad(normalized.saleIds, saleCount).map((id) => ({
        productId: id,
        discount: 20,
        endsAt: ''
      }))
    };
  };

  const promoBoardToCollectionBoard = (board = {}) => {
    const saleIds = (Array.isArray(board.saleItems) ? board.saleItems : []).map(item => item?.productId).filter(Boolean);
    return normalizeCollectionBoard({
      activeTab: 'sale',
      saleIds
    });
  };

  const normalizeHeroSlides = (slides = []) => {
    const fallback = defaultHeroSlides();
    const arr = Array.isArray(slides) ? slides.slice(0, HERO_MAX) : [];
    while (arr.length < HERO_MAX) arr.push({});
    return arr.map((s, i) => ({
      badge: String(s.badge || fallback[i].badge || '').trim(),
      badgeColor: String(s.badgeColor || fallback[i].badgeColor || '#2563eb').trim() || '#2563eb',
      title: String(s.title || fallback[i].title || '').trim(),
      desc: String(s.desc || fallback[i].desc || '').trim(),
      ctaText: String(s.ctaText || fallback[i].ctaText || '').trim(),
      ctaLink: String(s.ctaLink || fallback[i].ctaLink || '#shop').trim(),
      image: String(s.image || fallback[i].image || '').trim(),
      logo: String(s.logo || '').trim()
    }));
  };

  const loadJson = (key, fallback) => {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(key);
      if (!raw) return fallback;
      return JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch {
      return fallback;
    }
  };

  const saveJson = (key, value) => {
    try {
      localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
      return true;
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn('Unable to persist data to localStorage:', err);
      return false;
    }
  };

  function getHeroSlides() {
    return normalizeHeroSlides(loadJson(HERO_STORAGE_KEY, defaultHeroSlides()));
  }

  function setHeroSlides(slides) {
    state.heroSlides = normalizeHeroSlides(slides);
    try {
      saveJson(HERO_STORAGE_KEY, state.heroSlides);
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn('Hero slides updated in memory, but persistence failed:', err);
    }
  }

  function getCollectionBoard() {
    return normalizeCollectionBoard(loadJson(COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY, defaultCollectionBoard()));
  }

  function setCollectionBoard(board) {
    state.collectionBoard = normalizeCollectionBoard(board);
    saveJson(COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY, state.collectionBoard);
  }

  function cssUrl(value = '') {
    const safe = String(value || '').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
    return `url("${safe}")`;
  }

  function hexToRgba(input, alpha = 0.1) {
    const hex = String(input || '').trim().replace('#', '');
    if (!/^[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}$/.test(hex)) return `rgba(37,99,235,${alpha})`;
    let r = 37, g = 99, b = 235;
    if (hex.length === 3) {
      r = parseInt(hex[0] + hex[0], 16);
      g = parseInt(hex[1] + hex[1], 16);
      b = parseInt(hex[2] + hex[2], 16);
    } else if (hex.length >= 6) {
      r = parseInt(hex.slice(0, 2), 16);
      g = parseInt(hex.slice(2, 4), 16);
      b = parseInt(hex.slice(4, 6), 16);
    }
    return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`;
  }

  function heroActiveIndex() {
    const n = Number(loadJson(HERO_ACTIVE_KEY, 0));
    return Number.isFinite(n) ? Math.max(0, Math.min(HERO_MAX - 1, n)) : 0;
  }

  function setHeroActiveIndex(idx) {
    const safe = Math.max(0, Math.min(HERO_MAX - 1, Number(idx) || 0));
    saveJson(HERO_ACTIVE_KEY, safe);
    return safe;
  }

  function heroVisibleCount() {
    const n = Number(loadJson(HERO_COUNT_KEY, 5));
    return Number.isFinite(n) ? Math.max(1, Math.min(HERO_MAX, n)) : 5;
  }

  function setHeroVisibleCount(count) {
    const safe = Math.max(1, Math.min(HERO_MAX, Number(count) || 5));
    saveJson(HERO_COUNT_KEY, safe);
    return safe;
  }

  function showHeroSlide(index) {
    const slides = document.querySelectorAll('#heroSlider .slide');
    if (!slides.length) return;
    const current = (index + slides.length) % slides.length;
    slides.forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
    slides[current].classList.add('active');
    setHeroActiveIndex(current);
  }

  let heroTimer = null;
  function startHeroTimer() {
    if (heroTimer) clearInterval(heroTimer);
    heroTimer = setInterval(() => {
      const slides = document.querySelectorAll('#heroSlider .slide');
      if (!slides.length) return;
      const current = slides.findIndex ? slides.findIndex(s => s.classList.contains('active')) : Array.from(slides).findIndex(s => s.classList.contains('active'));
      showHeroSlide((current >= 0 ? current : 0) + 1);
    }, 6500);
  }

  function renderHeroSlider() {
    const host = document.getElementById('heroSlider');
    if (!host) return;

    const count = heroVisibleCount();
    const slides = getHeroSlides().slice(0, count);
    const activeRaw = heroActiveIndex();
    const active = slides.length ? Math.min(activeRaw, slides.length - 1) : 0;
    if (active !== activeRaw) setHeroActiveIndex(active);

    host.innerHTML = slides.map((slide, idx) => {
      const accent = slide.badgeColor || '#2563eb';
      const ctaLink = String(slide.ctaLink || '#shop').trim() || '#shop';
      const imageMarkup = slide.image
        ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(slide.image)}" alt="${escapeHtml(slide.title || 'Hero banner')}" loading="eager">`
        : `<div class="slide-media-fallback"><div><i class="fa-solid fa-image" style="font-size:2rem;display:block;margin-bottom:10px;"></i><div>Bấm vào khung ảnh trong phần chỉnh sửa để chọn ảnh banner</div></div></div>`;
      return `
      <div class="slide${idx === active ? ' active' : ''}" data-hero-index="${idx}" data-link="${escapeHtml(ctaLink)}" style="cursor:pointer;">
        <div class="slide-media">${imageMarkup}</div>
        <div class="slide-content">
          <div class="slide-copy-inner">
            <span class="slide-tag" style="border-color:${accent}; color:${accent}; background:${hexToRgba(accent, 0.10)};">${escapeHtml(slide.badge)}</span>
            <h2 class="slide-title">${escapeHtml(slide.title)}</h2>
            <p class="slide-desc">${escapeHtml(slide.desc)}</p>
            <a href="${escapeHtml(ctaLink)}" class="btn primary" style="background:${hexToRgba(accent, 0.95)}; box-shadow:0 10px 24px ${hexToRgba(accent, 0.25)};">
              <span>${escapeHtml(slide.ctaText || (state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Khám Phá' : 'Explore'))}</span>
              <i class="fa-solid fa-compass"></i>
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('') + `
      <div class="slider-nav">
        <div class="slider-btn" id="prevSlide"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-left"></i></div>
        <div class="slider-btn" id="nextSlide"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-right"></i></div>
      </div>
    `;

    const prev = document.getElementById('prevSlide');
    const next = document.getElementById('nextSlide');
    if (prev) prev.onclick = () => showHeroSlide(heroActiveIndex() - 1);
    if (next) next.onclick = () => showHeroSlide(heroActiveIndex() + 1);

    Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#heroSlider .slide')).forEach((slide) => {
      slide.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target.closest('a, button, .slider-btn')) return;
        const link = slide.dataset.link || '#shop';
        if (link && !link.startsWith('javascript:')) window.location.href = link;
      });
    });

    startHeroTimer();
  }

  function heroEditorCard(idx, slide) {
    const accent = slide.badgeColor || '#2563eb';
    return `
      <div class="hero-admin-card${idx === heroActiveIndex() ? ' active' : ''}" data-hero-card="${idx}" style="border-color:${accent}; ${idx === heroActiveIndex() ? `box-shadow:0 0 0 2px ${hexToRgba(accent, .22)}` : ''}">
        <button type="button" class="hero-admin-preview" id="heroPreviewBtn${idx}" title="Bấm để đổi ảnh nền" style="border:1px dashed ${accent}; background:${hexToRgba(accent, 0.05)}; cursor:pointer;">
          ${slide.image ? `<img data-preview-image="${idx}" src="${escapeHtml(slide.image)}" alt="Hero ${idx + 1}">` : `<div class="fallback" data-preview-fallback="${idx}"><i class="fa-solid fa-image" style="font-size:1.35rem;display:block;margin-bottom:8px;"></i>Bấm để chọn ảnh banner</div>`}
          <div style="position:absolute;left:10px;bottom:10px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px;background:${hexToRgba(accent,0.9)};color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;">Bấm để đổi ảnh</div>
        </button>
        <div class="hero-admin-fields">
          <div class="field-full">
            <label><i class="fa-solid fa-pen"></i> Tiêu đề banner ${idx + 1}</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="heroTitle${idx}" value="${escapeHtml(slide.title)}" placeholder="Tiêu đề chính">
          </div>
          <div class="field-full">
            <label>Nhãn banner / Bộ sưu tập Thể thao</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="heroBadge${idx}" value="${escapeHtml(slide.badge)}" placeholder="Ví dụ: Bộ sưu tập Thể thao">
          </div>
          <div class="field-full">
            <label>Nội dung ngắn</label>
            <textarea class="form-control" id="heroDesc${idx}" placeholder="Mô tả ngắn">${escapeHtml(slide.desc)}</textarea>
          </div>
          <div>
            <label>Chữ nút</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="heroCtaText${idx}" value="${escapeHtml(slide.ctaText)}" placeholder="Khám Phá">
          </div>
          <div>
            <label>Link sản phẩm</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="heroCtaLink${idx}" value="${escapeHtml(slide.ctaLink || '#shop')}" placeholder="#shop hoặc link sản phẩm">
          </div>
          <div>
            <label>Màu nhãn / khung</label>
            <input type="color" class="form-control" id="heroBadgeColor${idx}" value="${escapeHtml(accent)}" style="padding:4px;height:44px;">
          </div>
          <div class="field-full">
            <label>Ảnh nền banner</label>
            <input type="file" class="form-control" id="heroImageFile${idx}" accept="image/*">
            <input type="hidden" id="heroImage${idx}" value="${escapeHtml(slide.image)}">
            <div class="hero-thumb-row">
              <span class="hero-thumb-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i> <span id="heroImageLabel${idx}">${slide.image ? 'Đã có ảnh' : 'Chưa chọn ảnh'}</span></span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function injectHeroAdminBox() {
    const adminPanel = document.getElementById('adminProductPanel');
    if (!adminPanel) return;
    if (document.getElementById('heroAdminBox')) return;
    const promoBox = adminPanel.querySelector('.admin-create-box');
    if (!promoBox) return;
    const box = document.createElement('div');
    box.className = 'hero-admin-box';
    box.id = 'heroAdminBox';
    box.innerHTML = `
      <div class="hero-admin-head">
        <div>
          <h4>🎬 Chỉnh sửa banner hero</h4>
          <div class="hero-admin-note" style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-top:6px;">Chọn số banner muốn dùng từ 1 đến 9, rồi chỉnh chữ, ảnh và link cho từng banner.</div>
          <div class="hero-admin-note">Mỗi banner có thể bấm trực tiếp vào khung ảnh để đổi nhanh, ảnh được lưu nội bộ bằng dữ liệu local.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-admin-note" style="max-width:260px;text-align:right;">Khi bấm vào banner ngoài trang chủ, người xem sẽ được đưa thẳng đến link sản phẩm bạn đặt.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-admin-bulk">
        <div>
          <label style="display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;">Số banner đầu trang muốn dùng</label>
          <select class="sort-select" id="heroCountSelect" style="width:100%;max-width:220px;">
            ${Array.from({length: HERO_MAX}, (_, i) => i + 1).map(n => `<option value="${n}" ${n === heroVisibleCount() ? 'selected' : ''}>${n} banner</option>`).join('')}
          </select>
          <div class="hero-thumb-row"><span class="hero-thumb-chip" id="heroBulkLabel">Chọn ảnh từ máy tính hoặc điện thoại trực tiếp</span></div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn secondary" type="button" id="heroResetBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-left"></i> Khôi phục mẫu</button>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-admin-grid" id="heroAdminGrid"></div>
      <div class="collection-admin-actions" style="margin-top:14px;">
        <button class="btn primary" type="button" id="heroSaveBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i> Lưu banner hero</button>
      </div>
    `;
    adminPanel.insertBefore(box, promoBox.nextSibling);
    renderHeroAdminEditor();
  }

  async function dataUrlFromFile(file) {
    if (!file) return '';
    return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result || ''));
      reader.onerror = () => reject(reader.error || new Error('File read error'));
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });
  }

  function bindHeroAdminFiles() {
    const bulk = document.getElementById('heroBulkFiles');
    if (bulk) {
      bulk.onchange = async () => {
        const files = [...(bulk.files || [])].slice(0, HERO_MAX);
        if (!files.length) return;
        const urls = await Promise.all(files.map(dataUrlFromFile));
        const slides = getHeroSlides();
        urls.forEach((url, i) => {
          if (slides[i]) slides[i].image = url;
        });
        setHeroSlides(slides);
        renderHeroAdminEditor();
        renderHeroSlider();
        const lbl = document.getElementById('heroBulkLabel');
        if (lbl) lbl.textContent = `${urls.length} ảnh đã chọn`;
      };
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < HERO_MAX; i++) {
      const imgFile = document.getElementById(`heroImageFile${i}`);
      const imgHidden = document.getElementById(`heroImage${i}`);
      const imgLabel = document.getElementById(`heroImageLabel${i}`);
      const previewBtn = document.getElementById(`heroPreviewBtn${i}`);

      if (previewBtn && imgFile) {
        previewBtn.onclick = () => imgFile.click();
      }

      if (imgFile) imgFile.onchange = async () => {
        const file = imgFile.files && imgFile.files[0];
        if (!file) return;
        const url = await dataUrlFromFile(file);
        const slides = getHeroSlides();
        if (slides[i]) slides[i].image = url;
        if (imgHidden) imgHidden.value = url;
        if (imgLabel) imgLabel.textContent = file.name || 'Đã có ảnh';
        setHeroSlides(slides);
        renderHeroAdminEditor();
        renderHeroSlider();
      };
    }

    const countSelect = document.getElementById('heroCountSelect');
    if (countSelect) {
      countSelect.onchange = () => {
        setHeroVisibleCount(countSelect.value);
        renderHeroAdminEditor();
        renderHeroSlider();
        showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? `Đã chọn ${heroVisibleCount()} banner đầu trang.` : `Selected ${heroVisibleCount()} hero banners.`);
      };
    }

    const saveBtn = document.getElementById('heroSaveBtn');
    if (saveBtn) saveBtn.onclick = () => saveHeroSlidesFromEditor();
    const resetBtn = document.getElementById('heroResetBtn');
    if (resetBtn) resetBtn.onclick = () => {
      setHeroSlides(defaultHeroSlides());
      renderHeroAdminEditor();
      renderHeroSlider();
      showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã khôi phục banner mẫu.' : 'Hero banner reset to defaults.');
    };
  }

  function renderHeroAdminEditor() {
    const grid = document.getElementById('heroAdminGrid');
    if (!grid) return;
    const visible = heroVisibleCount();
    const slides = getHeroSlides().slice(0, visible);
    grid.innerHTML = slides.map((slide, i) => heroEditorCard(i, slide)).join('');
    bindHeroAdminFiles();
  }

  function saveHeroSlidesFromEditor() {
    if (!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'chỉnh banner hero' : 'hero banner editing')) return;
    const visible = heroVisibleCount();
    const current = getHeroSlides();
    const slides = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < HERO_MAX; i++) {
      if (i < visible) {
        slides.push({
          badge: document.getElementById(`heroBadge${i}`)?.value || current[i]?.badge || '',
          badgeColor: document.getElementById(`heroBadgeColor${i}`)?.value || current[i]?.badgeColor || '#2563eb',
          title: document.getElementById(`heroTitle${i}`)?.value || current[i]?.title || '',
          desc: document.getElementById(`heroDesc${i}`)?.value || current[i]?.desc || '',
          ctaText: document.getElementById(`heroCtaText${i}`)?.value || current[i]?.ctaText || '',
          ctaLink: document.getElementById(`heroCtaLink${i}`)?.value || current[i]?.ctaLink || '#shop',
          image: document.getElementById(`heroImage${i}`)?.value || current[i]?.image || '',
        });
      } else {
        slides.push(current[i] || {});
      }
    }
    setHeroSlides(slides);
    renderHeroSlider();
    renderHeroAdminEditor();
    showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã lưu banner hero.' : 'Hero banner saved.');
  }

  function productCardHTML(productId, labelIndex, tabKey) {
    const p = (state.products || []).find(item => item.id === productId);
    if (!p) {
      return `
        <div class="collection-product-card">
          <div class="collection-product-media"></div>
          <div class="collection-product-body">
            <div class="collection-product-title">${escapeHtml(`Ô trống #${labelIndex}`)}</div>
            <div class="collection-product-meta"><span>${TAB_META[tabKey].vi}</span><span>#${labelIndex}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
    }
    const sizeKey = getDefaultSizeKey(p);
    const img = getPrimaryProductImage(p, sizeKey);
    const price = formatMoney(calculatePriceBySize(p.basePrice, sizeKey, p));
    const saleMeta = tabKey === 'sale'
      ? (state.promoBoard?.saleItems || []).find(item => String(item?.productId || '') === String(p.id)) || null
      : null;
    const discount = saleMeta?.discount ?? getProductDiscountPercent(p);
    const oldPrice = tabKey === 'sale' && discount ? formatMoney(getSaleOldPriceBySize(p, sizeKey)) : '';
    const countdown = saleMeta?.endsAt ? getSaleCountdownLabel(saleMeta.endsAt) : '';
    return `
      <div class="collection-product-card">
        <div class="collection-product-media">
          ${img ? `<img src="${img}" alt="${escapeHtml(p.name)}">` : ''}
          ${tabKey === 'sale' && discount ? `<span class="badge-tag sale" style="position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;">-${discount}%</span>` : ''}
        </div>
        <div class="collection-product-body">
          <div class="collection-product-title">${escapeHtml(p.name)}</div>
          <div class="collection-product-meta">
            <span>${escapeHtml(p.category || '')}</span>
            <span>${price}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="collection-product-meta">
            <span>${p.rating ? `★ ${Number(p.rating).toFixed(1)}` : ''}</span>
            <span>${escapeHtml(p.material || '')}</span>
          </div>
          ${tabKey === 'sale' && discount ? `<div class="collection-product-meta"><span>${escapeHtml(oldPrice ? `-${discount}% · ${oldPrice}` : `-${discount}%`)}</span><span>${escapeHtml(countdown || (state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ưu đãi có hạn' : 'Limited offer'))}</span></div>` : ''}
          <div class="collection-product-actions">
            <button class="btn secondary" type="button" onclick="triggerQuickview('${p.id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i></button>
            <button class="btn primary" type="button" onclick="quickAddToCart('${p.id}', '${sizeKey}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-cart-shopping"></i></button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function getBoardList(tabKey) {
    const board = state.collectionBoard || getCollectionBoard();
    const fallback = defaultCollectionBoard();
    const key = `${tabKey}Ids`;
    const arr = Array.isArray(board[key]) && board[key].length ? board[key] : fallback[key];
    return [...new Set((arr || []).filter(Boolean))].slice(0, COLLECTION_MAX);
  }

  window.setCollectionTab = function(tabKey) {
    if (tabKey !== 'sale') return;
    state.collectionBoard = normalizeCollectionBoard(state.collectionBoard || getCollectionBoard());
    state.collectionBoard.activeTab = 'sale';
    state.featuredFilter = 'sale';
    saveJson(COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY, state.collectionBoard);
    renderTopCollections();
    renderPromoBoard();
    renderProducts();
    renderCollectionAdminEditor();
  };

  function renderFlashSaleCountdown(endsAt) {
    const target = Number(new Date(endsAt).getTime());
    if (!Number.isFinite(target) || target <= 0) {
      return state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đang diễn ra' : 'Live now';
    }
    const diff = target - Date.now();
    if (diff <= 0) {
      return state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đang diễn ra' : 'Live now';
    }
    const totalSeconds = Math.floor(diff / 1000);
    const hours = Math.floor(totalSeconds / 3600);
    const minutes = Math.floor((totalSeconds % 3600) / 60);
    const seconds = totalSeconds % 60;
    return `
      <b>${String(hours).padStart(2, '0')}</b>
      <span>:</span>
      <b>${String(minutes).padStart(2, '0')}</b>
      <span>:</span>
      <b>${String(seconds).padStart(2, '0')}</b>
    `;
  }

  function refreshFlashSaleTicker() {
    if (window.__flashSaleTicker) clearInterval(window.__flashSaleTicker);
    window.__flashSaleTicker = setInterval(() => {
      const el = document.getElementById('flashSaleTimer');
      if (!el) return;
      const board = normalizePromoBoard(state.promoBoard || {});
      const theme = normalizeFlashSaleTheme(board.flashSaleTheme || {});
      el.innerHTML = renderFlashSaleCountdown(el.dataset.endsAt || '');
      el.querySelectorAll('b').forEach(b => {
        b.style.background = theme.timerDigitBg;
        b.style.color = theme.timerDigitText;
      });
      el.querySelectorAll('span').forEach(s => { s.style.color = theme.timerSepColor; });
    }, 1000);
  }

  function renderPromoBoard() {
    const host = document.getElementById('promoBoardContent');
    if (!host) return;

    state.collectionBoard = normalizeCollectionBoard(state.collectionBoard || getCollectionBoard());
    state.promoBoard = normalizePromoBoard(state.promoBoard || {});

    const rawSaleIds = getBoardList('sale');
    const saleIds = [...rawSaleIds];
    if (saleIds.length < 3) {
      const fallbackIds = (state.products || [])
        .map(p => p?.id)
        .filter(Boolean)
        .filter(id => !saleIds.includes(id))
        .slice(0, 3 - saleIds.length);
      saleIds.push(...fallbackIds);
    }
    const visibleSaleCount = Math.min(Math.max(saleIds.length, 3), COLLECTION_MAX);
    const theme = normalizeFlashSaleTheme(state.promoBoard.flashSaleTheme || {});
    const saleEndsAt = state.promoBoard.flashSaleEndsAt || '';
    const saleTimerHTML = renderFlashSaleCountdown(saleEndsAt);

    host.innerHTML = `
      <div class="promo-board-summary flash-sale-summary">
        <div class="left">
          <div class="flash-sale-brand"><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> Flash Sale</div>
          <p>${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Ưu đãi nóng đang diễn ra. Kéo ngang để xem các sản phẩm giảm giá nổi bật.' : 'Hot deals are live. Scroll horizontally to browse the featured sale items.'}</p>
        </div>
        <div class="flash-sale-clock">
          <span data-vi="Kết thúc trong" data-en="Ends in">Kết thúc trong</span>
          <span class="flash-sale-timer" id="flashSaleTimer" data-ends-at="${escapeHtml(saleEndsAt)}">${saleTimerHTML}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="collection-scroll-actions">
          <span class="pill" style="display:inline-flex;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(17,24,39,.05);border:1px solid rgba(17,24,39,.08);font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;color:#111827;">
            ${visibleSaleCount} / ${COLLECTION_MAX}
          </span>
          <button type="button" class="collection-scroll-btn" id="collectionScrollPrev" aria-label="Scroll left"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-left"></i></button>
          <button type="button" class="collection-scroll-btn" id="collectionScrollNext" aria-label="Scroll right"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-right"></i></button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="collection-products-wrap">
        <div class="collection-product-grid flash-sale-grid" id="collectionProductGrid">
          ${saleIds.length ? saleIds.map((id, idx) => productCardHTML(id, idx + 1, 'sale')).join('') : `
            <div class="collection-product-card" style="grid-column:1/-1;">
              <div class="collection-product-body" style="min-height:120px;place-items:center;text-align:center;">
                <div class="collection-product-title">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Chưa có sản phẩm trong Flash Sale' : 'No products in Flash Sale yet'}</div>
                <div class="collection-product-meta">${state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Mở khu quản trị để chọn sản phẩm giảm giá.' : 'Open the admin panel to assign sale products.'}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          `}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;

    const shell = host.closest('.flash-sale-shell');
    if (shell) {
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-shell-start', theme.shellStart);
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-shell-end', theme.shellEnd);
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-summary-bg', theme.summaryBg);
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-brand-color', theme.brandColor);
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-brand-icon', theme.brandIconColor);
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-timer-label', theme.timerLabelColor);
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-timer-bg', theme.timerDigitBg);
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-timer-text', theme.timerDigitText);
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-timer-sep', theme.timerSepColor);
      shell.style.setProperty('--flash-sale-timer-border', theme.timerBorder);
    }

    saveJson('al_promo_board', state.promoBoard);
    refreshFlashSaleTicker();
  }

function renderCollectionAdminEditor() { return; }

  window.setCollectionAdminTab = function(tabKey) {
    if (!TAB_KEYS.includes(tabKey)) return;
    state.collectionBoard = normalizeCollectionBoard(state.collectionBoard || getCollectionBoard());
    state.collectionBoard.activeTab = tabKey;
    saveJson(COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY, state.collectionBoard);
    renderCollectionAdminEditor();
  };

  function ensureCustomAdminPanels() {
    injectHeroAdminBox();
    renderHeroAdminEditor();
    renderCollectionAdminEditor();
    renderPromoAdminControls();
  }

  // Override existing handlers with the redesigned panels.
  window.savePromoBoardFromAdmin = function() {
    syncPromoBoardFromAdmin(true);
    renderPromoBoard();
    focusPromoBoard();
    renderCollectionAdminEditor();
    showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã lưu Flash Sale.' : 'Flash Sale saved.');
  };

  window.autoFillPromoBoardFromProducts = function() {
    state.promoBoard = normalizePromoBoard(buildDefaultPromoBoard());
    state.collectionBoard = promoBoardToCollectionBoard(state.promoBoard);
    saveJson(COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY, state.collectionBoard);
    saveJson('al_promo_board', state.promoBoard);
    renderCollectionAdminEditor();
    renderPromoBoard();
    focusPromoBoard();
    showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã tự điền Flash Sale theo dữ liệu hiện tại.' : 'Auto-filled Flash Sale from current data.');
  };

  const legacyRenderAdminDashboard = window.renderAdminDashboard;
  window.renderAdminDashboard = function(...args) {
    const result = legacyRenderAdminDashboard.apply(this, args);
    ensureCustomAdminPanels();
    return result;
  };

  const legacyApplyLanguageDOM = window.applyLanguageDOM;
  if (typeof legacyApplyLanguageDOM === 'function') {
    window.applyLanguageDOM = function(...args) {
      const result = legacyApplyLanguageDOM.apply(this, args);
      ensureCustomAdminPanels();
      renderHeroSlider();
      renderPromoBoard();
      return result;
    };
  }

  window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    state.heroSlides = normalizeHeroSlides(loadJson(HERO_STORAGE_KEY, defaultHeroSlides()));
    setHeroVisibleCount(heroVisibleCount());
    state.collectionBoard = normalizeCollectionBoard(loadJson(COLLECTION_STORAGE_KEY, defaultCollectionBoard()));
    state.promoBoard = normalizePromoBoard(loadJson('al_promo_board', state.promoBoard || {}));
    saveJson('al_promo_board', state.promoBoard);
    ensureCustomAdminPanels();
    renderHeroSlider();
    renderPromoBoard();
    renderRecentlyViewed();
    updateFloatingActions();
  });
})();
</script>


  <script>
    (function () {
      const SNAPSHOT_KEY = 'al_aqualuxe_snapshot_v1';

      function safeParse(raw, fallback) {
        try {
          const value = JSON.parse(raw);
          return value === null || value === undefined ? fallback : value;
        } catch (err) {
          return fallback;
        }
      }

      function mirrorKey(key, value) {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
        } catch (err) {}
      }

      function captureSnapshot() {
        try {
          const snapshot = {
            products: Array.isArray(state?.products) ? state.products : [],
            users: Array.isArray(state?.users) ? state.users : [],
            currentUser: state?.currentUser ?? null,
            promoBoard: state?.promoBoard ?? null,
            theme: state?.theme ?? 'light',
            lang: state?.lang ?? 'vi',
            wheelConfig: state?.wheelConfig ?? null,
            wishlist: state?.currentUser ? (state.currentUser.wishlist || []) : (state.wishlist || []),
            compareList: state?.currentUser ? (state.currentUser.compareList || []) : (state.compareList || []),
            globalOrders: safeParse(localStorage.getItem('al_global_orders'), []),
            chatMessages: safeParse(localStorage.getItem('al_chat_messages'), []),
            unreadChat: safeParse(localStorage.getItem('al_unread_chat_'), {})
          };
          localStorage.setItem(SNAPSHOT_KEY, JSON.stringify(snapshot));
        } catch (err) {}
      }

      function restoreSnapshot() {
        const snapshot = safeParse(localStorage.getItem(SNAPSHOT_KEY), null);
        if (!snapshot || typeof snapshot !== 'object') return false;

        // Keep only the refreshed default product list.
        state.products = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_PRODUCTS));
        mirrorKey('al_products', state.products);
        if (Array.isArray(snapshot.users)) state.users = snapshot.users;
        if ('currentUser' in snapshot) state.currentUser = snapshot.currentUser;
        if (snapshot.promoBoard) state.promoBoard = snapshot.promoBoard;
        state.theme = 'light';
        if (snapshot.lang) state.lang = snapshot.lang;
        if (snapshot.wheelConfig) state.wheelConfig = snapshot.wheelConfig;
        if (Array.isArray(snapshot.wishlist)) {
          if (state.currentUser) state.currentUser.wishlist = snapshot.wishlist;
          else state.wishlist = snapshot.wishlist;
        }
        if (Array.isArray(snapshot.compareList)) {
          if (state.currentUser) state.currentUser.compareList = snapshot.compareList;
          else state.compareList = snapshot.compareList;
        }

        mirrorKey('al_products', state.products || []);
        mirrorKey('al_registered_users', state.users || []);
        mirrorKey('al_session_user', state.currentUser || null);
        mirrorKey('al_promo_board', state.promoBoard || null);
        mirrorKey('al_theme', state.theme || 'light');
        mirrorKey('al_lang', state.lang || 'vi');
        if (snapshot.globalOrders !== undefined) mirrorKey('al_global_orders', snapshot.globalOrders);
        if (snapshot.chatMessages !== undefined) mirrorKey('al_chat_messages', snapshot.chatMessages);
        if (snapshot.unreadChat !== undefined) mirrorKey('al_unread_chat_', snapshot.unreadChat);
        if (state.wheelConfig) {
          try { localStorage.setItem(typeof WHEEL_CONFIG_KEY !== 'undefined' ? WHEEL_CONFIG_KEY : 'al_wheel_config', JSON.stringify(state.wheelConfig)); } catch (err) {}
        }
        return true;
      }

      // Restore a stable snapshot first, then let existing UI render from the refreshed state.
      restoreSnapshot();

      // Keep the existing save flow, but add a safety snapshot for all data.
      if (typeof syncStorage === 'function') {
        const __syncStorageOriginal = syncStorage;
        syncStorage = function () {
          try { __syncStorageOriginal(); } finally { captureSnapshot(); }
        };
      }

      if (typeof saveMessagesToStorage === 'function') {
        const __saveMessagesOriginal = saveMessagesToStorage;
        saveMessagesToStorage = function (msgs) {
          __saveMessagesOriginal(msgs);
          captureSnapshot();
        };
      }

      if (typeof saveWheelConfig === 'function') {
        const __saveWheelConfigOriginal = saveWheelConfig;
        saveWheelConfig = function (config) {
          __saveWheelConfigOriginal(config);
          captureSnapshot();
        };
      }

      const snapshotNow = () => {
        try {
          if (typeof syncStorage === 'function') syncStorage();
          else captureSnapshot();
        } catch (err) {}
      };

      window.addEventListener('beforeunload', snapshotNow);
      window.addEventListener('pagehide', snapshotNow);
      window.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
        if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden') snapshotNow();
      });

      setInterval(captureSnapshot, 15000);
      window.addEventListener('storage', () => {
        // If another tab updates persistence, keep this tab in sync on next interaction.
        captureSnapshot();
      });
    })();
  </script>


  <style id="aqualuxe-ux-boost">
    html {
      -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
      text-size-adjust: 100%;
    }

    body {
      min-width: 320px;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      overflow-y: auto;
    }

    img, video, canvas, svg {
      max-width: 100%;
    }

    button, input, select, textarea {
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .container {
      width: 100%;
      padding-left: clamp(12px, 2vw, 24px);
      padding-right: clamp(12px, 2vw, 24px);
    }

    .glass,
    .product-card,
    .featured-products-shell,
    .product-showcase-strip,
    .cart-tab-panel,
    .cart-summary-card,
    .delivery-card,
    .wheel-modal,
    .quickview-modal,
    .checkout-modal,
    .collection-modal {
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .drawer-overlay,
    .modal-overlay {
      padding: 12px;
    }

    .cart-drawer,
    .delivery-drawer,
    .collection-modal,
    .wheel-modal,
    .quickview-modal,
    .checkout-modal {
      max-height: calc(100dvh - 24px);
      overscroll-behavior: contain;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
    }

    .shop-layout {
      align-items: start;
    }

    .product-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    }

    .product-info,
    .cart-line-copy,
    .cart-summary-card,
    .cart-order-card,
    .delivery-card,
    .featured-products-shell,
    .collection-product-body {
      overflow-wrap: anywhere;
      min-width: 0;
    }

    @media (max-width: 1200px) {
      .shop-layout {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .filter-sidebar {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: min(92vw, 360px);
        height: 100dvh;
        max-height: 100dvh;
        z-index: 180;
        overflow-y: auto;
        border-radius: 0;
        border: none;
        border-right: 1px solid var(--line);
        transform: translateX(-100%);
        transition: transform 0.35s ease;
        background: var(--bg-surface);
      }

      .filter-sidebar.open {
        transform: translateX(0);
      }

      .filter-sidebar-close {
        display: block;
      }

      .mobile-filter-trigger {
        display: inline-flex;
      }

      .cart-drawer,
      .delivery-drawer,
      .chat-window {
        width: 100vw;
        max-width: 100vw;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        border-radius: 0;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 992px) {
      .hero-slider {
        height: clamp(320px, 54vh, 560px);
      }

      .slide {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .slide-content {
        padding: 0 16px;
      }

      .shop-toolbar,
      .featured-products-head {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: stretch;
      }

      .product-showcase-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .qv-content,
      .checkout-modal,
      .wheel-modal {
        padding: 18px;
      }

      .quickview-modal {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        max-height: 90vh;
        overflow-y: auto;
      }

      .qv-media {
        border-right: none;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
      }

      .wheel-layout {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .cart-detail-hero,
      .cart-new-hero,
      .cart-line-item,
      .cart-item,
      .cart-new-item,
      .cart-order-card,
      .delivery-card,
      .cart-order-summary-grid,
      .promo-admin-grid,
      .wheel-prizes,
      .cart-related-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .cart-line-actions {
        justify-content: space-between;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .header .inner {
        height: auto;
        padding: 12px 0;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 10px;
      }

      .mobile-menu-toggle {
        display: block;
      }

      .nav-menu {
        position: fixed;
        top: 80px;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        background: var(--bg-surface);
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 0;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
        max-height: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        transition: max-height 0.3s ease;
        padding: 0;
      }

      .nav-menu.open {
        max-height: 320px;
        padding: 10px 0;
      }

      .nav-menu li {
        width: 100%;
        text-align: center;
      }

      .nav-menu li a {
        display: block;
        padding: 12px 0;
        width: 100%;
      }

      .slide-title {
        font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 7vw, 3rem);
      }

      .slide-desc {
        font-size: 0.98rem;
      }

      .product-grid {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(170px, 1fr));
        gap: 16px;
      }

      .product-actions,
      .coupon-section,
      .order-view-actions,
      .wishlist-card-actions,
      .collection-product-actions {
        flex-direction: column;
      }

      .product-actions .btn,
      .coupon-section .btn,
      .order-view-actions .btn,
      .wishlist-card-actions .btn,
      .collection-product-actions .btn {
        width: 100%;
      }

      .cart-drawer,
      .delivery-drawer,
      .chat-window {
        width: 100vw;
        max-width: 100vw;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        border-left: none;
      }

      .modal-overlay {
        padding: 10px;
      }

      .cart-detail-hero,
      .cart-new-hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .cart-detail-hero-media,
      .cart-new-hero-media {
        max-width: 220px;
        margin: 0 auto;
      }

      .cart-line-item,
      .cart-item {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        justify-items: start;
      }

      .cart-line-actions {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: space-between;
      }

      .cart-order-summary-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .payment-methods,
      .payment-option,
      .cart-payment-chip {
        width: 100%;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 540px) {
      .container {
        padding-left: 12px;
        padding-right: 12px;
      }

      .hero {
        padding-top: 12px;
      }

      .hero-slider {
        height: 300px;
      }

      .slide {
        padding: 14px;
      }

      .slide-title {
        font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 8vw, 2.4rem);
      }

      .slide-desc {
        font-size: 0.94rem;
      }

      .product-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .product-card,
      .featured-products-shell,
      .product-showcase-strip,
      .cart-tab-panel,
      .cart-summary-card,
      .delivery-card,
      .wheel-modal,
      .collection-modal {
        border-radius: 18px;
      }

      .drawer-header,
      .drawer-body,
      .drawer-footer,
      .delivery-header,
      .delivery-body,
      .cart-new-body {
        padding-left: 14px;
        padding-right: 14px;
      }
    }
  </style>

  <script id="aqualuxe-live-resize-boost">
    (function () {
      const debounce = (fn, wait = 160) => {
        let timer = null;
        return (...args) => {
          clearTimeout(timer);
          timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), wait);
        };
      };

      const refreshLayout = debounce(() => {
        try {
          if (typeof setHeroVisibleCount === 'function' && typeof heroVisibleCount === 'function') {
            setHeroVisibleCount(heroVisibleCount());
          }
          if (typeof renderHeroSlider === 'function') renderHeroSlider();
          if (typeof renderPromoBoard === 'function') renderPromoBoard();
          if (typeof renderProducts === 'function') renderProducts();
          if (typeof renderSavedCollections === 'function') renderSavedCollections();
          if (typeof renderCart === 'function') renderCart();
          if (typeof renderDeliveryDrawerContent === 'function') renderDeliveryDrawerContent();
          if (typeof updateFloatingActions === 'function') updateFloatingActions();
        } catch (err) {}
      }, 120);

      window.addEventListener('resize', refreshLayout);
      window.addEventListener('orientationchange', refreshLayout);
      window.addEventListener('load', refreshLayout);
      window.addEventListener('pageshow', refreshLayout);
    })();
  </script>


  <script id="aqualuxe-product-admin-editor">
    (() => {
      const PRODUCT_ADMIN_BOX_ID = 'productAdminEditorBox';
      const PRODUCT_ADMIN_STORAGE_KEY = 'al_product_admin_draft_v1';
      const MAX_COLOR_ROWS = 6;

      const defaultProductDraft = () => ({
        id: '',
        name: '',
        category: '',
        collection: '',
        shortDescription: '',
        description: '',
        details: '',
        material: '',
        capacity: '750ml',
        basePrice: 0,
        oldPrice: 0,
        discountPercent: 0,
        stock: 20,
        sold: 0,
        rating: 5,
        tags: '',
        badges: 'new',
        image: '',
        gallery: [],
        variants: [],
        sizeOptions: [],
        isBestSeller: false,
        isNewArrival: false,
        isFeatured: false
      });

      const safeJson = (raw, fallback) => {
        try { return JSON.parse(raw); } catch { return fallback; }
      };

      const slugify = (value) => String(value || '')
        .toLowerCase()
        .normalize('NFD')
        .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
        .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
        .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
        .slice(0, 48) || `prod-${Date.now()}`;

      const productAdminState = {
        currentId: '',
        mainImage: '',
        gallery: [],
        variants: []
      };

      function getProductAdminRoot() {
        return document.getElementById('adminProductPanel');
      }

      function setProductAdminMainImage(url, label = '') {
        productAdminState.mainImage = url || '';
        const preview = document.getElementById('productAdminMainImagePreview');
        const value = document.getElementById('productAdminMainImageValue');
        const text = document.getElementById('productAdminMainImageLabel');
        const fallback = document.querySelector('#productAdminMainPreview .fallback');
        if (preview) {
          preview.src = url || '';
          preview.style.display = url ? 'block' : 'none';
        }
        if (fallback) fallback.style.display = url ? 'none' : 'block';
        if (value) value.value = url || '';
        if (text) text.textContent = label || (url ? 'Ảnh đã chọn' : 'Chưa có ảnh');
      }

      function renderProductAdminGallery() {
        const host = document.getElementById('productAdminGalleryList');
        if (!host) return;
        host.innerHTML = productAdminState.gallery.map((url, idx) => `
          <div class="admin-gallery-item" data-gallery-index="${idx}" data-gallery-url="${String(url || '').replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}">
            <img src="${url}" alt="Ảnh phụ ${idx + 1}">
            <div class="admin-gallery-actions">
              <button type="button" class="btn secondary" data-gallery-move="up" title="Đưa lên trước"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up"></i></button>
              <button type="button" class="btn secondary" data-gallery-move="down" title="Đưa xuống sau"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-down"></i></button>
              <button type="button" class="btn danger" data-gallery-remove="${idx}" title="Xóa ảnh"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `).join('');
      }

      async function addProductAdminGalleryFiles(files) {
        const list = [...(files || [])].filter(Boolean);
        if (!list.length) return;
        const urls = await Promise.all(list.map(readFileAsDataURL));
        productAdminState.gallery.push(...urls.filter(Boolean));
        renderProductAdminGallery();
        updateProductAdminPreview();
      }

      function reorderAdminGallery(index, direction) {
        const next = index + direction;
        if (next < 0 || next >= productAdminState.gallery.length) return;
        const copy = [...productAdminState.gallery];
        const temp = copy[index];
        copy[index] = copy[next];
        copy[next] = temp;
        productAdminState.gallery = copy;
        renderProductAdminGallery();
        updateProductAdminPreview();
      }

      function removeAdminGalleryItem(index) {
        productAdminState.gallery.splice(index, 1);
        renderProductAdminGallery();
        updateProductAdminPreview();
      }

      function renderProductAdminColorRows() {
        const host = document.getElementById('productAdminColorRows');
        if (!host) return;
        const rows = Math.max(1, Math.min(MAX_COLOR_ROWS, parseInt(document.getElementById('productAdminColorCount')?.value || '1', 10) || 1));
        const existing = productAdminState.variants.slice(0, rows);
        host.innerHTML = Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, i) => {
          const v = existing[i] || {};
          const colorName = String(v.colorName || `Màu ${i + 1}`);
          const colorHex = String(v.colorHex || ['#3b82f6','#ec4899','#10b981','#f59e0b','#8b5cf6','#ef4444'][i % 6]);
          return `
            <div class="admin-color-row" data-color-row="${i}">
              <div class="admin-color-row-head">
                <div>
                  <strong>Màu / biến thể #${i + 1}</strong>
                  <div class="admin-product-card-note">Đây là phần swatch màu hiển thị ở card ngoài và trong quick view. Mỗi màu nên gắn ảnh riêng để người xem không bị nhầm.</div>
                </div>
                <div class="admin-row-actions">
                  <button type="button" class="btn secondary" data-color-move="up" title="Lên trên"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up"></i></button>
                  <button type="button" class="btn secondary" data-color-move="down" title="Xuống dưới"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-down"></i></button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="admin-color-row-grid">
                <div>
                  <label>Tên màu</label>
                  <input type="text" class="form-control product-color-name" value="${String(colorName).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}" placeholder="Xanh dương">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Mã màu</label>
                  <input type="color" class="form-control product-color-hex" value="${colorHex}" style="padding:4px;height:44px;">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Ảnh chính của màu</label>
                  <input type="file" class="form-control product-color-main-file" accept="image/*">
                  <input type="hidden" class="product-color-main-value" value="${String(v.mainImg || '').replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Ảnh hover của màu</label>
                  <input type="file" class="form-control product-color-hover-file" accept="image/*">
                  <input type="hidden" class="product-color-hover-value" value="${String(v.hoverImg || '').replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}">
                </div>
                <div class="field-full">
                  <div class="admin-color-preview">
                    <span class="admin-color-chip"><span class="admin-color-dot" style="background:${colorHex};"></span><span class="product-color-preview-label">${colorName}</span></span>
                    <span class="admin-color-chip product-color-main-label">${v.mainImg ? 'Có ảnh chính' : 'Chưa có ảnh chính'}</span>
                    <span class="admin-color-chip product-color-hover-label">${v.hoverImg ? 'Có ảnh hover' : 'Chưa có ảnh hover'}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          `;
        }).join('');
      }

      function moveColorRow(index, direction) {
        const next = index + direction;
        if (next < 0 || next >= productAdminState.variants.length) return;
        const copy = [...productAdminState.variants];
        const tmp = copy[index];
        copy[index] = copy[next];
        copy[next] = tmp;
        productAdminState.variants = copy;
        renderProductAdminColorRows();
        bindProductAdminColorFiles();
        updateProductAdminPreview();
      }

      function readColorRows() {
        const rows = [...document.querySelectorAll('#productAdminColorRows .admin-color-row')];
        return rows.map(row => ({
          colorName: row.querySelector('.product-color-name')?.value?.trim() || '',
          colorHex: row.querySelector('.product-color-hex')?.value || '#3b82f6',
          mainImg: row.querySelector('.product-color-main-value')?.value || '',
          hoverImg: row.querySelector('.product-color-hover-value')?.value || ''
        })).filter(item => item.colorName || item.mainImg || item.hoverImg);
      }

      function updateProductAdminPreview() {
        const host = document.getElementById('productAdminPreviewHost');
        if (!host) return;
        const name = document.getElementById('productAdminName')?.value?.trim() || 'Tên sản phẩm';
        const category = document.getElementById('productAdminCategory')?.value?.trim() || 'Danh mục';
        const material = document.getElementById('productAdminMaterial')?.value?.trim() || '';
        const shortDesc = document.getElementById('productAdminShortDescription')?.value?.trim() || 'Mô tả ngắn sẽ hiển thị tại đây.';
        const basePrice = Number(document.getElementById('productAdminBasePrice')?.value || 0) || 0;
        const oldPrice = Number(document.getElementById('productAdminOldPrice')?.value || 0) || 0;
        const discount = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(document.getElementById('productAdminDiscountPercent')?.value || 0) || 0));
        const currentImg = productAdminState.mainImage || document.getElementById('productAdminMainImageValue')?.value || '';
        const colorRows = readColorRows();
        const sizeText = document.getElementById('productAdminSizes')?.value?.trim() || '';
        const colors = colorRows.length ? colorRows : productAdminState.variants;
        const activeColor = colors[0] || {};
        const priceNow = discount > 0 ? Math.max(0, Math.round((basePrice || 0) * (100 - discount) / 100)) : basePrice;
        const previewSwatches = colors.map((v, idx) => `<span class="mini-swatch ${idx === 0 ? 'active' : ''}" style="background:${v.colorHex || '#3b82f6'}" title="${String(v.colorName || '')}"></span>`).join('');
        host.innerHTML = `
          <div class="mini-card">
            <div class="mini-thumb">${currentImg ? `<img src="${currentImg}" alt="${name}">` : '<div class="fallback">Chưa chọn ảnh chính</div>'}</div>
            <div class="mini-body">
              <h5>${name}</h5>
              <div class="mini-meta"><span>${category}</span><span>${material || 'Chưa có chất liệu'}</span></div>
              <div class="mini-meta"><span>${productAdminState.gallery.length} ảnh phụ</span><span>${colors.length} màu</span></div>
              <div class="mini-price">
                <span class="price-current">${formatMoney(priceNow)}</span>
                ${oldPrice > 0 ? `<span class="price-old">${formatMoney(oldPrice)}</span>` : ''}
              </div>
              <div class="mini-swatches">${previewSwatches || '<span class="admin-product-help">Chưa có màu</span>'}</div>
              <div class="admin-product-help">${shortDesc}</div>
              <div class="admin-product-help">${sizeText ? sizeText.split('\n').slice(0, 2).join(' · ') : 'Chưa khai báo dung tích'}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      function setAdminProductDraft(product = null) {
        const p = product || defaultProductDraft();
        productAdminState.currentId = String(p.id || '');
        productAdminState.mainImage = String(p.image || p.mainImg || p.thumbnail || '');
        productAdminState.gallery = Array.isArray(p.gallery) ? [...p.gallery] : [];
        productAdminState.variants = Array.isArray(p.variants) ? [...p.variants] : [];
        document.getElementById('productAdminId').value = String(p.id || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminName').value = String(p.name || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminCategory').value = String(p.category || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminCollection').value = String(p.collection || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminMaterial').value = String(p.material || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminCapacity').value = String(p.capacity || '750ml');
        document.getElementById('productAdminShortDescription').value = String(p.shortDescription || p.description || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminDescription').value = String(p.description || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminDetails').value = String(p.details || p.detailStory || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminTags').value = Array.isArray(p.tags) ? p.tags.join(', ') : String(p.tags || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminBadges').value = Array.isArray(p.badges) ? p.badges.map(b => b?.type || '').filter(Boolean).join(', ') : String(p.badges || '');
        document.getElementById('productAdminBasePrice').value = Number(p.basePrice || 0);
        document.getElementById('productAdminOldPrice').value = Number(p.oldPrice || 0);
        document.getElementById('productAdminDiscountPercent').value = Number(p.discountPercent || 0);
        document.getElementById('productAdminStock').value = Number(p.stock ?? 20);
