        document.getElementById('productAdminSold').value = Number(p.sold || 0);
        document.getElementById('productAdminRating').value = Number(p.rating || 5);
        document.getElementById('productAdminSizeRows').value = Array.isArray(p.sizeOptions) && p.sizeOptions.length
          ? p.sizeOptions.map(s => `${s.key || ''}|${s.label || ''}|${Number(s.price || 0)}`).join('\n')
          : `250ml|250ml · Gọn nhẹ|${Number(p.basePrice || 0)}\n500ml|500ml · Tiêu chuẩn|${Number(p.basePrice || 0) + 64000}`;
        document.getElementById('productAdminBest').checked = !!p.isBestSeller;
        document.getElementById('productAdminNew').checked = !!p.isNewArrival;
        document.getElementById('productAdminFeatured').checked = !!p.isFeatured;
        document.getElementById('productAdminColorCount').value = String(Math.max(1, Math.min(MAX_COLOR_ROWS, productAdminState.variants.length || 1)));
        setProductAdminMainImage(productAdminState.mainImage, p.image ? 'Ảnh đang dùng' : '');
        renderProductAdminGallery();
        renderProductAdminColorRows();
        bindProductAdminColorFiles();
        updateProductAdminPreview();
      }

      function collectProductAdminDraft() {
        const current = state.products.find(p => p.id === productAdminState.currentId) || {};
        const idField = String(document.getElementById('productAdminId')?.value || '').trim();
        const name = String(document.getElementById('productAdminName')?.value || '').trim();
        const category = String(document.getElementById('productAdminCategory')?.value || '').trim();
        const collection = String(document.getElementById('productAdminCollection')?.value || '').trim();
        const material = String(document.getElementById('productAdminMaterial')?.value || '').trim();
        const capacity = String(document.getElementById('productAdminCapacity')?.value || '').trim() || '750ml';
        const shortDescription = String(document.getElementById('productAdminShortDescription')?.value || '').trim();
        const description = String(document.getElementById('productAdminDescription')?.value || '').trim();
        const details = String(document.getElementById('productAdminDetails')?.value || '').trim();
        const tags = String(document.getElementById('productAdminTags')?.value || '').split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        const badgeTypes = String(document.getElementById('productAdminBadges')?.value || '').split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        const basePrice = Number(document.getElementById('productAdminBasePrice')?.value || 0) || 0;
        const oldPrice = Number(document.getElementById('productAdminOldPrice')?.value || 0) || 0;
        const discountPercent = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(document.getElementById('productAdminDiscountPercent')?.value || 0) || 0));
        const stock = Math.max(0, Number(document.getElementById('productAdminStock')?.value || 0) || 0);
        const sold = Math.max(0, Number(document.getElementById('productAdminSold')?.value || 0) || 0);
        const rating = Math.max(0, Math.min(5, Number(document.getElementById('productAdminRating')?.value || 0) || 0));
        const image = String(document.getElementById('productAdminMainImageValue')?.value || productAdminState.mainImage || current.image || '').trim();
        const gallery = [...productAdminState.gallery];
        const colorVariants = readColorRows().map(v => ({
          colorName: v.colorName || 'Tiêu chuẩn',
          colorHex: v.colorHex || '#3b82f6',
          mainImg: v.mainImg || image,
          hoverImg: v.hoverImg || v.mainImg || image
        }));
        const sizeLines = String(document.getElementById('productAdminSizeRows')?.value || '').split(/\n+/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        const sizeOptions = sizeLines.length ? sizeLines.map((line, idx) => {
          const [key, label, priceText] = line.split('|').map(s => (s || '').trim());
          return {
            key: key || `size-${idx + 1}`,
            label: label || key || `Dung tích ${idx + 1}`,
            price: Number(priceText || basePrice || 0) || basePrice,
            variants: colorVariants.map(v => ({ ...v }))
          };
        }) : [{
          key: capacity,
          label: capacity,
          price: basePrice,
          variants: colorVariants.map(v => ({ ...v }))
        }];

        const badges = badgeTypes.map(type => {
          const presetColor = ({ sale: '#e11d48', best: '#f59e0b', new: '#10b981' }[type] || '#3b82f6');
          return { type, color: presetColor };
        }).filter((item, idx, arr) => item.type && arr.findIndex(x => x.type === item.type) === idx);

        const discountBadgeBg = document.getElementById('productAdminDiscountBadgeBg')?.value || '#e11d48';
        const discountTextColor = document.getElementById('productAdminDiscountTextColor')?.value || '#ffffff';

        return {
          ...current,
          id: idField || current.id || slugify(name),
          name: name || current.name || 'Sản phẩm mới',
          collection: collection || current.collection || '',
          category: category || current.category || '',
          shortDescription: shortDescription || current.shortDescription || description,
          description: description || current.description || shortDescription,
          details: details || current.details || description,
          detailStory: details || current.detailStory || description,
          detailSubtitle: shortDescription || current.detailSubtitle || '',
          material: material || current.material || '',
          capacity,
          basePrice,
          oldPrice,
          discountPercent,
          discountBadgeBg,
          discountTextColor,
          stock,
          sold,
          rating,
          tags,
          badges,
          image,
          mainImg: image,
          thumbnail: image,
          gallery,
          variants: colorVariants,
          sizeOptions,
          isBestSeller: document.getElementById('productAdminBest')?.checked || badges.some(b => b.type === 'best'),
          isNewArrival: document.getElementById('productAdminNew')?.checked || badges.some(b => b.type === 'new'),
          isFeatured: document.getElementById('productAdminFeatured')?.checked || badges.some(b => b.type === 'sale')
        };
      }

      function bindProductAdminColorFiles() {
        const mainPreview = document.getElementById('productAdminMainImagePreview');
        const mainInput = document.getElementById('productAdminMainImageFile');
        const mainValue = document.getElementById('productAdminMainImageValue');
        const mainClear = document.getElementById('productAdminMainImageClear');

        if (mainInput && !mainInput.dataset.bound) {
          mainInput.dataset.bound = '1';
          mainInput.onchange = async () => {
            const file = mainInput.files && mainInput.files[0];
            if (!file) return;
            const url = await readFileAsDataURL(file);
            productAdminState.mainImage = url;
            if (mainValue) mainValue.value = url;
            if (mainPreview) {
              mainPreview.src = url;
              mainPreview.style.display = 'block';
            }
            const lbl = document.getElementById('productAdminMainImageLabel');
            if (lbl) lbl.textContent = file.name || 'Ảnh đã chọn';
            updateProductAdminPreview();
          };
        }

        if (mainClear && !mainClear.dataset.bound) {
          mainClear.dataset.bound = '1';
          mainClear.onclick = () => {
            productAdminState.mainImage = '';
            if (mainValue) mainValue.value = '';
            if (mainInput) mainInput.value = '';
            if (mainPreview) mainPreview.removeAttribute('src');
            if (mainPreview) mainPreview.style.display = 'none';
            const fallback = document.querySelector('#productAdminMainPreview .fallback');
            if (fallback) fallback.style.display = 'block';
            const lbl = document.getElementById('productAdminMainImageLabel');
            if (lbl) lbl.textContent = 'Chưa có ảnh';
            updateProductAdminPreview();
          };
        }

        [...document.querySelectorAll('#productAdminColorRows .admin-color-row')].forEach((row, idx) => {
          const nameInput = row.querySelector('.product-color-name');
          const hexInput = row.querySelector('.product-color-hex');
          const mainFile = row.querySelector('.product-color-main-file');
          const hoverFile = row.querySelector('.product-color-hover-file');
          const mainValueInput = row.querySelector('.product-color-main-value');
          const hoverValueInput = row.querySelector('.product-color-hover-value');
          const previewLabel = row.querySelector('.product-color-preview-label');
          const mainLabel = row.querySelector('.product-color-main-label');
          const hoverLabel = row.querySelector('.product-color-hover-label');
          const updateChip = () => {
            const chip = row.querySelector('.admin-color-dot');
            if (chip && hexInput) chip.style.background = hexInput.value || '#3b82f6';
            if (previewLabel && nameInput) previewLabel.textContent = nameInput.value || `Màu ${idx + 1}`;
          };
          updateChip();

          if (nameInput && !nameInput.dataset.bound) {
            nameInput.dataset.bound = '1';
            nameInput.oninput = () => { updateChip(); updateProductAdminPreview(); };
          }
          if (hexInput && !hexInput.dataset.bound) {
            hexInput.dataset.bound = '1';
            hexInput.oninput = () => { updateChip(); updateProductAdminPreview(); };
          }
          if (mainFile && !mainFile.dataset.bound) {
            mainFile.dataset.bound = '1';
            mainFile.onchange = async () => {
              const file = mainFile.files && mainFile.files[0];
              if (!file) return;
              const url = await readFileAsDataURL(file);
              if (mainValueInput) mainValueInput.value = url;
              if (mainLabel) mainLabel.textContent = file.name || 'Có ảnh chính';
              updateProductAdminPreview();
            };
          }
          if (hoverFile && !hoverFile.dataset.bound) {
            hoverFile.dataset.bound = '1';
            hoverFile.onchange = async () => {
              const file = hoverFile.files && hoverFile.files[0];
              if (!file) return;
              const url = await readFileAsDataURL(file);
              if (hoverValueInput) hoverValueInput.value = url;
              if (hoverLabel) hoverLabel.textContent = file.name || 'Có ảnh hover';
              updateProductAdminPreview();
            };
          }
          const moveUp = row.querySelector('[data-color-move="up"]');
          const moveDown = row.querySelector('[data-color-move="down"]');
          if (moveUp && !moveUp.dataset.bound) {
            moveUp.dataset.bound = '1';
            moveUp.onclick = () => moveColorRow(idx, -1);
          }
          if (moveDown && !moveDown.dataset.bound) {
            moveDown.dataset.bound = '1';
            moveDown.onclick = () => moveColorRow(idx, 1);
          }
        });

        const galleryHost = document.getElementById('productAdminGalleryList');
        if (galleryHost && !galleryHost.dataset.bound) {
          galleryHost.dataset.bound = '1';
          galleryHost.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            const removeBtn = e.target.closest('[data-gallery-remove]');
            const upBtn = e.target.closest('[data-gallery-move="up"]');
            const downBtn = e.target.closest('[data-gallery-move="down"]');
            const item = e.target.closest('.admin-gallery-item');
            if (!item) return;
            const index = Number(item.getAttribute('data-gallery-index') || 0);
            if (removeBtn) {
              removeAdminGalleryItem(index);
              bindProductAdminColorFiles();
            } else if (upBtn) {
              reorderAdminGallery(index, -1);
              bindProductAdminColorFiles();
            } else if (downBtn) {
              reorderAdminGallery(index, 1);
              bindProductAdminColorFiles();
            }
          });
        }

        const galleryInput = document.getElementById('productAdminGalleryFiles');
        if (galleryInput && !galleryInput.dataset.bound) {
          galleryInput.dataset.bound = '1';
          galleryInput.onchange = async () => {
            await addProductAdminGalleryFiles(galleryInput.files || []);
            galleryInput.value = '';
            bindProductAdminColorFiles();
          };
        }

        const colorCountSelect = document.getElementById('productAdminColorCount');
        if (colorCountSelect && !colorCountSelect.dataset.bound) {
          colorCountSelect.dataset.bound = '1';
          colorCountSelect.onchange = () => {
            const count = Math.max(1, Math.min(MAX_COLOR_ROWS, parseInt(colorCountSelect.value, 10) || 1));
            productAdminState.variants = productAdminState.variants.slice(0, count);
            while (productAdminState.variants.length < count) {
              productAdminState.variants.push({
                colorName: `Màu ${productAdminState.variants.length + 1}`,
                colorHex: ['#3b82f6','#ec4899','#10b981','#f59e0b','#8b5cf6','#ef4444'][productAdminState.variants.length % 6],
                mainImg: productAdminState.mainImage || '',
                hoverImg: productAdminState.mainImage || ''
              });
            }
            renderProductAdminColorRows();
            bindProductAdminColorFiles();
            updateProductAdminPreview();
          };
        }

        const sizeRows = document.getElementById('productAdminSizeRows');
        if (sizeRows && !sizeRows.dataset.bound) {
          sizeRows.dataset.bound = '1';
          sizeRows.oninput = () => updateProductAdminPreview();
        }

        ['productAdminName','productAdminCategory','productAdminCollection','productAdminMaterial','productAdminCapacity','productAdminShortDescription','productAdminDescription','productAdminDetails','productAdminTags','productAdminBadges','productAdminBasePrice','productAdminOldPrice','productAdminDiscountPercent','productAdminStock','productAdminSold','productAdminRating','productAdminBest','productAdminNew','productAdminFeatured'].forEach(id => {
          const el = document.getElementById(id);
          if (el && !el.dataset.bound) {
            el.dataset.bound = '1';
            el.oninput = updateProductAdminPreview;
            el.onchange = updateProductAdminPreview;
          }
        });
      }

      function refreshProductAdminSelector() {
        const selector = document.getElementById('productAdminSelector');
        if (!selector) return;
        const current = String(selector.value || '');
        selector.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Tạo sản phẩm mới —</option>' + (state.products || []).map(p => `<option value="${String(p.id).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}">${String(p.name || p.id).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</option>`).join('');
        if (current && (state.products || []).some(p => String(p.id) === current)) selector.value = current;
        else selector.value = '';
      }

      function buildProductAdminBox() {
        const selectOptions = (state.products || []).map(p => `<option value="${String(p.id).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}">${String(p.name || p.id).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</option>`).join('');
        const host = getProductAdminRoot();
        if (!host || document.getElementById(PRODUCT_ADMIN_BOX_ID)) return;

        const box = document.createElement('div');
        box.className = 'admin-create-box admin-product-editor';
        box.id = PRODUCT_ADMIN_BOX_ID;
        box.innerHTML = `
          <div class="admin-product-editor-head">
            <div>
              <h4>Quản lý sản phẩm đầy đủ</h4>
              <p>Chia rõ 3 phần: thông tin hiển thị ngoài shop, ảnh/biến thể và nội dung hiển thị bên trong sản phẩm. Mỗi dữ liệu nhập ở đây sẽ đi ra card, danh sách, quick view, chi tiết, yêu thích, so sánh và tìm kiếm.</p>
              <div class="admin-product-flow">
                <span class="flow-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-table-cells-large"></i> Bên ngoài shop: card, danh sách, search, lọc</span>
                <span class="flow-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> Bên trong sản phẩm: quick view, chi tiết</span>
                <span class="flow-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i> Ảnh chính · Ảnh phụ · Ảnh theo màu</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="badge-tag" style="background:rgba(0,240,255,.12); color:var(--primary);">Sản phẩm hiện có: ${(state.products || []).length}</div>
          </div>

          <div class="admin-product-toolbar">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Chọn sản phẩm để chỉnh sửa</label>
              <select class="sort-select" id="productAdminSelector">
                <option value="">— Tạo sản phẩm mới —</option>
                ${selectOptions}
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Mã sản phẩm</label>
              <input class="form-control" id="productAdminId" placeholder="Tự tạo nếu để trống">
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Dung tích mặc định</label>
              <input class="form-control" id="productAdminCapacity" placeholder="750ml" value="750ml">
            </div>
            <div class="toolbar-actions">
              <button type="button" class="btn secondary" id="productAdminNewBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-sparkles"></i> Sản phẩm mới</button>
              <button type="button" class="btn secondary" id="productAdminLoadBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-folder-open"></i> Tải dữ liệu</button>
              <button type="button" class="btn primary" id="productAdminSaveBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i> Lưu sản phẩm</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="admin-product-grid">
            <div class="admin-product-card">
              <div class="admin-product-card-topline">
                <h5><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i> 1. Hiển thị ngoài shop</h5>
                <span class="section-badge">Card / Danh sách / Tìm kiếm</span>
              </div>
              <div class="admin-product-card-note">Các trường ở đây quyết định những gì khách nhìn thấy ở card sản phẩm, danh sách, bộ lọc, yêu thích và so sánh.</div>
              <div class="admin-product-grid">
                <div>
                  <label>Tên sản phẩm</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminName" placeholder="FreeSip">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Danh mục</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminCategory" placeholder="Thể thao">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Collection / Bộ sưu tập</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminCollection" placeholder="FreeSip Series">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Chất liệu</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminMaterial" placeholder="Inox 316">
                </div>
                <div class="field-full">
                  <label>Mô tả ngắn</label>
                  <textarea class="form-control" id="productAdminShortDescription" placeholder="Mô tả ngắn hiển thị ở card, quick view..."></textarea>
                </div>
                <div class="field-full">
                  <label>Mô tả chi tiết</label>
                  <textarea class="form-control" id="productAdminDescription" placeholder="Mô tả chi tiết sản phẩm"></textarea>
                </div>
                <div class="field-full">
                  <label>Thông tin bên trong sản phẩm</label>
                  <textarea class="form-control" id="productAdminDetails" placeholder="Các thông số, điểm nổi bật, chi tiết hiển thị ở trang sản phẩm"></textarea>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Tags / nhãn để tìm kiếm</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminTags" placeholder="thể thao, premium, hot">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Badge / nhãn nổi bật</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminBadges" placeholder="sale, best, new">
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="admin-product-card">
              <div class="admin-product-card-topline">
                <h5><i class="fa-solid fa-tag"></i> 2. Giá, tồn kho & badge</h5>
                <span class="section-badge">Sale / Stock / Rating</span>
              </div>
              <div class="admin-product-card-note">Các thông tin này dùng cho giá hiển thị, nhãn sale, số lượng kho, số lượt bán và các badge thương mại ở mọi nơi.</div>
              <div class="admin-product-grid">
                <div>
                  <label>Giá gốc</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminBasePrice" type="number" min="0" step="1000" value="0">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Giá giảm / giá cũ</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminOldPrice" type="number" min="0" step="1000" value="0">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>% giảm</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminDiscountPercent" type="number" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="0">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Tồn kho</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminStock" type="number" min="0" step="1" value="20">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Số lượng đã bán</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminSold" type="number" min="0" step="1" value="0">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label>Đánh giá</label>
                  <input class="form-control" id="productAdminRating" type="number" min="0" max="5" step="0.1" value="5">
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label><input type="checkbox" id="productAdminBest"> Bán chạy</label>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label><input type="checkbox" id="productAdminNew"> Hàng mới</label>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label><input type="checkbox" id="productAdminFeatured"> Nổi bật / sale</label>
                </div>
                <div class="field-full">
                  <label>Ghi chú hiển thị</label>
                  <div class="admin-product-help">Giá giảm, badge sale, rating, stock và lượt bán sẽ đi cùng card ngoài, quick view, chi tiết sản phẩm, so sánh và yêu thích theo cùng dữ liệu sản phẩm.</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="admin-product-card">
              <div class="admin-product-card-topline">
                <h5><i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i> 3. Ảnh, album & màu sắc</h5>
                <span class="section-badge">Ảnh chính / Ảnh phụ / Màu</span>
              </div>
              <div class="admin-product-card-note">Ảnh chính dùng cho card và quick view. Ảnh phụ dùng cho album. Ảnh theo màu giúp swatch bên ngoài và phần xem chi tiết bên trong khớp nhau.</div>
              <div class="admin-product-media-layout">
                <div class="admin-product-gallery">
                  <div>
                    <label>Ảnh đại diện chính (bấm để chọn từ thiết bị)</label>
                    <input class="form-control" id="productAdminMainImageFile" type="file" accept="image/*">
                    <input type="hidden" id="productAdminMainImageValue" value="">
                    <div class="admin-product-upload-note">
                      <span class="upload-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i> Dùng ở card, danh sách, quick view</span>
                      <button type="button" class="btn secondary" id="productAdminMainImageClear" style="padding:6px 10px; font-size:11px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i> Xóa ảnh chính</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="admin-product-help" id="productAdminMainImageLabel">Chưa có ảnh</div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="admin-product-preview" id="productAdminMainPreview">
                    <img id="productAdminMainImagePreview" alt="Ảnh đại diện" style="display:none;">
                    <div class="fallback">Chọn ảnh chính để dùng cho card, danh sách, quick view và chi tiết.</div>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label>Ảnh phụ / album hiển thị bên trong</label>
                    <input class="form-control" id="productAdminGalleryFiles" type="file" accept="image/*" multiple>
                    <div class="admin-product-upload-note">
                      <span class="upload-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-layer-group"></i> Có thể chọn nhiều ảnh cùng lúc</span>
                      <span class="upload-chip"><i class="fa-solid fa-up-down-left-right"></i> Dùng nút lên/xuống để sắp xếp</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="admin-product-gallery-list" id="productAdminGalleryList"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="admin-product-gallery">
                  <div>
                    <label>Ảnh theo màu / biến thể</label>
                    <div class="admin-product-help">Mỗi màu có thể có ảnh chính và ảnh hover riêng. Card bên ngoài và quick view bên trong sẽ đọc từ cùng bộ biến thể này.</div>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label>Số màu hiển thị</label>
                    <select class="sort-select" id="productAdminColorCount">
                      ${Array.from({length: MAX_COLOR_ROWS}, (_, i) => `<option value="${i + 1}">${i + 1} màu</option>`).join('')}
                    </select>
                  </div>
                  <div class="admin-product-color-grid" id="productAdminColorRows"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="admin-product-card admin-product-sizes">
              <div class="admin-product-card-topline">
                <h5><i class="fa-solid fa-ruler"></i> 4. Biến thể / dung tích</h5>
                <span class="section-badge">Size / Giá / Màu</span>
              </div>
              <div class="admin-product-card-note">Mỗi dòng theo cấu trúc: <b>mã|nhãn|giá</b>. Khi lưu, từng size sẽ giữ đúng giá và ghép đúng màu/ảnh để hiển thị đồng bộ ở ngoài và trong sản phẩm.</div>
              <textarea class="form-control" id="productAdminSizeRows" placeholder="250ml|250ml · Gọn nhẹ|312000&#10;500ml|500ml · Tiêu chuẩn|376000"></textarea>
            </div>

            <div class="admin-product-card">
              <div class="admin-product-card-topline">
                <h5><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> 5. Xem trước ngay trong Admin</h5>
                <span class="section-badge">Preview</span>
              </div>
              <div class="admin-product-card-note">Preview này giúp Admin nhìn ngay sản phẩm sẽ trông ra sao ở card ngoài và trong quick view trước khi lưu.</div>
              <div class="admin-product-live-preview" id="productAdminPreviewHost"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;

        const panel = getProductAdminRoot();
        const tableHeading = panel.querySelector('h3');
        if (tableHeading && tableHeading.parentNode === panel) {
          panel.insertBefore(box, tableHeading);
        } else {
          panel.insertBefore(box, panel.firstChild);
        }

        const selector = document.getElementById('productAdminSelector');
        const loadBtn = document.getElementById('productAdminLoadBtn');
        const saveBtn = document.getElementById('productAdminSaveBtn');
        const newBtn = document.getElementById('productAdminNewBtn');

        if (selector && !selector.dataset.bound) {
          selector.dataset.bound = '1';
          selector.onchange = () => {
            if (!selector.value) {
              setAdminProductDraft(defaultProductDraft());
              return;
            }
            const p = (state.products || []).find(item => String(item.id) === String(selector.value));
            if (p) setAdminProductDraft(p);
          };
        }

        if (loadBtn && !loadBtn.dataset.bound) {
          loadBtn.dataset.bound = '1';
          loadBtn.onclick = () => {
            const id = String(selector?.value || document.getElementById('productAdminId')?.value || '').trim();
            if (!id) {
              setAdminProductDraft(defaultProductDraft());
              showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đang tạo sản phẩm mới để nhập dữ liệu.' : 'Ready to create a new product.');
              return;
            }
            const p = (state.products || []).find(item => String(item.id) === id);
            if (!p) {
              showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Không tìm thấy sản phẩm cần tải.' : 'Product not found.');
              return;
            }
            setAdminProductDraft(p);
            showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã nạp dữ liệu sản phẩm.' : 'Product loaded.');
          };
        }

        if (newBtn && !newBtn.dataset.bound) {
          newBtn.dataset.bound = '1';
          newBtn.onclick = () => {
            setAdminProductDraft(defaultProductDraft());
            if (selector) selector.value = '';
            showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã chuyển sang tạo sản phẩm mới.' : 'Ready for a new product.');
          };
        }

        if (saveBtn && !saveBtn.dataset.bound) {
          saveBtn.dataset.bound = '1';
          saveBtn.onclick = () => {
            if (!adminGuard(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'lưu sản phẩm' : 'save product')) return;
            const draft = collectProductAdminDraft();
            if (!draft.name.trim()) {
              showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Vui lòng nhập tên sản phẩm.' : 'Please enter a product name.');
              return;
            }
            const idx = (state.products || []).findIndex(item => String(item.id) === String(draft.id));
            if (idx >= 0) {
              state.products[idx] = draft;
            } else {
              state.products.push(draft);
            }
            state.products = state.products.map(p => typeof normalizeProduct === 'function' ? normalizeProduct(p) : p);
            const normalized = state.products.find(item => String(item.id) === String(draft.id));
            if (normalized) productAdminState.currentId = normalized.id;
            refreshProductAdminSelector();
            if (selector) selector.value = normalized?.id || draft.id;
            syncStorage();
            renderProducts();
            renderAdminDashboard();
            if (typeof renderSearchSuggestions === 'function') renderSearchSuggestions();
            if (typeof renderPromoBoard === 'function') renderPromoBoard();
            if (typeof renderTopCollections === 'function') renderTopCollections();
            showToast(state.lang === 'vi' ? 'Đã lưu sản phẩm và đồng bộ toàn hệ thống.' : 'Product saved and synced.');
            setAdminProductDraft(normalized || draft);
          };
        }

        bindProductAdminColorFiles();
        setAdminProductDraft(defaultProductDraft());
        refreshProductAdminSelector();
      }

      function wrapAdminDashboardOnce() {
        const legacy = window.renderAdminDashboard;
        if (typeof legacy !== 'function' || legacy.__productAdminWrapped) return;
        const wrapped = function(...args) {
          const result = legacy.apply(this, args);
          buildProductAdminBox();
          refreshProductAdminSelector();
          bindProductAdminColorFiles();
          return result;
        };
        wrapped.__productAdminWrapped = true;
        window.renderAdminDashboard = wrapped;
      }

      window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        if (state.currentUser && state.currentUser.role === 'admin') {
          buildProductAdminBox();
          refreshProductAdminSelector();
          bindProductAdminColorFiles();
        }
      });

      wrapAdminDashboardOnce();
    })();
  </script>


<style id="responsive-ux-fix-v3">
  html, body {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  *, *::before, *::after {
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  img, video, canvas, svg {
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
  }

  button, input, select, textarea {
    max-width: 100%;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: min(100%, 1320px);
  }

  .glass, .panel, .card, .product-card, .featured-products-shell,
  .product-showcase-strip, .cart-tab-panel, .cart-summary-card,
  .cart-summary-stack, .delivery-card, .wheel-modal, .quickview-modal,
  .checkout-modal {
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .product-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .collection-product-grid {
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .collection-product-card {
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .color-swatches,
  .size-tabs,
  .qv-badges,
  .qv-meta-row {
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .qv-title,
  .qv-subtitle,
  .qv-desc-card p,
  .qv-feature-card strong,
  .qv-feature-card span,
  .collection-product-title,
  .product-title,
  .product-cat,
  .product-meta-stats,
  .promo-mini-title,
  .promo-mini-meta,
  .admin-note,
  .hero-admin-note,
  .collection-admin-note {
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    word-break: break-word;
  }

  .quickview-modal {
    width: min(1120px, calc(100vw - 24px));
    max-height: min(92vh, calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 100 - 24px));
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .qv-media,
  .qv-content {
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .qv-content {
    max-height: min(88vh, calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 100 - 40px));
    overflow-y: auto;
  }

  .qv-image-wrap img {
    object-fit: contain;
  }

  .qv-action-top,
  .qv-action-bottom {
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .admin-product-grid,
  .hero-admin-grid,
  .collection-admin-grid,
  .promo-admin-grid {
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .admin-inline-actions {
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .admin-badge-editor,
  .admin-sale-editor,
  .admin-badge-slot-row,
  .admin-sale-row,
  .hero-upload-row {
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .admin-product-grid .field-full {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }

  .admin-product-grid textarea,
  .admin-product-grid input,
  .admin-product-grid select {
    min-width: 0;
  }

  table {
    table-layout: auto;
  }

  @media (max-width: 1200px) {
    .product-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr));
      gap: 16px;
    }

    .hero-admin-card {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .hero-upload-row {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .collection-admin-grid,
    .promo-admin-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .collection-product-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
      grid-auto-flow: row;
    }

    .quickview-modal {
      width: min(100vw - 16px, 1120px);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .product-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    .collection-product-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    .promo-mini-grid,
    .promo-mini-grid.three {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    .admin-tabs .btn,
    .collection-tab-btn {
      width: 100%;
      justify-content: center;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .quickview-modal {
      width: 100vw;
      height: calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 100);
      max-height: calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 100);
      border-radius: 0;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .qv-media {
      padding: 16px;
      border-right: none;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
      min-height: 0;
    }

    .qv-content {
      padding: 18px 16px 20px;
      max-height: none;
    }

    .qv-image-wrap {
      border-radius: 22px;
    }

    .qv-action-top {
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: stretch;
    }

    .qv-action-top .quantity-control {
      width: 100%;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    .qv-action-bottom {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .product-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
      gap: 14px;
    }

    .product-info {
      padding: 14px;
    }

    .product-title {
      min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero-admin-card,
    .admin-product-grid,
    .collection-admin-grid,
    .hero-upload-row {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .collection-product-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .promo-mini-grid,
    .promo-mini-grid.three {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    }

    .admin-product-grid .field-full {
      grid-column: 1 / -1;
    }

    .admin-tabs,
    .collection-admin-tabs {
      gap: 8px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 520px) {
    .product-grid,
    .collection-product-grid,
    .promo-mini-grid,
    .promo-mini-grid.three {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .size-tabs {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    }

    .size-tab {
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .qv-feature-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .qv-price-card {
      align-items: flex-start;
    }

    .collection-admin-slot,
    .hero-admin-card,
    .admin-product-grid {
      padding: 12px;
    }

    .btn {
      max-width: 100%;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 420px) {
    .size-tabs {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .qv-action-row {
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .qv-summary-panel,
    .qv-desc-card {
      padding: 12px;
    }

    .qv-title {
      font-size: 1.45rem;
    }
  }
</style>

<script id="viewport-height-fix-v3">
(() => {
  const setVh = () => {
    const vh = window.visualViewport ? window.visualViewport.height : window.innerHeight;
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--vh', `${vh * 0.01}px`);
  };

  setVh();
  window.addEventListener('resize', setVh, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener('orientationchange', setVh, { passive: true });
  if (window.visualViewport) {
    window.visualViewport.addEventListener('resize', setVh, { passive: true });
  }
})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
